title: Videographer
description:
ABOUT HONCHO



Honcho is a platform that helps photographers deliver photos instantly at events. Guests can scan a QR code, upload a selfie, and use AI-powered face recognition to quickly find the photos they appear in.



Our customers include brands, organisers, and photographers covering weddings, corporate activations, sports events, marathons, and headshot booths around the world.



We’re looking for a videographer to capture and produce short-form social media videos (Reels, TikTok, Shorts) that showcase real photographers and workflows.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



You’ll help turn real photography workflows into engaging social media content.



Your responsibilities will include:



• Capturing or sourcing video footage of photography workflows, setups, and demonstrations (either filming simple clips yourself or coordinating with photographers and users to obtain footage)

• Editing short-form videos for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

• Creating engaging hooks, captions, and overlays for videos

• Repurposing content across multiple platforms

• Posting and scheduling content across social media channels

• Turning raw footage into 3–5 social media posts per week

• Creating occasional carousel or photo posts

• Assisting with creator / influencer outreach

• Monitoring performance and suggesting improvements



Most content will focus on:



• Event photography workflows

• Instant photo delivery

• Headshot booth setups

• Real-world photography demonstrations



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR



You’re a great fit if you:



• Have experience creating short-form video content from start to finish (capture ? edit ? publish)

• Comfortable capturing simple video clips or sourcing footage from users and creators to turn into engaging short-form content

• Have strong skills editing Reels / TikTok / Shorts

• Know how to create engaging hooks in the first few seconds

• Are comfortable adding captions, overlays, and visual storytelling

• Have strong written English for captions and titles

• Are proactive and curious about content ideas



Bonus if you:



• Are familiar with photography workflows

• Have experience growing social media accounts

• Have worked with creators or influencers

Annual Team Conferences & Events – Travel, food and accommodations on us!



???? Investing in Your Growth

Budget for Training & Development

Career Growth Pathways 



???? Support to Help You Thrive

HMO Allowance – Your health is our priority

Government-Mandated Benefits – SSS, PAGIBIG, PhilHealth

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Reports To: Head of Sales



Job Overview:

As a Sales Consultant at itGenius, you'll be at the forefront of our mission to "Help small business play a bigger game," directly contributing to our vision of "facilitating happy, healthy, productive teams fuelling important global purpose-work." You embody the spirit of being the "Amazon Prime" of IT – highly responsive and providing solutions that are more convenient than Google or AI.

You'll operate like a member of a "high-performing sports team," demonstrating 10x thinking to achieve ambitious goals. As a "useful Geek," you'll leverage your love for technology to provide smart, human-centric solutions. This role is crucial in expanding our reach within the SMB market, acquiring new clients, and nurturing relationships that drive our growth towards becoming the global leader in remote-delivered IT services. You will be directly responsible for identifying opportunities, presenting our ingenious and seamless solutions, and ensuring our customers trust us to be an essential part of their success.





Core Accountabilities

The Sales Consultant will be held accountable for the following measurable objectives:

Individual Gross Profit Target Achievement: Consistently meet or exceed assigned quarterly and annual sales gross profit targets for new and existing clients

Sales Pipeline Health & Progression: Proactively manage and maintain a robust sales pipeline, ensuring a consistent flow of qualified leads and efficient progression of opportunities through all stages of the sales funnel.

Client Satisfaction & Smooth Onboarding: Ensure high levels of prospective client satisfaction throughout the sales process, culminating in a seamless and positive handover experience to the delivery and account management teams.





Key Responsibilities:

The day-to-day activities and duties of the Sales Consultant include:



Prospecting & Lead Qualification: Proactively identify, research, and qualify new sales opportunities within the small to medium business (SMB) market through various channels, including outbound prospecting, inbound lead follow-up, networking, and referrals.



Needs Assessment & Solution Design: Conduct in-depth needs assessments with prospective clients to thoroughly understand their business challenges, technology requirements, and strategic objectives.



Solution Presentation & Value Articulation: Develop and deliver compelling presentations and demonstrations of itGenius's tailored IT solutions and services, clearly articulating their value proposition, benefits, and return on investment.



Proposal Development & Negotiation: Prepare comprehensive and accurate sales proposals, quotes, and contracts. Lead negotiations to secure mutually beneficial agreements and close sales.



CRM Management & Reporting: Maintain accurate, up-to-date, and detailed records of all sales activities, client interactions, pipeline status, and forecasts within the Customer Relationship Management (CRM) system. Provide regular sales performance reports to the Head of Sales.



Cross-Functional Collaboration: Collaborate closely with the technical, operations, and delivery teams to ensure proposed solutions are feasible, client expectations are managed effectively, and client onboarding is seamless.

Market & Product Knowledge: Continuously stay informed about industry trends, competitor activities, emerging technologies, and itGenius's evolving product and service offerings to effectively position our solutions.



Post-Sales Handoff: Facilitate smooth and comprehensive handovers of new clients to the dedicated account management and service delivery teams, ensuring continuity and client satisfaction.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Required Qualifications:

- Experience: 2-3+ years B2B sales experience (ideally IT services or SaaS)

- Track record of meeting/exceeding GP targets

- Experience with CRM tools (Pipedrive, HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.)

- Strong written and verbal communication

- Familiarity with Google Workspace / cloud IT would be a plus





Skills:

- Consultative/solution selling (needs assessment, value articulation)

- CRM pipeline management

- Proposal writing and negotiation

- Presentation and demo delivery

- SMB market awareness

- Basic IT/cloud technology literacy (enough to be a "useful Geek")

- Cross-functional collaboration



It would be nice if you have:

- Proven track record in Managed Service Provider (MSP) sales.

- AI Integration: Experience using AI (like GeniusAI) and automation to optimize workflows.



Work Schedule

8-hour shift

Philippine timezone, morning shift

Monday to Friday

Weekends off

Observance of Philippine holiday

Permanent Work Form Home



You’ll thrive here if you’re interested in:

The evolving world of cloud-based work (Google Workspace, Google Drive, Gmail, etc.)

Supporting small business growth (1–30 employees)

Applying technology to improve productivity and collaboration

title: Senior Paid Social Video Editor  (Meta & TikTok)
description:
Job Title: Senior Paid Social Video Editor - D2C Brands (Meta & TikTok)

Location: Remote (Flexible, but must overlap 7:00–11:00 AM CET)

Hours: Full-time (40 hours/week)

Rate: $10/hr - $15/hr (Based on skill level)



Want this job? Show us your skills. Application instructions are at the very bottom.



I'm Alexander, co-founder of Dimél Media (
).



We're not your typical agency. We're a close-knit team on a mission to become one of the top 1% of Shopify growth partners. We’re looking for a highly skilled, performance-driven video editor to become a core, full-time member of our crew. This isn't a freelance gig. We're looking for someone to go all-in with us.



Who We Partner With:

We work with top-tier 7 and 8-figure DTC brands across the US, Canada, and Europe (specifically in beauty, health, and wellness). We only partner with ambitious founders and brands we truly believe in—that means no low-effort drop-shipping, no fast fashion, and no shady products.



Why You'll Love Working With Us:

No-Burnout Culture: Your success and happiness are essential. We guarantee flexible hours so you have the space to create at the highest level. When you're off, you're off.

Boutique by Design: We keep our client list small to ensure incredible quality and build real relationships.

Level Up Your Skills: You'll get direct access to our network of the top minds in e-commerce and learn what it takes to build a world-class brand.

No Bureaucracy BS: We are built on trust and "Extreme Ownership." If you see a better way to do something, we'll listen.



The Gig (What You’ll Actually Do):

This role is strictly execution-focused. Your main mission will be crafting 2-3 compelling, high-converting video conceps per day for Meta and TikTok, working from approved concepts and raw assets provided by our creative team.



You are the perfect fit if:

You are a wizard in Premiere Pro.

You live and breathe D2C performance marketing. You know how to craft short-form videos that stop the scroll, utilize strong hooks, and make people take action.

You have extreme attention to detail. (We will instantly reject mistakes like edits with audio panned to only one ear, typos in the auto-captions, or lazy pacing).

You actively use AI tools (ElevenLabs, Midjourney, etc.) to enhance your workflow and elevate production value—not as a cheap shortcut.

Your work is equal to or better than this reference quality: 



IMPORTANT: How to Apply (Read Carefully!)

We are skipping the boring cover letters. The best applicants pay close attention to the details. If you fail to follow these 3 steps, your application will be automatically deleted.



Start your application message with the exact phrase: "To the moon"

Do NOT send us a Google Drive folder with 50 random videos. Provide exactly 1 to 3 direct links to your absolute best D2C Paid Social Ads (Meta/TikTok). We do not want to see YouTube vlogs, gaming edits, or podcast clips.

You must include a brief explanation for each video on why it performed well, what the hook strategy was, or your creative reasoning behind the edit (If available, please provide any metrics to justify the performance)



Deadline for application: March 20th, 2 PM (GMT+1)



Note: Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a paid, fixed-price trial task ($40) so we can see your speed, workflow, and quality in action before a final interview.



Cheers,

Alexander Knakkergaard

Co-founder, Dimél Media

title: Full-time Social Media Manager
description:
Full-Time | Remote | Long-Term

42 hours/week | 6 days/week

$1,000 – $1,400 USD/month (based on experience)



Who This Role Is For:



This role is for someone who genuinely loves social media and understands how Instagram works today (trends, formats, timing, and why certain posts go viral)



You don’t need years of professional experience!

What we care about most is your passion for content creation and your understanding of what makes content trend and perform well.



If you’re the type who notices patterns on your feed, saves posts for “content inspo,” or can explain why a Reel popped off then this role will be a great fit.



Your responsibilities include:

- Posting content daily across multiple Instagram accounts

- Writing captions and stories that feel natural and engaging

- Monitoring post performance (reach, saves, shares, engagement)

- Making smart posting decisions based on data and patterns

- Spotting trending formats and adapting them quickly

- Reviewing content carefully before posting to avoid mistakes

- Sharing insights with the content team on what’s working and what’s not



You’ll be trained on how to analyze metrics, understand posting patterns, and improve performance over time.



What We’re Looking For:

- Strong interest in social media and content creation

- Good understanding of social media trends and viral content

- Attention to detail and strong judgment

- Comfortable working independently in a remote setup

- Willingness to learn and improve

- Experience is a plus BUT NOT REQUIRED

- Personal pages, passion projects, or content you’ve made for fun all count as experience.



Why You’ll Like This Role:

- Fully remote work

- No micromanagement

- Paid training and regular feedback

- Opportunity to work on accounts with large audiences

- Clear growth path into strategist or leadership roles

- Supportive and healthy team culture



How to Apply (Please Read Carefully)

To be considered, your application must include:

1. A portfolio (this can be client work, personal Instagram pages, Reels, TikToks, or any creative projects.)

2. A short video introduction (1–2 minutes): Tell us why you’re a great fit. Be creative &  show your personality. We are not looking for a boring or scripted intro.

3. The number “100” in your application subject line (this helps us know you read the full post)



IMPORTANT!!!!!!!

*No video introduction = no review

*Boring or low-effort video = automatic pass



We’re looking for someone creative, detail-oriented, and passionate about social media not just someone who can follow instructions.



If this sounds like you, apply. We’re excited to see what you bring!

title: Creative Director
description:
Full-Time | 42 hours for 6 days a week | $1500 up to $2000



We’re looking for someone who is chronically online in the best way possible.



The type of person who:



• Saves TikToks and Reels constantly

• Knows when a video is about to go viral

• Understands trends before they become trends

• Thinks about content ideas while scrolling



If social media feels less like work and more like second nature, keep reading.



This role is for someone who wants to turn their love for content into a real career.



You’ll be helping create high-performing short-form videos and visuals designed to reach millions of viewers across social media platforms.



This isn’t just an editing job. You’ll also help shape the creative direction of content — spotting trends, improving ideas, and helping posts perform better.



What You’ll Be Doing:



- You’ll work with our social media team to create engaging short-form content for platforms like Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.

- Your responsibilities will include editing videos, working with images, improving visuals, and helping guide the creative direction of posts so they perform better online.

- You’ll also help identify trends, analyze content performance, and contribute ideas that help our social media pages grow.



This Role Is Perfect For Someone Who:



• Is always on social media and understands internet culture

• Loves creating or editing short-form videos

• Naturally notices what makes content go viral

• Has strong English communication skills

• Has a good eye for visuals, aesthetics, and storytelling

• Is reliable, hardworking, and takes responsibility for their work

• Wants to grow their skills in social media and content creation



Experience editing short-form videos is important. Experience in creative direction is a bonus, but not required.



What matters most is that you’re creative, curious, and eager to learn.



Why This Is a Great Opportunity:



• Fully remote work

• Paid training

• Long-term position with growth opportunities

• No micromanagement

• Work on content seen by large audiences

• Opportunities for promotion and salary increases based on performance



To apply, please send:

1. A 1-minute video introduction telling us about yourself and why you'd be a good fit

2. A link to your creative portfolio 



NOTE: Applications without a video introduction will not be reviewed!



We’re looking for people who bring creativity, personality, and strong work ethic — not generic applications.



If you’re passionate about social media and want to turn that passion into a career, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Social Media Video Creator
description:
ABOUT HONCHO



Honcho is a platform that helps photographers deliver photos instantly at events. Guests can scan a QR code, upload a selfie, and use AI-powered face recognition to quickly find the photos they appear in.



Our customers include brands, organisers, and photographers covering weddings, corporate activations, sports events, marathons, and headshot booths around the world.



We’re looking for a video creator to capture and produce short-form social media videos (Reels, TikTok, Shorts) that showcase real photographers and workflows.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



You’ll help turn real photography workflows into engaging social media content.



Your responsibilities will include:



• Capturing or sourcing video footage of photography workflows, setups, and demonstrations (either filming simple clips yourself or coordinating with photographers and users to obtain footage)

• Editing short-form videos for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

• Creating engaging hooks, captions, and overlays for videos

• Repurposing content across multiple platforms

• Posting and scheduling content across social media channels

• Turning raw footage into 3–5 social media posts per week

• Creating occasional carousel or photo posts

• Assisting with creator / influencer outreach

• Monitoring performance and suggesting improvements



Most content will focus on:



• Event photography workflows

• Instant photo delivery

• Headshot booth setups

• Real-world photography demonstrations



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR



You’re a great fit if you:



• Have experience creating short-form video content from start to finish (capture ? edit ? publish)

• Comfortable capturing simple video clips or sourcing footage from users and creators to turn into engaging short-form content

• Have strong skills editing Reels / TikTok / Shorts

• Know how to create engaging hooks in the first few seconds

• Are comfortable adding captions, overlays, and visual storytelling

• Have strong written English for captions and titles

• Are proactive and curious about content ideas



Bonus if you:



• Are familiar with photography workflows

• Have experience growing social media accounts

• Have worked with creators or influencers

title: Senior Product Designer
description:
Full-Time • Senior Level (5+ Years Experience)



## Who We Are



We build software that helps organizations streamline daily operations. Our platform centralizes purchasing flows, task coordination, and communication for teams across many locations. We value thoughtful design, clear communication, and building products that solve real operational problems.



## The Opportunity



We're seeking a **Senior Product Designer** to shape the user experience and interface of a platform used daily by real-world operational teams. You'll work closely with engineering and product leadership to design intuitive workflows, improve usability, and create a cohesive design system across the product.



This role combines **UX thinking, interface design, and product problem-solving**.



## What You'll Do



- Design intuitive workflows for complex operational tasks    

- Translate product requirements into wireframes, prototypes, and polished UI designs

- Improve usability across dashboards, purchasing flows, and internal tools

- Design clear and consistent UI components and interaction patterns

- Develop and maintain a scalable design system

- Work closely with engineers to ensure designs are implemented accurately

- Participate in product planning and help shape the product roadmap

- Identify UX friction and propose thoughtful improvements

- Conduct lightweight user research and usability testing when needed



## Design Requirements



- Strong UX and interaction design skills

- Ability to design complex product workflows and dashboards

- Expert-level experience with Figma (or similar design tools)

- Experience building and maintaining design systems

- Strong visual design and layout skills

- Experience designing responsive interfaces (desktop and mobile)

- Ability to communicate design decisions clearly to engineers and stakeholders



## Professional Background



- 5+ years of product, UI/UX, or digital product design experience

- Experience designing SaaS platforms or complex applications

- Strong portfolio demonstrating UX thinking and polished UI execution

- Comfortable working in a remote, asynchronous environment

- Strong communication and problem-solving abilities



## Why Join Us



- Shape the user experience of a product used in real operational environments

- High autonomy and ownership over product design direction

- Work closely with engineering leadership and influence product decisions

- Build thoughtful, durable design systems and workflows

- Contribute to a platform that solves meaningful real-world problems



## How to Apply



Send your **portfolio**, resume, and a brief note about your experience and interest in the role.

title: QuickBooks Online Assistant – Help Build Our Bookkeeping System (Remote / Philippines)
description:
QuickBooks Online Assistant – Help Build Our Bookkeeping System (Remote / Philippines)



About the Company

We operate a U.S.-based vacation rental management company that manages multiple properties and homeowner accounts. Our business is growing, and we are currently organizing and improving our bookkeeping systems in QuickBooks Online.



We are looking for someone with QuickBooks experience who can work directly with the owner to help clean up existing records, organize transactions, and help build the procedures that will guide this role going forward.



This is not simply a data-entry job. The right person will help create the structure and workflow for this role, and as our business grows, this position can grow with it.



Role Overview

This position focuses on organizing bookkeeping records inside QuickBooks Online and helping establish a consistent workflow for how transactions are categorized and documented.



At the beginning, we will work closely together while building the rhythm and procedures for the position. There is currently a backlog of transactions that need to be categorized and organized for 2025, and we will work through those together.



The goal is to establish a clean, organized bookkeeping system and develop procedures that will later guide the role independently.



How We Will Work Together



Initially, we will work together live on screen while reviewing and organizing transactions.



Expected schedule:



• Approximately 10 hours per week

• Either 2 days per week (about 5 hours each)

• Or 3 shorter sessions spread throughout the week



During these sessions we will:



• review transactions together

• discuss categorization decisions

• organize documentation

• create written procedures for the role



This collaborative phase is important to ensure the bookkeeping structure matches how the business operates.



Responsibilities (Initial Phase)



• Categorize transactions in QuickBooks Online

• Attach receipts and supporting documentation when available

• Help organize vendor and expense records

• Assist with cleaning up historical bookkeeping entries

• Work directly with the owner to establish bookkeeping workflow

• Help document procedures that will later guide the role



Over time, as the system becomes organized, responsibilities may expand.



Access & Controls



Access to company systems will be provided gradually and only as needed.



This position does not include authority to:



• send payments

• transfer funds

• approve financial transactions



The focus of this role is bookkeeping organization and documentation.



Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who:



• Has experience using QuickBooks Online

• Is detail-oriented and organized

• Is comfortable working collaboratively on screen

• Can clearly explain bookkeeping decisions

• Is flexible and interested in helping build a system from the ground up

• Is interested in long-term work and growing with the company



Compensation



This position begins at approximately 10 hours per week.



Compensation range:



$6–$8 USD per hour depending on experience



Monthly compensation during the initial phase will typically fall between:



$260 – $350 per month



As the role develops and responsibilities grow, compensation will grow accordingly. We are looking for someone interested in building a long-term working relationship with our company.



Application Instructions



Please include the following in your application:



A short description of your QuickBooks Online experience



Examples of bookkeeping work you have done previously



Your typical weekly availability



Include the word “Vivid” in the subject line so we know you read the full posting.



We are looking for someone thoughtful, organized, and interested in helping build a bookkeeping system that will support the growth of our business.

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
We are seeking a proactive Sales Development Representative (SDR) to support our sales team by generating and booking qualified meetings with hospitality businesses. The primary focus of this role is outbound prospecting through cold calls, reference checks, and referrals to identify potential clients and schedule meetings for the sales team.



The ideal candidate speaks clear and professional English, is comfortable conducting outbound calls, and has prior experience working in the hospitality industry. This background will help build credibility and rapport when engaging with restaurant, hotel, and hospitality operators.



Responsibilities:



Outbound Prospecting

Conduct outbound cold calls to hospitality businesses to introduce the company’s staffing solutions

Use reference checks and referrals to uncover new potential prospects

Identify decision makers and qualify potential opportunities



Meeting Generation

Schedule qualified discovery meetings for the sales team

Ensure prospects meet the target customer profile before booking meetings

Maintain a consistent daily outreach cadence through calls and follow ups



Pipeline and CRM Management

Track outreach activity, prospects, and meetings in the CRM system

Maintain accurate records of interactions and follow up opportunities

Collaborate with the sales team to ensure a smooth handoff of qualified leads



Requirements:

Previous experience in sales development, lead generation, cold calling, or outbound sales

Clear and professional English communication skills

Comfortable conducting high volume outbound calls

Strong interpersonal and relationship building skills

Previous work experience in the hospitality industry

Experience working in a B2B platform company or technology company is preferred

Experience using CRM platforms to track outreach activity and manage pipeline is preferred

title: Entry Level Technical VA- No Experience Needed
description:
A thriving marketing agency is looking to add one more member to our amazing staff! We are looking for a brilliant, organized individual who has the aptitude to perform logic-based and detail-oriented tasks at a reasonable pace, understands the value of hard work, and wants to grow with the company.



Writing ability and knowledge of basic web development and Schema Markup for SEO is a big plus. You do not need any kind of experience - we will train. We look for brains, ambition, and work ethic – not experience. But experience is always great :). Please watch this video before applying (fix the link to watch the video. link: www.loom. com/share/706dc17d459e435b9b5ef748eb3670f8 )



Benefits include:

4-day workweek!

3 weeks paid leave per year

13th month pay

Performance-based Equipment Bonus

2 raises a year (sometimes more based on performance)

Paid 105 days maternity leave (eligible only if you've been with the company for at least 1 year)

Paid 3 weeks paternity leave (eligible only if you've been with the company for at least 1 year)

A respectful and welcoming work environment

A variety of assignments



Starting full-time salary is $130 per week (40 hours/week). Work hours would be 10 hours per day, Monday through Thursday. Shift time may vary depending on job assignment upon hiring with the range being 3 PM to 1 AM or 5 PM to 3 AM PH Time)



Please do not apply for the position if you are not comfortable with this salary, or if you have other commitments, such as being a student or having another job. After 3 months, you'll be eligible for up to 10 hours of paid overtime per week at 1.5x the regular rate, so if you want to earn more, you do not need to go outside of the company.



Please include the word "unicorn" in the title of your application. Also, before sending your application, please answer this questionnaire (https ://forms. gle/AU2BM4dWacedPq9v7). Send a screenshot of confirmation that you have finished the questionnaire.



Please be aware that there will be a trial interview following the initial interview process.

title: E-commerce Content Specialist
description:
Role Overview



We are seeking a detail-oriented and creatively inclined professional to manage and enhance our online store presence. You will be responsible for maintaining product listings, designing on-site visuals, and ensuring a seamless, on-brand digital shopping experience for our customers.



Key Responsibilities:



Website Content & CMS Management

- Update and maintain product listings, landing pages, banners, and promotional content on the e-commerce CMS.

- Upload and manage product images, descriptions, pricing, specifications, and inventory status with accuracy and timeliness.

- Coordinate with buying/merchandising teams to ensure product information (availability, pricing, features) is always current and consistent.



Visual Design & Creative Production

- Design engaging web banners, campaign visuals, and on-site creatives for seasonal promotions, new arrivals, and sales events.

- Ensure visual consistency across all digital touchpoints in line with brand guidelines.

- Assist with basic image editing, retouching, and optimization of product photography for web use.



Cross-Functional Collaboration & Support

- Partner with marketing, merchandising, and operations teams to align website content with campaign calendars and business priorities.

- Support ad-hoc digital marketing needs, including
 headers, social media graphics, and promotional assets.

- Conduct regular QA checks on live pages to ensure functionality, visual integrity.



Requirements:



- Essential Degree in Design, Marketing, E-commerce, or related field

- 1–3 years of experience in e-commerce content management, digital design, or online merchandising (preferably in home furnishings, retail, or lifestyle sectors)

- Proficiency in design tools: Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, or Figma; familiarity with Canva is a plus

- Hands-on experience with Shopify

- Strong eye for visual detail, layout, and brand consistency

- Excellent organizational skills with ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines

title: AI Chatbot Specialist – Assistable.ai / GoNexis (GoHighLevel) Setup for Marketing Agency
description:
We are looking for an experienced AI Chatbot Specialist who is already very familiar with Assistable.ai (a.k.a. GoNexis AI) and GoHighLevel to help us build, manage, and optimize AI chat and voice bots for our fence contractor clients.



If you have hands-on experience setting up Assistable/GoNexis inside GHL sub-accounts, wiring workflows, and making the bots actually book jobs and update the CRM, we want to talk to you.



Responsibilities

- Set up new AI chat and voice assistants in Assistable.ai / GoNexis for multiple GoHighLevel sub-accounts.

- Connect bots to:

    - GHL pipelines, opportunities, and contacts

    - Calendars/booking

    - SMS, web chat, and other channels as needed



Configure:



- Autopilot/model settings, tools, and memory

- Conversation flows for lead capture, qualification, and appointment booking



Train/tune bots using:

- Client websites, FAQs, and internal docs

- Custom instructions and guardrails so bots stay on-brand and on-niche (fence/deck contractors).



Test and QA:

- Run conversation tests, debug weird replies, and refine prompts/tools

- Make sure booking, tagging, and CRM updates are working correctly.



Document your work:

- Create simple SOPs/checklists so our team can replicate setups

- Keep organized notes inside each GHL account.



Must-Have Skills & Experience

**Please do not apply if you do not already have real experience with Assistable/GoNexis.**



* 100% hands-on experience with Assistable.ai or GoNexis in a GoHighLevel agency environment.

* Strong working knowledge of GoHighLevel:

    - Workflows

    - Triggers/tags

    - Calendars

    - Pipelines/opportunities



Proven experience setting up:



- AI SMS/chat bots that respond to leads

 - AI that books appointments inside GHL

 - AI that updates contact fields, tags, and notes.

 - Comfortable reading and following technical documentation and video tutorials.



Excellent written English; able to write clear, friendly, on-brand bot replies.



Strong attention to detail, especially when mapping fields, tags, and workflows.



Reliable internet, quiet workspace, and consistent availability during agreed hours.



Bonus (not required, but a plus):



 - Experience working with agencies who serve local service businesses (fence, deck, roofing, HVAC, etc.).

 - Basic understanding of APIs/webhooks and how tools pass data between systems.

 - Experience with other AI tools (OpenAI, Claude, etc.).



Working With Us

You’ll be working directly with the co-founder (Ashton) and our operations/tech team. We’re an implementation-heavy agency, and we move fast. We value:

 - Clear, proactive communication (daily updates, quick responses).

 - Ownership of projects (you see issues before we do and propose solutions).

 - Ability to follow existing SOPs and help us improve them over time.



Schedule & Compensation

Probably start as Full-Time, but may turn Part -time, long-term role (we’re not looking for short-term freelancers).



Work hours: flexible, but at least 3–4 hours overlap with US daytime (PST/CST) for meetings and live testing.



Salary: Competitive, based on experience with Assistable/GoNexis and GHL (please include your expected monthly salary in USD).













Our Company: Secure Line Marketing – Digital Marketing Agency for Home Service Businesses (Fence & Deck Contractors)

title: Contract Admin
description:
The Role



As a Contract Administrator, you will hold a key position in our project team. You will be responsible for the end-to-end administration of contracts, ensuring financial accuracy through variation management and progress claims, and providing critical support to our Project Managers and Estimators.



Key Responsibilities



**Review, interpret, and administer head contracts, subcontracts, and supplier agreements.

**Manage variations, monthly progress claims, payment schedules, and three-way match purchase order processing.

**Work closely with Project Managers on cost tracking, forecasting, and the preparation of variation submissions.

**Track contract milestones and deliverables while maintaining accurate records of all contractual correspondence.

**Assist the Estimating team with tendering and bid submissions to support future growth.



Skills & Experience



**Proven background in contract administration roles, ideally within the HVAC or mechanical services industry.

**Competent in using modern software and apps with a high level of attention to detail.

**A strong team player with excellent communication skills.

**Ability to multitask and manage conflicting priorities in a fast-paced project environment.



Why Join Us?

**Australia-based company, day shift

**As part of a growing organisation, you will have opportunities to learn, grow, and develop new skills in a supportive environment.

**This is a dynamic and varied role, so you won’t ever be bored. Every day will bring new challenges and opportunities to learn.

**This is a great opportunity for someone seeking a challenging yet rewarding position with a growing company.



How to Apply?

**Send your application via onlinejobs.ph

**Add in the subejct line "Your Contract Admin"

**Attach your resume

title: Go High Level & Marketing Support – Mortgage Industry
description:
Part-Time Virtual Assistant



CRM & Marketing Support – Mortgage Industry



About the Role



Our client is a growing business in the mortgage industry seeking a proactive and technically skilled Virtual Assistant to take ownership of their CRM system and support marketing and lead generation efforts.



The primary focus of this role will be CRM management using Rad CRM (a white-labeled version of Go High Level). The Virtual Assistant will help maintain and optimize funnels, automation, and landing pages while ensuring the CRM remains organized and fully functional.



In addition to CRM support, the role will include light marketing assistance, such as supporting social media content, basic video editing for funnel content, and assisting with lead generation activities.



This position is ideal for someone who is organized, proactive, and comfortable taking ownership of systems without needing constant supervision.



Job Title



Part-Time Virtual Assistant (CRM & Marketing Support)



Core Responsibilities



Manage and maintain Rad CRM (Go High Level platform)



Build, maintain, and optimize funnels and automation workflows



Create and update landing pages



Clean up and organize CRM pipelines, contacts, and campaigns



Assist with lead generation processes



Support basic social media tasks



Create simple marketing materials using Canva



Perform basic video editing for funnel content



Help with appointment setting when needed



Occasionally communicate with clients via
 or messaging



Required Qualifications & Skills



Strong experience with Go High Level (GHL) or Rad CRM



Ability to manage CRM systems, automation, and funnel building



Strong organizational and systems management skills



Strong English communication skills (8/10 or near-native)



Proactive and able to work independently without micromanagement



Comfortable working remotely and communicating regularly with the client



Preferred / Bonus Skills



Mortgage industry experience (highly preferred)



Experience with social media support



Basic video editing skills



Canva experience for marketing materials



Familiarity with
 / Meta Ads



Lead generation experience



Work Schedule



Part-Time: Up to 20 hours per week



Time Zone: U.S. Pacific Time (PST)



Working Days: Monday – Friday



Working Hours: 12:00 PM – 4:00 PM PST



Communication & Collaboration



Communication tools include Zoom, Google Meet, and Slack Huddle



Direct check-ins with the client a few times per week



Ideal Candidate



The ideal candidate is someone who:



Takes ownership of systems and processes



Is proactive and solutions-oriented



Works well without needing constant supervision



Has strong attention to detail and technical capability



Is comfortable managing CRM and marketing systems independently



Why This Role Matters



This role will help ensure that the CRM system, funnels, and marketing processes remain organized and optimized, allowing the business owner to focus on growth without needing to micromanage day-to-day operations.



Application Instructions



To apply, please submit:



Your updated resume



A 60–90 second self-introduction video explaining your experience with CRM systems, automation, and marketing support.



Important: Only applications submitted within 48–72 hours of this posting will be considered



Application Subject: Go High Level

title: Paid Media Specialist (Google Ads & Meta Ads)

Conduct research on target audiences, keywords, and competitors to improve campaign strategy



Monitor campaign performance and make adjustments to improve key metrics such as CPA, ROAS, CTR, CPC, and conversion rate



Work with content and design teams to test different ad creatives and messaging



Manage advertising budgets and allocate spend effectively



Assist with tracking setup using tools such as Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, and Meta Pixel



Prepare regular performance reports with insights and recommendations



Stay updated on advertising platform updates and best practices



Collaborate with internal teams to ensure paid media strategies support overall marketing goals



Requirements



Background in Marketing, Business, or a related field is preferred



Approximately 1–3 years of experience in paid media or digital advertising



Experience managing campaigns in Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager



Strong analytical and problem-solving skills



Familiarity with campaign tracking and performance reporting tools



Ability to manage multiple campaigns and prioritize tasks



Good communication and teamwork skills



Preferred Qualifications



Experience working with lead generation or e-commerce campaigns



Understanding of A/B testing, remarketing, and marketing funnels



Experience managing advertising budgets across multiple campaigns



Google Ads or Meta advertising certifications



What We Offer



Competitive compensation based on experience



Opportunity to work with campaigns across different industries



Supportive and collaborative work environment



Opportunities for learning and professional development

title: Paid Media Buyer (Meta & Google Ads) – B2B E-commerce
description:
Paid Media Buyer (Meta & Google Ads) – B2B E-commerce



We are a growing B2B e-commerce brand built on Shopify, providing professional-grade products to businesses, clinics, and practitioners.



We are looking for an experienced Paid Media Buyer who understands how to run campaigns for professional audiences and higher-value products.



In this role, you will work closely with the founder and play an important part in managing and improving our paid advertising strategy.



Key Skills



Meta Ads

Experience running campaigns that target professional or industry-specific audiences.



Google Ads

Experience with Search and Shopping campaigns focused on high-intent buyers.



Data Analysis

Understanding of important performance metrics such as CAC, ROAS, and customer value when working with higher-ticket products.



Communication

Ability to provide clear updates and share campaign insights with the team.



Responsibilities



Build and manage paid advertising campaigns on Meta, Google Ads, and TikTok



Optimize campaigns targeting professional buyers such as clinics, practitioners, and trade customers



Test audiences, creative assets, and messaging to improve performance



Manage budgets and monitor campaign metrics



Provide weekly reports on key performance indicators such as spend, ROAS, and CPA



Support creative planning and ad copy when needed



Preferred Experience



At least 3 years of experience running paid ads for e-commerce or B2B brands



Experience marketing higher-value or professional products



Ability to share examples of previous campaign results or performance metrics



Strong experience with Meta Ads Manager



Familiarity with Shopify



Application Process



To apply, please include the following:



A short Loom video (approximately 3–5 minutes) explaining a campaign you managed for a professional or higher-value product, including your approach and results.



A short written response (around 200 words) to this scenario:



A campaign targeting professional buyers has been running for 7 days. CPM is high, CTR is reasonable, but CPA is above target. What steps would you take to improve performance?



A screenshot of recent ad account performance metrics (client names can be hidden).



Providing these details will help us better understand your experience.



Hiring Process



Our hiring process typically includes:



Application review



A short video conversation with the founder



A paid two-week trial project



Discussion of a longer-term full-time or part-time role



We look forward to learning more about your experience.

Your sales experience

title: Homecare Caregiver recruiter
description:
We are a licensed home care agency serving seniors across South Central Minnesota. Our caregivers help older adults remain independent and safe in their own homes. As our service area continues to grow, we are hiring a full-time remote Recruiter who will take ownership of building and maintaining a steady pipeline of qualified caregivers. This role requires someone who understands that recruiting in home care is an operational function, not just a hiring activity. Your responsibility is to ensure the organization always has enough caregivers in the right cities so that seniors who need care can receive it without delay.



The recruiter will manage the full caregiver recruiting cycle, from attracting applicants to moving qualified candidates into the hiring process. You will actively manage job postings, communicate with applicants by phone, screen candidates, and maintain an organized recruiting pipeline. This role also requires close coordination with scheduling, HR, and leadership so that hiring activity matches the real staffing needs of the business. Success in this position means anticipating shortages before they happen and ensuring we always have caregivers available where demand exists.



This role involves a high level of daily communication with applicants and requires strong organization. You will review applicant flow, conduct structured phone screens, follow up with candidates who have incomplete applications, and ensure interviews are scheduled efficiently. You will also track recruiting metrics such as applicant volume, interview conversion, hires, and hiring trends by geographic area. The goal is to keep the recruiting pipeline healthy so the company can continue expanding services without staffing interruptions.



We are looking for someone who has at least two years of recruiting experience and is comfortable handling frequent phone conversations with applicants. Experience recruiting hourly workers, especially in healthcare or home care, is helpful but not required. Strong written and spoken English is essential, along with solid spreadsheet skills and the ability to stay organized while managing multiple applicants at different stages of the process.



The right candidate is reliable, calm under pressure, and focused on getting results. We value people who communicate clearly, take ownership of their work, and approach recruiting with a problem-solving mindset. If you apply for this position, please include the word Apollo somewhere in your response so we know you read the entire posting.

title: Senior Product Manager
description:
Location: Remote (Work from Home)  

Job Type: Full Time  

Experience: 5+ years



### About Us



We are on a mission to simplify the purchasing and management of supplies for real-estate properties. Our platform is transforming how property owners and managers procure essential items—making the process more efficient, transparent, and cost-effective. Join us in building software that meaningfully improves day-to-day property operations.



### Role Description



As a Product Manager, you will own the end-to-end product lifecycle for key areas of our platform. You’ll sit at the intersection of engineering, business, and users—translating real-world operational needs into clear product requirements. This role is ideal for someone who is organized, user-focused, and comfortable working closely with our clients and our engineering team in a remote environment.



### Key Responsibilities



- Define and own product requirements for core platform features related to purchasing, orders, vendors, and property workflows.

    

- Gather and synthesize input from customers, internal stakeholders, and leadership to inform product decisions.

    

- Write clear product requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria.

    

- Manage the product backlog and prioritize work based on impact, effort, and business goals.

    

- Collaborate with engineering teams throughout the development lifecycle to ensure timely and high-quality delivery.

    

- Support product launches by coordinating documentation, internal communication, and rollout plans.

    

- Continuously identify opportunities to improve usability, efficiency, and customer satisfaction.

    



### Qualifications



- 5+ years of experience in product management, preferably in a SaaS or B2B environment.

 

- Strong understanding of user-centered design and product discovery practices.

    

- Proven ability to manage competing priorities and drive projects to completion.

    

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

    

- Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.

    

- Self-motivated and comfortable working independently as part of a fully remote team.

    



### Nice to Have



- Experience with e-commerce, procurement, or marketplace platforms.

    

-  Familiarity with tools like Jira, Linear, or similar product management systems.

    

- Experience working with distributed or fully remote engineering teams.

    



### How to Apply



If you are a product manager who enjoys building practical, high-impact software and collaborating with strong engineering teams, we’d love to hear from you. Please submit your resume and a brief cover letter outlining your experience and interest in joining our team.

title: Business Development Representative
description:
About QuickAds.ai 



QuickAds.ai is an AI-powered platform transforming how D2C brands in fashion, beauty, and personal care scale their marketing. We help brands create, optimize, and scale ads faster and smarter. Backed by leaders from Google, Meta, and Kae Capital, we are profitable from Day 1. We're growing fast.



We need a sharp, creative Sales Associate who doesn't wait for leads to come in—someone who finds the right brands, opens doors in unexpected ways, and turns conversations into clients.



What You'll Own



Lead Generation - Your Most Important Job

Your pipeline starts with you. You'll build systems to find leads, qualify them, and keep them flowing. That means going beyond the obvious



Identify mid-size D2C brands and relevant decision makers worth pursuing

Build targeted prospect lists and constantly refresh your pipeline with fresh, relevant leads

Multi-Channel Outreach



Run personalized cold
 and calling campaigns that actually get replies- no templates, no spray-and-pray

Engage prospects on LinkedIn with thoughtful, value-first messaging and content interaction

Explore unconventional channels like DMs on Instagram, voice notes, Loom videos, engaging with brand content and more to stand out

Build sequences and follow-up cadences that feel human, not automated

Qualification & Conversion



Run sharp discovery calls to uncover pain points around ad creative, spend efficiency, and scaling

Qualify leads based on brand size, ad spend, growth stage, and decision-maker access

Demonstrate QuickAds' value clearly and move prospects through the funnel to close

Pipeline & Performance



Own your CRM and lead list - keep it clean, updated, and actionable

Track outreach metrics, reply rates, meeting conversions, and revenue targets

Report weekly on what's working, what's not, and how you're iterating

You're a Fit If You...



Have 2–4 years in outbound sales - agency, SaaS, or selling to D2C/e-commerce brands preferred

Love the hunt - finding the right brand, the right contact, and the right angle excites you

Write exceptionally well and know how to make a cold
 feel like it was written just for that one person

Think beyond
 - you've booked meetings via LinkedIn, Instagram DMs, or approaches most people haven't tried

Are self-directed, metrics-driven, and thrive without a script

What You'll Get



Above-market salary + aggressive performance incentives

Full ownership of your outreach strategy, pipeline, and client relationships

Direct access to leadership and a fast feedback loop - no bureaucracy

The chance to shape sales at a high-growth, AI-first company disrupting how brands do creative at scale

title: Meta Ads Campaign Manager (Part time)
description:
About Us

We’re a programming education company that helps experienced software engineers build real-world Rust projects and land Rust roles. We run a high-ticket, cohort-based accelerator plus self-paced training, and reach engineers through YouTube,
, and partnerships.



Role Overview

We are looking for a part-time Meta Ads Operator to implement and maintain our
 and Instagram campaigns. This is an execution-focused role: you will take clear targeting and creative direction from the founder and marketing team, then handle setup, tracking, and ongoing optimizations inside Meta Ads Manager.



Ideal for someone who enjoys clean accounts, accurate tracking, and making data-driven tweaks, not sitting in branding meetings.



Key Responsibilities

1. Implement and maintain Meta Pixel and Conversion API across our funnels (waitlist, applications, bookings, purchases).

2. Set up campaigns, ad sets, and ads according to provided specs (objectives, budgets, audiences, and creatives).

3. Create and manage custom and lookalike audiences from our traffic,
 list, and engaged users.

4. Monitor performance daily on weekdays and execute simple rules: pause obvious losers, keep winners within defined guardrails, and flag issues quickly.

5. Run basic A/B tests on creatives and audiences following our testing framework.

6. Ensure tracking events fire correctly on all key steps and troubleshoot when they do not.

7. Produce a concise weekly report (spend, cost per waitlist opt-in, cost per application, cost per call, cost per student) with 2 to 3 clear recommendations.



You Are A Good Fit If

1. You have 1 to 3 years of hands-on experience running Meta Ads (lead gen or info/education experience is a plus).

2. You are comfortable with Meta Ads Manager, Pixel, standard events, and basic CAPI.

3. You can read numbers and make simple performance-based decisions without drama.

4. You are organized, responsive, and document what you do so others can follow it.

5. You can overlap at least 2 to 3 hours per day with US time zones.

6. You’re currently freelancing or working part-time and want a long term core client, not just a one-off project.



This Role Is Not

1. Not a creative director or copywriter (we have a content and
 team).

2. Not a CMO or growth strategist d
 offers, funnels, or pricing.

3. Not a general social media manager (no organic posting, community management, or influencer work).



Scope & Engagement

1. Part-time contractor.

2. We’ll start at 5–10 hours/week for the first 60–90 days while we validate and scale Meta.

3. We guarantee a minimum of 20 hours/month, paid monthly, so your time is predictable.

4. If performance is strong and we scale ad spend, this role can grow into 15–20+ hours/week and potentially a full-time PH position.

5. Remote, flexible schedule as long as SLAs are met and campaigns are monitored on weekdays.



How To Apply



Please reply to this job post with the following:

1. A brief summary of your Meta Ads experience, including typical monthly budgets.

2. Screenshots or summaries of 2 to 3 campaigns you have managed (goal, budget, structure, and results).

3. One paragraph on how you normally set up tracking (pixel, events, CAPI) for a lead gen funnel.

4. Your part-time hourly rate and full-time monthly rate, respectively.

title: E - Commerce Video Editor
description:
Overview

We are seeking an exceptional, data-driven Video Editor obsessed with driving conversions for e-commerce/DTC brands. This is a fast-paced role requiring a marketer's mindset, platform expertise, and rapid iteration based on performance data.



Core Responsibilities (What You Will Do)

Conversion Focus: Edit raw footage (often UGC-style) into scroll-stopping, short-form ads (15-60 seconds) for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube, focused entirely on driving sales.



DR Implementation: Structure videos using Direct Response (DR) frameworks (e.g., Problem-Agitate-Solution), ensuring a powerful hook in the first 3 seconds, and seamless CTA integration.



Technical Execution: Apply advanced post-production techniques: color grading, audio mixing, speed ramping, dynamic transitions, and creating engaging typography/subtitles.



Rapid Iteration: Maintain fast turnaround (24 for first cuts) and produce multiple testing variations based on performance metrics (CTR, ROAS, Hook Rate).



Platform Mastery: Optimize content (9:16, 1:1, etc.) for native feel and best practices across TikTok, Reels, and YouTube Ads.



Pre-requisites (Must-Haves)

Experience: Proven portfolio of successful e-commerce/DTC ad editing (not just cinematic/corporate work).



Software Mastery: Advanced proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro or Final Cut Pro.



Mindset: Deep understanding of DR Marketing and key metrics (ROAS, CTR). Must be performance-driven, flexible, and willing to iterate based on data without ego.



Skills: Expertise in UGC-style editing, audio/sound design, and closed captioning/subtitles.



Bonus Skills

Proficiency in After Effects, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve.



Familiarity with ad platforms and marketing metrics.



Workload: Initial paid trial project, then transitioning to 20 hours per week ongoing.



Shift: Flexible hours; work is output-based with strict deadlines.



To Apply:

If you are an exceptional designer with a portfolio that demonstrates world-class DTC brand quality, kindly fill out the application form:






Looking forward to receiving your application!

title: Accessibility Specialist (Documents / PDFs)
description:
This role requires advanced accessibility expertise and attention to detail, rather than general graphic design capability

alone. The specialist supports the remediation and production of complex documentation to meet WCAG 2.2 AA and PDF accessibility standards, ensuring outputs are compliant, usable, and fit for purpose.



Key Responsibilities

• Produce high-end, accurate finished art across complex, long-form financial services documentation.

• Create accessible interactive form PDFs using Adobe InDesign and Acrobat.

• Remediate existing documents to meet WCAG 2.2 AA and PDF accessibility standards.

• Apply and validate correct tagging, reading order, alt text, structure, and logical document flow.

• Conduct screen reader testing and accessibility validation.

• Ensure all documents meet compliance requirements within regulated environments.

• Liaise with IVE stakeholders to clarify briefs and accessibility requirements.

• Maintain exceptional attention to detail and technical accuracy.



Essential Skills & Experience

• Experience working within corporate brand guidelines and compliance frameworks.

• Advanced Adobe InDesign skills — complex layouts, long-form documents, print and digital production.

• Proven experience creating accessible interactive PDFs in InDesign and Acrobat.

• Strong working knowledge of WCAG 2.2 AA and PDF accessibility standards.

• Demonstrated experience remediating documents for accessibility compliance.

• Confident conducting screen reader testing and validating tagging, reading order, alt text and document structure.

• Experience working with regulated or financial services documentation highly regarded.



Accreditations & Desirable Skills

• Accessibility accreditations or formal accessibility certifications.

• Familiarity with Common Look PDF or other remediation tools.

• Proficiency in Microsoft Word and PowerPoint for document formatting.



***Work from home ready

***Amenable to work around 6AM-3PM //7 AM-4PM MNL time

***Comfortable using time tracker (time doctor app)



Interested applicants may send their most updated CV and portfolio. Apply now!

title: Part-Time Virtual Assistant  Administrative & Marketing Support – Real Estate Team
description:
About the Role



Our client is a growing real estate team serving the Greater Dallas and East Texas areas, with a strong focus on Rockwall County. The team is seeking a proactive and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support both administrative operations and light marketing tasks.



The primary focus of the role will be inbox management, administrative organization, and operational support, with occasional marketing assistance such as creating simple reels or updating Canva materials.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys keeping systems organized, managing communication, and supporting business growth through both administrative and marketing tasks.



The client is a high-driver, highly organized professional who values efficiency and independence. They provide clear expectations but do not micromanage, making this role well suited for someone who is proactive and confident working remotely.



Job Title



Part-Time Virtual Assistant (Administrative & Marketing Support)



Core Responsibilities



Manage and organize Outlook
 inbox communications



Maintain scheduling and appointments using iCloud Calendar



Create and maintain Google Forms for client intake and operational processes



Support administrative workflows and system implementation



Assist with contact management and database organization



Update documents, presentations, and internal materials



Provide light marketing support, including:



Creating simple reels from provided B-roll



Updating graphics or materials in Canva



Assisting with small content updates using editing apps when needed



Required Qualifications & Skills



Near-native written and verbal English communication skills



Experience with
 management and inbox organization



Proficiency in Google Workspace (Google Forms, Google Drive, Google Sheets)



Experience using Canva for basic design tasks



Highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive



Strong communication and responsiveness when working remotely



Positive attitude and ability to work with a structured, fast-paced client



Preferred / Bonus Skills



Familiarity with Trello (beginner to intermediate)



Basic short-form video or reel creation



Experience using editing apps for simple video/content adjustments



Previous experience supporting a real estate professional or small team



Work Schedule



Part-Time: Up to 20 hours per week



Time Zone: U.S. Central Time (CST)



Preferred Days: Monday–Friday 

Working Hours: 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM CST



Ideal Candidate



Positive and reliable team player



Detail-oriented and organized



Comfortable working with a high-performing, highly organized client



Able to work independently without needing constant supervision



Confident communicator and proactive problem solver



Application Instructions



To apply, please submit:



Your updated resume



A 60–90 second self-introduction video explaining your experience and why you believe you are a great fit for this role.



Note: Only valid applications submitted within 48–72 hours of this posting will be considered.



Application Subject: Admin/Marketing

title: Production Assistant / Content Operations - YouTube Media Company
description:
COMPANY OVERVIEW



Edwards Media Ventures LLC is a YouTube media company operating three channels with 2.4 million combined subscribers covering finance, politics, and social commentary. We produce 40-44 videos per month across Edwards Economics (345K subs), The Edwards Report (342K subs), and The Kaelin Edwards Show (1.74M subs).



ROLE SUMMARY



We are hiring a full-time remote Production Assistant to manage daily content operations across all three YouTube channels and our social media accounts. This is not an editing role. You will be responsible for clip sourcing, social media distribution, sponsor pipeline management, video uploading and scheduling, and general content operations. You will work directly with the channel owner and a video editor.



RESPONSIBILITIES



1. Clip Sourcing (Primary)

- Source 10-15 video clips per filming slate across all three channels

- Identify timestamps and clip durations from source material (news segments, interviews, commentary, social media)

- Maintain a clip library organized by topic, channel, and date

- Deliver clip lists with timestamps and runtime totals before each filming session

- Target total clip runtime: 14-18 minutes for EE, 4-7 minutes for TER, 10-14 minutes for KE



2. Social Media Posting

- Post 2-3 Shorts/Reels per video across YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, TikTok, and
 Reels

- Manage posting calendar across 5 platforms (YouTube, Instagram, TikTok,
, X)

- Schedule posts using platform-native tools or a scheduling tool

- At full volume: 80-130 pieces of short-form content distributed per month

- Maintain consistent posting cadence (not batch-dumping)



3. Sponsor Pipeline Management

- Manage the Sponsors database in Notion (track outreach, status, contracts, payments)

- Send media kits and brand decks to warm leads and inbound inquiries

- Follow up on pending deals and contract signatures

- Coordinate with sponsor contacts on deliverable timelines and air dates

- Flag new inbound sponsor
s for review



4. Video Uploading and Scheduling

- Upload completed videos from Google Drive to YouTube across all three channels

- Write and optimize titles, descriptions, and tags using provided SEO guidelines

- Schedule videos according to the content calendar

- Set thumbnails (provided by the thumbnail designer)

- Add end screens, cards, and pinned comments (sponsor links, product links)



5.
 Newsletter Support

- Prepare weekly newsletter drafts from provided talking points

- Schedule sends in Kit 
 platform)

- Monitor subscriber metrics and flag any issues



6. General Operations

- Coordinate delivery timelines between the editor and thumbnail designer

- Update Notion databases as videos move through the production pipeline

- Handle light research tasks as assigned

- Maintain organized Google Drive folder structure



REQUIREMENTS



Must Have:

- Fluent English (written). You will write video descriptions,
 drafts, and sponsor communications.

- Experience with YouTube (uploading, scheduling, basic SEO, analytics)

- Experience with social media management (Instagram, TikTok,
)

- Comfortable with Notion (we use it extensively for project management)

- Reliable internet and ability to work US Eastern Time hours (or overlap significantly)

- Detail-oriented and organized. This role manages a lot of moving pieces.

- Self-starter who does not need to be micromanaged.



Nice to Have:

title: Finance Officer (Accounts Payable, Receivable, Procurement)
description:
Full-time- 40hrs/week

AU Business Hours (8:30 AM – 5:00 PM AEST)

$350/week



We are looking for a detail-oriented Finance Officer to join our growing international team. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working with numbers, improving processes, and managing financial operations in a structured environment. 



You will be responsible for supporting the finance team by managing accounts payable, accounts receivable, and procurement processes, ensuring invoices, payments, and financial records are handled accurately and on time.



This is a remote role working with an established international company with a collaborative and professional culture.



What You'll Do:



Accounts Payable

- Review and process supplier invoices

- Manage weekly payment runs

- Reconcile supplier invoices and statements

- Ensure invoices are coded correctly and approved

- Maintain organized invoice records

- Support month-end financial processes

- Coordinate with internal teams and external vendors





Procurement Support

- Raise purchase orders

- Assist in supplier sourcing and RFP preparation

- Maintain supplier databases

- Support supplier evaluation and onboarding





Accounts Receivable

- Process and allocate customer payments

- Reconcile payments with banking and accounting systems

- Maintain customer debtor accounts

- Assist with resolving payment discrepancies







What We're Looking For:



Required Skills & Experience

- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or Business

- Proven experience in Accounts Payable

- Strong understanding of accounting principles and bookkeeping

- Experience handling high-volume invoices

- Strong Excel skills

- Excellent attention to detail

- Ability to work independently in a remote environment





Highly Preferred

- Experience using SAP or similar ERP systems

- Experience with financial reconciliation

- Experience supporting procurement processes

- Experience working with international finance teams



Key Traits for Success

We are looking for someone who is:

- Extremely detail-oriented

- Organized and able to meet deadlines

- A strong communicator with internal and external stakeholders

- Comfortable handling large volumes of financial data

- Proactive in improving processes





Why Join Us?

- Stable long-term remote opportunity

- Work with an experienced global finance team

- Structured processes and supportive leadership

- Opportunity to grow within an international company



To Apply:

- Share your most updated CV

- Answer the following questions in your application



1. How many years of Accounts Payable, Receivable and procurement experience do you have?

2. Which accounting or ERP systems have you used?

3. You receive a supplier invoice for $5,200, but the Purchase Order is $5,000 and the goods receipt shows $5,000.

What steps would you take before approving the invoice for payment?

4. A supplier statement shows 5 outstanding invoices, but your accounting system only shows 3 invoices recorded.

What would you do to reconcile this?

5. Why is it important to reconcile Accounts Payable before month-end closing, and what problems can happen if this is not done?

title: Senior Paralegal / Legal VA (Remote – Work From Home)
description:
About Us



We are a modern, technology-driven law firm based in Australia. Our firm operates fully digitally, allowing our team to work efficiently from anywhere while providing high-quality legal services to our clients.



We are currently looking for a Senior Paralegal / Legal Virtual Assistant to join our growing team. This is a remote, work-from-home position, offering the opportunity to work with a professional and supportive legal team while building your career.

Key Responsibilities



In this role, you will support our lawyers and legal team by assisting with day-to-day legal and administrative tasks, including:

• Managing and organising legal files

Work Setup Requirements

Benefits

How to Apply

• A Cover Letter outlining your experience and why you would be a great fit for the role.

title: GoHighLevel Virtual Assistant – Lead Management & Booking Coordinator
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a highly organized, disciplined, and responsive Virtual Assistant with proven GoHighLevel experience to help manage incoming leads and bookings.



Most of our leads come from Instagra
ssages, so speed and organization are critical. The faster we respond to leads, the higher the chances of booking the client.



Your role will be to manage incoming leads inside GoHighLevel, organize them in the pipeline, create quotes, follow up with prospects, and track confirmed bookings.



This role requires someone who already understands GoHighLevel and CRM workflows.



Lead Workflow Overview

Step 1: Lead Messages Us on Instagram



When someone sends us a message on Instagram:



• Our workflow automatically sends them a booking / inquiry form link

• They are tagged in GoHighLevel

• They are created as a contact in the system



Step 2: If the Customer Submits the Form



If the lead completes the inquiry form:



Open the form submission inside GoHighLevel



Review the details carefully



Use the information to create a quote inside GoHighLevel



Send the quote to the business owner for review



After approval, send the quote to the customer through:

•

OR

• The conversation inside GoHighLevel



Step 3: If the Customer Does NOT Submit the Form



Not every customer wants to fill out a form.



If they do not submit it:



• They will still be tagged in the pipeline as a new lead

• You will need to ask questions through the conversation to gather the necessary information to price the job

• Encourage them to complete the form, or collect enough information to create a quote manually



Pipeline Management



All leads must be properly organized in the GoHighLevel pipeline.



Examples of pipeline stages may include:



• New Lead

• Contacted

• Waiting for Form

• Quote Sent

• Follow Up Needed

• Contract Sent

• Closed / Booked

• Lost Lead



Keeping the pipeline organized allows the business to track every lead and understand the status of each opportunity.



Organization and attention to detail are extremely important for this role.



Booking Management



When a customer moves forward with booking:



Contract is sent



Customer signs the contract



Customer pays the deposit



Booking is confirmed



Once the booking is confirmed, you must:



• Add the client to our Google Doc called “Upcoming Bookings”

• Track the remaining balance owed after the deposit

• Ensure all information is recorded accurately



Quote Creation



When creating quotes:



• Use the company price sheet as a reference

• Ensure pricing is accurate

• Double-check all event details before sending for approval



Accuracy is critical when building quotes.



Responsibilities Summary



Your responsibilities will include:



• Responding to incoming leads from Instagram

• Managing conversations inside GoHighLevel

• Sending booking form links

• Reviewing form submissions

• Creating quotes using our price sheet

• Sending quotes for owner approval

• Sending approved quotes to customers

• Following up with leads who have not responded

• Encouraging leads to complete inquiry forms

• Organizing contacts inside the pipeline

• Tracking contracts and bookings

• Adding confirmed bookings to our Upcoming Bookings Google Doc

• Tracking remaining balances after deposits

• Keeping the CRM organized and up to date at all times



Requirements (Important)

GoHighLevel Experience



Applicants must already have experience using GoHighLevel.



You should know how to:



• Manage contacts

• Use pipelines

• Send messages through the conversation tab

• Create opportunities

• Navigate form submissions

• Work inside CRM systems



If you do not have GoHighLevel experience, please do not apply.



Communication Skills



You must:



• Speak fluent English

• Write clear and professional messages

• Communicate effectively with customers



Personality & Work Style



We are looking for someone who is:



• Highly organized

• Detail-oriented

• Disciplined with follow-ups

• Very responsive (fast replies are critical for bookings)

• Professional and reliable



Schedule



You must be available to work:



Tuesday – Saturday

10:00 AM – 6:00 PM

California Time (PST)



Availability during these hours is required because this is when most leads come in.



Pay Structure



Hourly Pay:

$9/hour



Payment Schedule:

Bi-weekly



Performance Bonus:

$15–$25 per confirmed booking



A confirmed booking means:



• Contract signed

• Deposit paid

• The lead was handled and followed up by you



Hiring Process



To ensure we hire the right person, applicants will go through the following steps:



Application review



Scenario-based screening questions



Video interview



Short trial task



The trial will allow us to evaluate:



• Your communication skills

• Your attention to detail

• Your knowledge of GoHighLevel

• How you respond to real lead scenarios



Video Interview Requirement



Applicants must be willing to join a video call interview to:



• Verify English fluency

• Discuss experience

• Demonstrate familiarity with GoHighLevel



How to Apply



To apply, send a message including the following:



Your experience using GoHighLevel



What types of pipelines or CRM systems you have managed



Your availability in California time (PST)



Why you believe you are a good fit for this role



Important: Start your application with the word “Pipeline” so we know you read the entire job description.



Applicants who do not follow instructions will not be considered.
