title: Motion Graphics Video Editor
description:
*** Please read through the entire post before applying.  Thanks! ***



Company Description

Engage Video Production (EVP) creates educational and communication focused video content, primarily for aerospace, defense, and technical clients. Our work helps high stakes organizations explain complex ideas clearly, train teams effectively, and communicate with absolute precision. We operate with a military grade standard of excellence and are looking for a Motion Graphics Artist & Graphic Designer who is ready to grow within a high accountability environment.



The Three Pillars of Success at EVP

To succeed here, you must embody these three core values:



Discipline: You follow through on every task without "floundering" or ghosting. You possess the self-discipline to manage your time and meet deadlines without constant supervision.



Motivation and Dedication: You are dedicated to the mission and the company's growth. You don't just "do a job"; you look for ways to contribute to the overall success of the team.



Radical Integrity and Accountability: You own your mistakes immediately. You have the backbone to point out errors for correction, even if they are your own, because you understand that precision is non-negotiable.



*** Role Overview *** 

This is a dual-focus role. You will be the primary creator for our dedicated explainer and motion graphics videos, but you will also assist in the creation of graphic assets (when needed) for our standard video team. You will coordinate with our video editors to provide the graphic elements, overlays, and design assets that elevate every project we produce.

*** Core Responsibilities *** 

Motion Graphics Mastery: Lead the production of full-scale explainer videos, from storyboarding and asset creation to final animation.

Collaborative Design: Act as the internal design resource for our standard video editors. You will create the lower thirds, callouts, and technical diagrams they need for their edits.

Web & Digital Assets: Design high-fidelity web page elements and marketing collateral that align with our brand and our clients' technical standards.

Brand Consistency: Ensure a "Rising Tide" level of quality across all visual touchpoints, maintaining a clean, professional, and sophisticated aesthetic.



*** Must-Have Technical Skills*** 

Technical Stack: Proficiency in Adobe After Effects, Illustrator, and Photoshop - or similar graphical editing software.



Portfolio: A strong reel showcasing explainer videos and a portfolio of clean, functional graphic design (web elements, technical icons, etc.).



Leadership/Coordination: Ability to work alongside other editors, providing them with the assets they need to succeed on their timelines.



Communication: Exceptional English skills and a proactive communication style.



*** Compensation ***

Starting at: $350 (~20,000 PHP) to $800 (~47,000 PHP) USD per month, based on 20 hours/week, subject to change. 

Starting Rate: $4.00 to $10.00 USD per hour.  [*Conversions are approximate.]



Part-Time (20 hrs/week): $305 – $605 USD (~20,000 PHP – 47,000 PHP) monthly.

Full-Time (40 hrs/week): $640 – $1,600 USD (~36,800 – 93,500 PHP) monthly.



Rate Determination: Starting salary/rates are dependent upon experience and demonstrated skill.



A Note on AI and Judgment

At EVP, we use advanced tools every day. However, this role requires high level human judgment and Radical Integrity. We are hiring a human, not a prompt. If you use AI to draft your personal responses in the “How to Apply” section, you are failing the first test of this role: Honesty. We want to hear your real thoughts and see your real personality to ensure you will be a good fit on our team. If your application lacks a unique human voice, it will be discarded. Use AI to assist your workflow later; do not use it to represent your character now.



*** How to Apply ***

To be considered, you must follow these steps exactly. Precision is a requirement for this role.



-Utilize 7 AP or more.



-Subject Line - change it to: "Technical Visual Artist – [Your Name]".



-Provide a link to your best motion and static design work. (No portfolio = no consideration).



-State the 10th word of our "Three Pillars" section.



-In exactly two sentences, describe a specific time you had to fix a mistake you made in a motion graphics project. Use plain English; no AI-generated fluff.



-Attach or link to your CV/resume.  Must be in PDF format only.



-Want to really stand out? Record a 60-second video (Loom or similar) introducing yourself. Tell me why you are the right pick and what about Aerospace & Defense interests you. Start the video by addressing me by name (Ryan). Applicants who include this video move to the top of the list.



Thanks for your time and genuine interest!

title: Customer Success Specialist
description:
Do you find joy in building meaningful client relationships, supporting their success, and being a trusted guide as they reach their goals? If you’re someone who thrives on connection and collaboration, we’d be delighted to welcome you to our team!



About Us:



Kalicube is a premium Digital Branding Consultancy for entrepreneurs in the AI era. Leveraging 25 billion data points, Kalicube gives entrepreneurs unprecedented control over how they're represented to decision-makers online through visible, influential personal brands that open doors rather than close them. Kalicube is the powerhouse of Knowledge Panel and Brand SERP services.



Job Summary:



At Kalicube, our clients’ success is at the heart of everything we do. As a Customer Success Specialist, you’ll be their trusted advocate, helping them achieve their Brand SERP and Knowledge Panel goals. This role is all about building lasting relationships, providing proactive support, and guiding clients so they gain the full value of Kalicube’s services and the Kalicube Pro SaaS platform.



Your Key Responsibilities:



Be the primary point of contact for a portfolio of Kalicube clients, fostering trust and strong relationships.

Lead onboarding for new clients, ensuring they feel confident and supported from day one.

Proactively connect with clients to understand their goals and help them get the most out of Kalicube’s services and software.

Manage essential account setup and maintenance tasks, such as accurately classifying page types in the Kalicube Pro platform.

Create and adapt client-specific playbooks (using company templates) to provide clear, tailored roadmaps.

Respond promptly and helpfully to client questions via
, chat, and video calls.

Share best practices on Brand SERPs and Knowledge Panels using Kalicube’s proven methodology.

Monitor client health and platform usage to identify and address potential issues early.

Collect and share client feedback to support continuous improvement of our products and services.

Keep accurate, detailed records of client interactions and progress in our CRM.



Skills and Traits:



Excellent written and spoken English with proactive and clear communication.

Strong interpersonal skills with a genuine passion for relationships, empathy, and helping others succeed.

Highly organized with the ability to balance client-facing and internal tasks effectively.

Careful attention to detail, especially in process-driven work like data classification and documentation.

Professional maturity and resilience — able to stay composed and positive in a fast-paced environment.

Logical, objective approach to solving problems and making decisions.

Comfortable learning and working with new software platforms quickly.

Previous experience in customer service, customer success, or account management is a plus, but not required.

Genuine interest in digital marketing, SEO, or online brand management.



What Kalicube Offers:



Work Arrangement: 100% remote, 40 hours a week

Starting Salary: 91USD/week, paid weekly

Salary Review: After 3 months subject for salary increase

Internet Subsidy: Paid monthly, after 3 months

Paid Vacation: 2 weeks of paid vacation after 12 months

SSS, Pag-ibig and PhilHealth: Contributions paid monthly, after 3 months

Bonus: 13th-month bonus, prorated

Career Growth: Opportunities for long-term growth within the company

Work Atmosphere: Courageous, smart, fun, family-friendly, and diverse.



You won’t just join a team—you’ll be part of a supportive family that truly cares about your growth and success. If you’re ready to share your Customer Success expertise with a company that values people as much as client outcomes, we’d be excited to receive your application!

title: Seeking Experts for Feedback:Bilingual Parents, and Sport Enthusiasts (Basketball Book Focus)
description:
Looking for Beta Readers: "The Inspiring Basketball Stories For Kids"



Hello!



We’re a growing educational publishing team at Petite Dreamer, creating "human-crafted," engaging books for children—especially those in multilingual and multicultural families who may find traditional books boring. Right now, we’re looking for thoughtful experts and beta readers to provide detailed feedback on our newest title: "The Inspiring Basketball Stories For Kids: 24 Epic Tales of Grit".



We are especially interested in those with a passion for basketball, any sports and personal or professional experience in coaching, sports education, or children's literature.



???? About the Book:



Beyond the Stats: Unlike typical sports books that focus on dry numbers, this book focuses on "Grit"—the failures, heartbreaks, and the "4 AM" workouts that make a champion.



Epic Tales of Grit: Features 24 stories of basketball G.O.A.T.s, including Kobe Bryant’s "Mamba Mentality," Larry Bird’s early morning repetitions, and Michael Jordan's "Breakfast Club".



Engaging Format: Includes 100+ facts, trivia, "Grit Checks," and interactive quizzes designed to grab the attention of reluctant readers.



Multilingual Support: Written to support bilingual/multilingual households and encourage "Future Legends" at home.



???? We’re looking for someone who:



Has experience writing professional feedback or editorial content for children's books.



Can provide constructive insights that resonate with parents, educators, and young sports fans.



Understands the value of resilience-based non-fiction for kids.



Has experience as a teacher, bilingual parent, or a deep background in the Sport(basketball,Football) niche (coach, player, or super-fan).



? Bonus if you:



Have personal experience teaching or parenting bilingual children.



Have written or edited children’s sports books or educational non-fiction.



Are familiar with the "Mamba Mentality" or the history of SPort, basketball, Football(NFL) legends.



???? What You’ll Get:



A full PDF copy of the book in advance.



An opportunity to join our growing team of collaborators (with potential future projects across stories, facts, trivia books, and more).



How to Apply:

Please send a brief summary of your experience with Sport, basketball and children’s education/literature. Mention if you are a bilingual parent or educator!

title: Video Ads Editor
description:
ActivationAgents.ai is an AI-driven growth platform helping coaches, consultants, and online businesses generate revenue through AI-powered lead re-engagement and conversion systems. We work with fast-growing brands focused on authority, scale, and consistent inbound demand.



We’re hiring a Video Editor to turn ideas, long-form recordings, and raw footage into high-performing short-form video content. This role is for someone who understands that editing isn’t just about making things look good, it’s about driving attention, retention, and action.



This is a part-time role (20 hours/week) for a detail-oriented, fast editor who understands social-first video and knows how to package content for growth.



NOTE: Please do not apply if you do not have prior experience creating or editing video ads, if you are not a professionally trained video editor, or if you are primarily a graphic designer.



Responsibilities:



Edit short-form videos with fast-paced cuts, dynamic pacing, and light animations, inspired by top-performing TikTok and Instagram Reels

Transform long-form content (podcasts, Looms, webinars, founder recordings) into high-impact short-form clips

Add captions, on-screen text, motion elements, b-roll, sound effects, and visual emphasis to maximize retention

Package content with strong hooks, pattern interrupts, and clear visual storytelling

Maintain consistent brand look, feel, and editing style across all videos

Organize footage, versions, and assets to support a scalable content system

Collaborate closely with the content and marketing team to support campaigns, launches, and offers

Iterate on edits based on performance feedback and engagement data



Skills & Experience:



Proven experience editing short-form content for social media

Strong understanding of hooks, pacing, and audience retention

Familiarity with creator-led, coach, or consultant brands

Proficiency in tools like Premiere Pro, Final Cut, CapCut, or similar

Ability to follow brand guidelines while maintaining creative judgment

Fast turnaround times without sacrificing quality

Strong attention to detail and ownership mentality

Comfortable working directly with founders in a fast-paced environment



Please fill out the form to apply:

mbers improve their judgment and accuracy

title: Social Media Coordinator (Remote – Australian Market)
description:
We are seeking a highly innovative, creative, and results-driven Social Media Coordinator to join our team.



This is a full-time, work-from-home position. We aren’t just looking for someone to post pictures; we want a "platform native" who is eager to test new ideas, modify strategies based on data, and help us dominate our niche across all digital touchpoints.



About the Role



As our Social Media Coordinator, you will own the execution of our digital presence. You will be responsible for:



1. Platform Management & Innovation



Full-Stack Execution: Managing daily operations for
, Instagram, TikTok, and Pinterest (YouTube is a major plus).



Creative Testing: Constantly bringing new ideas to the table, willing to test different content formats, and quickly modifying based on what the data shows.



KPI Focused: Planning and posting with a clear eye on performance metrics (growth, engagement, and conversion).



2. Content Planning & Partnerships



Calendar Management: Developing and maintaining a robust content calendar (Stories, Reels, Photos, and Videos).



Influencer Relations: Collaborating with creators and suppliers on high-impact campaigns and managing partnership opportunities.



3. Engagement & "Always-On" Presence



Community Moderation: Responding promptly to customer service chats and enquiries to maintain a premium brand experience.



Flexible Monitoring: Checking platforms and messages every 2–3 hours (outside of standard business hours and sleep) to ensure responsiveness and occasionally post timely Stories.



4. Performance Tracking & Admin



Maintaining accurate records of campaigns and providing detailed performance reports.



Supporting the broader marketing team with general administrative duties.



What We’re Looking For



Proven Experience: Either a background as a Content Creator or previous experience as a Social Media Manager.



Track Record: Minimum 2 years’ experience managing a 100k+ follower business account.



Niche Passion: A strong background or genuine interest in furniture, interiors, or fashion.



Language Skills: Proficiency in Australian English (spelling, tone, and cultural nuances).



Mindset: Highly innovative, proactive, and KPI-driven. You must be comfortable with constant testing and refining of content.



Availability: Ability to work flexibly, including checking messages/posting Stories throughout the day/evening.



Technical: Reliable high-speed internet and proficiency with Microsoft Teams.



What We Offer



Competitive Monthly Remuneration.



The chance to work with a dynamic, high-growth Australian brand.



An environment that values creativity, initiative, and the "fail fast, learn faster" approach to innovation.



How to Apply



If you are a creative powerhouse who lives and breathes social media, please complete our online application form here: 
/r/ph1DSwNuzi

title: Web Developer & Funnel Designer (Part-Time, Remote)
description:
We are looking for a skilled Web Developer with experience in designing high-converting websites and sales funnels for eCommerce businesses and other industries. This role will start at 5 hours per week, with the potential to scale up to 20 hours per week as we grow.



The ideal candidate has a strong understanding of UX/UI principles, conversion rate optimization (CRO), and the technical expertise to build and optimize websites and funnels that drive results.



Responsibilities:

Develop, design, and optimize websites for eCommerce and other business clients.

Create and improve sales funnels to maximize conversions.

Ensure websites are responsive, fast, and mobile-friendly.

Implement best practices for SEO, performance optimization, and user experience.

Troubleshoot and fix bugs, technical issues, and integration challenges.

Collaborate with marketing and design teams to align development with business goals.

Requirements:

Proficiency in WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, or similar platforms.

Experience building and optimizing sales funnels (ClickFunnels, Funnelish, HighLevel, etc.).

Strong knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and responsive design.

Understanding of conversion rate optimization (CRO) and UX/UI best practices.

Ability to integrate third-party tools, payment gateways, and automation systems.

Basic understanding of SEO and website analytics tools (Google Analytics, Hotjar, etc.).

Portfolio showcasing relevant work.

Nice to Have:

Experience with
 marketing integrations (Klaviyo, ActiveCampaign, etc.).

Knowledge of A/B testing and performance tracking tools.

Familiarity with ad tracking 
 Pixel, Google Tag Manager, etc.).

This is a remote, part-time role that offers flexibility while providing an opportunity to scale up as we grow.



To apply, please send your portfolio, resume, and a brief explanation of your experience in website and funnel design.

title: Corporate Travel Consultant
description:
Corporate Travel Consultant (Remote – Philippines)

Location: Remote – Philippines

Arrangement: Full-time, 40 hours per week



About the Role



We are seeking an experienced Corporate Travel Consultant to support non-client-facing corporate travel operations. This role will focus on corporate booking assistance, queue management, and back-office travel administration, while client-facing consultants remain in-house.



The successful candidate will work closely with the internal team and provide operational support to ensure travel bookings and administrative processes are handled accurately and efficiently.



Key Responsibilities



Corporate Travel Support

- Assist with travel bookings and reservations where required

- Prepare and manage booking records within GDS systems

Prepare accurate corporate travel quotations when requested

Manage and monitor travel booking queues

Process fulfilments, amendments, reissues, and cancellations

Generate and transact from basic operational or booking reports to support the internal team (including uninvoiced, unreceipted fees, and bookings status reports)

Ensure compliance with client travel policies

Maintain booking accuracy and documentation standards



Back-Office Administration



Reconcile booking financials

Manage supplier confirmations and ticketing follow-ups

Support workflow tracking via 
 (or internal systems)

Update CRM systems (if applicable)

Maintain detailed records of transactions and communications

Assist with reporting and operational documentation



Systems & Tools



Work within internal travel and operational systems, including (but not limited to):

Tramada (where applicable)

Amadeus


 (task tracking)

HubSpot CRM



Required Skills & Experience



2+ years of experience in corporate travel or travel administration

Strong quoting and fare construction knowledge

Experience managing booking queues

High attention to detail and accuracy

Experience using travel systems – Amadeus (GDS and mid-office systems preferred)

Familiarity with Tramada is highly desirable

Comfortable working in a non-client-facing support capacity

Strong English writing and communication skills

Ability to work independently in a remote setup

title: Migration Paralegal & Administrative Assistant
description:
We are seeking an experienced and detail-oriented Migration Paralegal & Administrative Assistant to support a busy migration practice. This role is primarily focused on end-to-end case support using Migration Manager, including document collection, drafting support, application preparation, and internal coordination.



The successful candidate must be confident working independently, highly organised, and able to communicate clearly and proactively. Accuracy and critical thinking are essential, as migration work requires careful document review and strong attention to detail.



Key Responsibilities



Migration Casework Support (Primary)



Provide high-quality paralegal support to migration agents/lawyers and administrative leadership.

Manage casework in Migration Manager end-to-end (non-negotiable):

Create/maintain matters, contacts, and workflows

Upload, organise, and label documents and evidence

Maintain file notes, correspondence logs, and task tracking



Draft and/or prepare:



Client correspondence and document requests

Letters, checklists, statements, and supporting documentation packs

Draft submissions/templates as directed

Assist in preparing sponsorship, nomination and visa-related applications and supporting packs with a strong quality control mindset, ensuring accuracy and completeness.

Review client-provided documents critically and flag issues early (missing items, inconsistencies, poor-quality references, unclear evidence).

Ensure all assigned tasks are completed by agreed deadlines and aligned to client critical dates.



Administration & Back-Office Support



Prepare administrative documentation such as cost agreements, invoices, and internal forms.

Support internal coordination across multiple stakeholders (e.g., office manager/lead tea
mber + principal).

Maintain organised digital filing and consistent naming conventions (within Migration Manager and associated storage).

Support process documentation (basic SOPs/checklists) as the practice refines workflows.

Assist in visa expiry dates management.



Light Marketing & Business Social Media Support (Secondary / Fill-in Work) (Note: This is not a marketing specialist role; guidance will be provided.)



Assist with basic social media marketing administration, such as:

Drafting or formatting content (as directed)

Scheduling/organising posts or updates (if required)

Maintaining a simple content list/calendar and compiling assets

ing potential candidates and companies with a focus on meeting skill shortages and linking candidates to these companies – guidance and material to be provided

Assist with blog creation for our website under our guidance

Coordinate with internal support (strategy may be provided) and execute tasks consistently.



Systems & Tools



Migration Manager (required)

Microsoft 365 (Outlook, Word, Excel)

Remote access tools (e.g., Splashtop or equivalent as used by the practice)

Document management/cloud storage as required

Optional tools for documentation: Loom (or similar) for process capture



Skills & Experience



Essential



Proven experience working in an Australian migration environment (migration agency, immigration practice, or closely related). Minimum 2 years of experience.

Strong working knowledge of Migration Manager (must be able to manage cases confidently).

Excellent written and verbal English communication.

High attention to detail with the ability to produce accurate, professional documents.

Strong time management and ability to work with deadlines.

Proactive communicator—able to flag issues early and follow up confidently when input is needed.

Mature and independent worker showing confidence in working proactively in a close team.



Desirable



Prior paralegal experience in migration or administrative law.

Experience preparing employer-sponsored visa documentation (e.g., 482/186 pathways) or similar case types.

Basic marketing coordination exposure (social content admin, light coordination).

Marketing interest.



Key Success Factors (How Performance is Measured)



Accuracy and consistency in Migration Manager case handling

Ability to meet deadlines and manage priorities across multiple matters

Proactive communication and issue escalation (no surprises)

Quality of document preparation and evidence organisation

Reliability, responsiveness, and professionalism in a remote setup

title: Marketing & Communications Manager
description:
Marketing & Communications Manager – Remote (STEAM Education Nonprofit)



Location: Remote

Organization: STEAM Ahead

Estimated Hours: Part-Time (10–20 hours/week)

Timezone: United States; Eastern Time

Compensation: $5.00-$7.00



About STEAM Ahead

STEAM Ahead is a Boston-based nonprofit organization dedicated to expanding access to Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts, and Mathematics (STEAM) education for historically underrepresented youth.



Through hands-on learning programs, leadership initiatives, and workforce development experiences, STEAM Ahead helps students explore STEM careers, develop problem-solving skills, and build confidence in their abilities.

Our organization partners with schools, universities, corporate leaders, and community organizations to create innovative learning experiences that prepare young people for the future.



As our programs continue to grow, we are building a strong marketing and communications function to help amplify our impact and expand awareness of our work.



Overview of the Role:



The Marketing & Communications Manager will lead the execution of STEAM Ahead’s marketing and communications initiatives.



Working closely with the organization’s CMO / Marketing Leader, this role will help implement marketing strategy, manage external communications, oversee digital marketing activities, and coordinate storytelling efforts across the organization.



This position plays a key role in expanding STEAM Ahead’s digital presence, strengthening engagement with partners and supporters, and ensuring consistent communication of the organization’s mission and program impact.



This is a hands-on role that combines strategic coordination with direct execution.



Key Responsibilities:



Marketing Strategy Execution 

- Execute marketing initiatives aligned with the organization’s marketing strategy

- Work closely with the CMO / Marketing Leader to implement campaigns and outreach initiatives

- Develop and manage marketing timelines and campaign plans

- Coordinate marketing activities across programs and organizational initiatives

- External Communications

- Lead the organization’s outward-facing communications, including:

- Monthly newsletters

- Program announcements

- Partnership highlights

- Event promotions

- Student success stories

- Organizational updates

- Ensure messaging is clear, engaging, and aligned with the STEAM Ahead mission.



Content & Storytelling - Develop compelling storytelling that highlights the impact of STEAM Ahead’s programs.



This may include:

- Student spotlights

- Program impact stories

- Partner and sponsor features

- Blog articles and website updates

- Case studies and impact narratives

- Work with designers and content creators to develop engaging multimedia content.





Digital Marketing & Online Presence - Support the growth of STEAM Ahead’s digital visibility by managing and improving:



- Website content and structure

- Search engine optimization (SEO)

- Social media marketing strategy

-
 marketing campaigns

- Digital outreach campaigns





Performance Marketing & Analytics - Track and evaluate marketing performance across digital platforms.



Responsibilities include:

- Monitoring website traffic and performance using Google Analytics

- Tracking engagement and growth across social media platforms

- Managing performance metrics for digital campaigns

- Monitoring
 marketing performance

- Producing monthly marketing performance reports - Insights from these reports will help guide future marketing initiatives.



Marketing Operations & Coordination - Coordinate the day-to-day workflow of the marketing team.



Responsibilities may include:

- Managing marketing calendars and content schedules

- Coordinating with graphic designers, social media managers, and content creators

- Maintaining brand consistency across marketing materials

- Organizing digital marketing assets and documentation



Tools & Skills - Experience with the following tools is preferred:

- Google Analytics

- Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

- Mailchimp, Constant Contact, or similar
 platforms

- Social media management tools (Buffer, Hootsuite, Later, etc.)

- Content management systems (WordPress or similar)

- Canva or basic design tools

- Experience with digital advertising platforms is a plus:

- Meta Ads Manager 
 / Instagram)

- LinkedIn Ads

- Google Ads



Qualifications - Ideal candidates will have:

- 3–6 years of experience in marketing, communications, or digital marketing

- Strong writing and storytelling abilities

- Experience managing newsletters and external communications

- Familiarity with SEO and digital marketing strategies

- Experience analyzing marketing performance and reporting metrics

- Strong organizational and project management skills



Experience working with nonprofits, education organizations, or mission-driven initiatives is a plus.





Additional Qualifications (Preferred but not required)



The following experience is not required but would be highly valuable in this role:



**E-Commerce & Digital Revenue Experience**

- Experience supporting or managing online stores or digital product platforms (Shopify, WooCommerce, Squarespace Commerce, etc.)

- Familiarity with conversion-focused marketing strategies, including landing pages and digital sales funnels

- Experience marketing online merchandise, event tickets, or educational resources

- Understanding of conversion tracking and campaign performance



**CRM & Donor Platform Experience**

- Familiarity with customer relationship management (CRM) systems such as HubSpot, Salesforce, Bloomerang, or similar platforms

- Experience working with nonprofit donor management platforms

- Ability to support donor communications, segmentation, and
 campaigns

- Experience using CRM data to improve audience targeting and engagement strategies





Compensation - Compensation depends on experience and availability.



What We’re Looking For - We are looking for someone who is:

- Strategic but also execution-focused

- Highly organized and detail-oriented

- Creative and comfortable developing new ideas

- Collaborative and able to work across teams

- Self-directed and comfortable working remotely

- A passion for education, youth development, and community impact is highly valued.



How to Apply - To apply, please include:

- A short introduction about yourself

- Links to marketing campaigns, newsletters, or projects you have worked on

- Examples of digital marketing or communications work you have developed



Please Note:

- To help us filter applications, please include the word “IMPACT” in the first line of your message.

- Applications without examples of previous work will not be reviewed.

- Selected candidates may be asked to complete a small paid test task, such as creating a sample social media post or content plan.



Why Work With STEAM Ahead - By joining STEAM Ahead, you will have the opportunity to:

- Support programs that expand educational opportunity for young people

- Help amplify student stories and program impact

- Collaborate with a mission-driven team

- Build a strong portfolio of meaningful nonprofit work

title: Internal Accountant
description:
This position has the main goal to create and follow up the organization's finances and provide accurate information to managers so they can make decisions. 



Gathering and auditing monthly invoices from different suppliers. 

Keeping an exact record of all the company expenses.  

Handles accounting tasks for the company. 

Prepare profit and loss statements and other financial reports monthly. 

Monitor weekly costs, expenses and profit to assist Admin Manager and CEO/COO have an overview of the company’s finances.

Analyze trends, costs, revenues and identify potential financial ratios that can be implemented inside the company.

Recommend financial actions by analyzing accounting options

Assist the department in compiling monthly reports for audits.

Assist the Admin. Manager with the month-end and year-end close process.

Assist the the department with weekly/monthly reports that the CEO/COO needs.

Review daily suppliers’ invoices such as:

Making sure that the prices per product are correct.

Correct discounts are declared

Assures that there are no duplications in the invoices.

The suppliers’ total dues for payment of CEO are accurate.

Ensures that all payables are accurate and double checked.

Develop accounting policies to strength internal controls



Accounting tasks are handled accurately and efficiently.

The financial statements are delivered the 1st week of the month. 

Implement and maintain the accounting software system

All invoices are gathered on a monthly basis. 

Admin manager is able to work on other tasks for the department.

Organized documents in the digital storage (Gdrive)

The CEO/COO can make decisions based on accurate information.

Accounting information is booked on time. 

All payables are handled properly,timely and accurately.

title: MS SQL SERVER REPORTING ANALYST (POWER BI) - leave and medical included
description:
We are looking for someone with strong SQL Server experience who is comfortable working with queries, joins, views and structured data models in MS SQL Server.



Power BI is used as the reporting layer and you will need excellent skills with advanced Power BI.



Much of the work involves working directly with SQL Server data structures and migrating existing reports to a normalised data model.



A significant portion of this role involves writing and working with SQL queries in SQL Server Management Studio (SSMS). 



The role is focused on execution, moving through a backlog of report migrations, resolving issues and closing tasks efficiently.



This is a full-time role.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

- Work directly with SQL Server data sources that underpin business reporting

- Write and modify SQL queries, joins and views used by reporting

- Update and refactor existing Power BI reports

- Ensure reports are accurate and efficient with minimal impact on server resources

- Progress through assigned tasks and close them out



WHAT YOU’LL NEED

- Strong MS SQL Server skills (queries, joins, views)

- Experience working with SQL Server Management Studio (SSMS)

- Strong experience building reports in Power BI

- Ability to work independently and consistently *close tasks*

- Strong attention to detail

- Clear communication and handover skills

- Consistent follow-through



*** Include a link to your CV ***

*** This is a full time role ***

title: VA Retail E-Commerce Manager
description:
Australian Client | Full-Time | Remote



About the Role



We are looking for a creative, organised, and proactive Retail eCommerce Manager to support day-to-day operations of our retail website, supporting customer service, coordinating with vendors and internal teams, and assisting the Company Director with key projects. This role requires strong organisational skills, proven staff management experience, and the ability to handle multiple responsibilities in a fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities:



Manage the backend of our retail website, including new customer setups, quotes, and reporting.

Request custom quotes from vendors when required.

Process orders from the retail website and manually load them into vendor portals.

Organise design briefs for the graphic design team and upload them into the system for client presentation.

Monitor the CRM for unanswered customer inquiries from live chat, social media,
s, and assist with phone inquiries as needed.

Conduct price checking and competitor price matching.

Coordinate designers to generate templates for selected customers and upload them to client portals as saved designs.

Assist the accounts team with invoice inquiries when required.

Help with setting up new products on the website.

Support the marketing team with campaign creation and reporting.

Provide general assistance to the Company Director, including meeting scheduling, admin reporting, project management, and liaising with key staff.



About You



Proven staff management experience.

Demonstrated ability to manage a retail website.

High-level customer service skills with excellent phone and written communication.

Highly organised and able to work under pressure.

Proactive and solution-focused.

Able to work effectively in a team environment as well as independently.

Strong project management and admin reporting skills.



Apply Now!

title: Graphic Designer
description:
Overview:

We’re looking for a creative, results-driven freelance graphic designer who specializes in social media ad creatives — especially for Meta 
 & Instagram). If you have experience designing high-converting static images, carousels, and GIFs, this is a great opportunity to work on performance-driven projects with room to grow.



This will start as a project-based gig, but the right fit could grow into a part-time or full-time role as our creative needs expand.



What You’ll Do:



Design eye-catching, conversion-optimized static ads, carousels, and GIFs for paid social campaigns



Collaborate with our media buying and content team to turn ad briefs into engaging visuals



Produce multiple creative variations for A/B testing (hooks, product highlights, offers, etc.)



Deliver final files in all necessary formats for Meta ad placements (Feed, Story, Reels)



Maintain brand consistency while exploring fresh creative angles and layouts



Implement feedback quickly and contribute new ideas based on ad performance data



You’re a Fit If You Have:



2+ years of experience designing creatives for Meta ads 
/Instagram)



A strong portfolio of ad creatives (static images, carousels, and GIFs required)



Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite, Canva, Figma, or similar tools



An understanding of what drives conversions in social media ads



Fast turnaround and strong communication



Nice-to-Haves:



Experience editing short-form video for Reels or TikToks



Background in direct response or eCommerce



Familiarity with ad testing strategies and data-backed creative decisions



To Apply:

Send us your portfolio (especially ad creatives you’ve designed), and include a brief note on your experience running or designing for Meta/Instagram ads. Let us know your availability and typical turnaround time for projects.

title: Part Time Senior Motion Designer & Editor (Remote)
description:
We’re seeking a Senior Motion Designer & Editor to create high-quality, story-driven motion graphics and video content across digital, social, paid media, and broadcast platforms. This is a part-time role for a detail-oriented, technically strong professional who can lead projects from concept to final delivery.



Key Responsibilities

* Lead the concept, design, and execution of motion graphics and video content

* Edit footage into dynamic, story-driven sequences, integrating rhythm, pacing, and music

* Deliver content across multiple formats and platforms, including broadcast-ready outputs

* Partner with producers to manage the full production lifecycle from raw footage to final delivery

* Ensure all work meets brand, creative, and technical standards

* Collaborate with creative teams and clients, integrating feedback efficiently

* Explore new tools and AI-assisted workflows to improve creative output

* Support creative leadership and contribute positively to studio culture



Must-Have Skills & Experience



Core Tools

* Adobe After Effects – motion graphics, animation, compositing

* Adobe Premiere Pro – video editing, sequencing, finishing

* Adobe Photoshop – image manipulation and asset prep

* Adobe Illustrator – vector artwork, titles, graphic elements



Video & Production Expertise

* End-to-end video production workflows, from raw footage to final output

* Exporting across multiple formats and resolutions

* Audio syncing, pacing, and music-driven editing



Collaboration & Workflow

* Familiarity with project planning and production tools

* Strong feedback integration and digital collaboration skills



AI & Emerging Tools

* Experience using AI-assisted tools for motion design, editing, or workflow efficiency



Nice to Have

* DaVinci Resolve

* 3D motion design workflows



Who Will Thrive in This Role

* You have strong visual storytelling instincts and creative leadership experience

* You are detail-driven, technically strong, and can deliver across multiple platforms

* You adapt quickly, problem-solve effectively, and collaborate well with teams

* You are excited to experiment with new tools and AI workflows to elevate production quality

title: SMM & MM (Social Media and Marketing Manager) for a plumbing company
description:
Social Media and Marketing Manager



Full-time, long-term | Remote | Monday to Friday, 8:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m. Pacific Time



Role Summary

You will own our social media and local online presence so we consistently turn real field work into posts, photos, videos, review content, and local visibility. This is a hands-on execution role. You must be organized, fast, and detail-driven.



What you will work on

Build and run the Social Media System (field content ? submission ? approval ? posting).

Create and publish content: posts, short videos, before-and-after photos, stories, and blog posts.

Manage Yelp profiles: updates, posts, and data scraping.

Manage Google Business Profile: updates and posts.

Manage Local Services Ads.

Engage in online forums and community groups.

Manage social media channels.

Write blog posts for the website; post on Yelp and Google Business Profile.

Strengthen our presence on Bing.

Lead a social media meeting with Customer Service Representatives and technicians to keep the team aligned.

Manage company photo assets.

Manage company video assets.

Manage review platforms.

Manage
 groups.

Manage Nextdoor presence.

Conduct competitor analysis and implement effective systems.



Skills required

Proven experience managing social media for a service business (home services preferred).

Strong English writing (clear, professional, no slang).

Strong attention to detail and file organization.

Can work independently without supervision and hit weekly output targets.

Basic video editing (CapCut or similar) and basic design (Canva).

Comfortable working with spreadsheets and simple performance tracking.



About Us

We operate two residential service companies in West Los Angeles: plumbing and electrical. 10 years in business, sixteen tea
mbers. We run on clear roles, documented processes, and accountability.



How to Apply

No-AI for applications (to filter applicants): Your
, résumé text, tests, and video script must be written by you without AI, translators, or templates. If we detect AI use, your application will be automatically moved to spam.

 subject line: “I want to work as SMM & MM – [Your First Name]”.

Attach a link to your portfolio

Attach a short introduction video summarizing your experience and why you are the best candidate.

title: Operations Execution Manager (Remote) - Plumbing Service Company
description:
Operations Execution Manager (Remote)



We need a strong execution manager to keep daily operations moving, enforce standards, and make sure the team performs and grows. This role is the main link between the owner and day-to-day operations.

This is not an “assistant” role. You will manage workflow, people execution, reporting, follow-ups, and accountability.



What You Will Own

1) Daily Operations Execution

title: AI Video Content Creator - Full-time for US Agency
description:
We are a fast-growing digital marketing agency producing high-performance AI generated short-form video ads for HVAC, Plumbing, and Roofing companies across the United States.



We are looking for a highly talented AI Creative Video Producer who can utilize the newest AI video creation tools (VEO3-style platforms, OpenAI Sora, Google Veo, Runway Gen-3, Kling AI, Pika, Luma Dream Machine, Synthesia, HeyGen, PixVerse or similar) to produce realistic, high-engagement service videos.

This role goes beyond basic editing. We need someone who can research, script, source footage, generate AI visuals, and produce polished marketing videos end-to-end.

You should be comfortable using AI tools to create realistic people, environments, and service scenarios related to HVAC, plumbing, and roofing.



Only applicants who provide complete answers to all 8 screening questions will be considered for this full-time role (9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST).



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Creative Scripting: Draft engaging scripts based on a provided hook and call-to-action (CTA). Structure videos for high engagement and lead generation.

-Advanced Sourcing: Research client websites to find and scrape footage from their
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.

-Asset Collection: Source HVAC equipment photos from our brand folders (Canva or Google Drive) or manufacturer websites.

-Local B-Roll Research: Find relevant city and service-area footage from Google or YouTube.

-Voiceover & Audio Production: Use ElevenLabs for all voiceovers. You must be experienced in voice grooming (phonetic spelling, aliases, or dashes) to ensure zero mispronunciations.

-Technical Accuracy: Ensure correct pronunciation of HVAC terms such as SEER, AFUE, BTUs and specific city or service area names.

-Dynamic Captions: Create word-for-word captions highlighted in Yellow and positioned in safe zones (mid-screen) so they are not covered by social media interface elements.



REQUIREMENTS:

-Strong English writing skills for technical HVAC/Plumbing/Roofing scripting.

-Ability to deliver final video assets in three formats:

9:16 (Vertical)

1:1 (Square)

16:9 (Landscape)



QUESTIONS: 



1.Which AI video tools do you currently use?

(Examples: VEO, Runway, Pika, Kling, HeyGen, Sora-style tools, etc.)





2.Please provide 2–3 examples of videos you personally created using AI tools. Include a short description of your role in creating the video.





3.What is your process for creating a short-form marketing video from start to finish?





4.Have you worked on ads for local service businesses such as HVAC, plumbing, roofing, or construction?





5.How do you ensure AI voiceovers pronounce technical words correctly?

Example terms:SEER, AFUE, BTUs, city names.





6.Which editing software do you use most often?





7.How long does it typically take you to produce one finished 30-second ad video?





8.Write a 10-second hook for an HVAC ad offering a free AC inspection.

title: Senior Product Designer (Medical Devices & Equipment)
description:
We are seeking a meticulous and visionary Product Designer to lead the development of next-generation medical equipment. You will be responsible for the end-to-end design process—from initial ethnographic research in clinical environments to production-ready CAD models. The ideal candidate doesn't just design beautiful products; they design safe, intuitive, and compliant user experiences that meet global regulatory standards.



Key Responsibilities

- User-Centric Design: Conduct contextual inquiries and usability testing with clinicians, patients, and caregivers to identify unmet needs.

- Industrial Design & Engineering: Develop high-fidelity 3D models (SolidWorks/Creo) with a focus on Design for Manufacturability (DFM) and assembly.

- Regulatory Documentation: Generate and maintain the Design History File (DHF), including design inputs, outputs, and verification/validation protocols.

- Risk Management: Lead UFMEA (Use Failure Mode and Effects Analysis) sessions to identify and mitigate potential use errors.

- Prototyping: Build functional prototypes using 3D printing, CNC machining, and soft-tooling to test ergonomic and mechanical hypotheses.

- Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with Quality Assurance (QA) and Regulatory Affairs (RA) to ensure compliance with ISO 13485 and IEC 62366.



Required Skillset & Qualifications

- Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Industrial Design, Mechanical Engineering, or Human Factors Engineering.

- Experience: 5+ years in product design, with at least 3 years specifically in the medical device industry.

- Technical Proficiency: Expert knowledge of 3D CAD (SolidWorks preferred), Adobe Creative Suite, and rendering software (Keyshot).

- Compliance Knowledge: Deep understanding of FDA 21 CFR 820.30 and ISO 14971 risk management standards.

Materials Expertise: Knowledge of biocompatible materials, sterilization processes (Autoclave, EtO), and IP-rated enclosures for clinical disinfection.



Preferred Attributes

- Experience taking a Class II or Class III medical device from concept through to 510(k) or PMA submission.

- A portfolio that demonstrates a "process-first" approach, showing sketches, research data, and failed iterations alongside final products.

- Strong communication skills to translate complex clinical needs into engineering requirements.



Please send you resumes ONLY at

title: Project Engineering Coordinator
description:
We are seeking a highly organized and detail-driven Project Engineering Coordinator to support engineering-led projects by ensuring documentation, schedules, systems, and reporting are accurate, complete, and aligned throughout the project lifecycle.



This role plays a mission-critical support function by protecting engineering time, strengthening execution discipline, and ensuring that no documentation, compliance, or administrative detail is missed. Acting as a structured and technically fluent extension of the Project Engineer, the Project Engineering Coordinator ensures projects are set up correctly from day one and supported through close-out and billing.



This position is ideal for someone who thrives in structured environments, enjoys learning technical concepts, and takes pride in building systems that help engineering and field teams perform at their best.



Key Outcomes of the Role

Success in this role looks like:

Complete, current, and audit-ready project files

Clear alignment between contract requirements, specifications, and reporting

Accurate and up-to-date schedules and dashboards

Engineers focused on decision-making and execution—not administrative tasks

No surprises during billing, close-out, or project reviews



Core Responsibilities

Project Setup & Contract Alignment

Review project contracts, specifications, and scope documents to understand documentation, reporting, and compliance requirements.

Assist in translating contract requirements into clear project checklists, workflows, and reporting structures.

Ensure project folders and systems are properly set up at project initiation to support compliance and traceability.

Maintain standardized and organized documentation structures across active projects.

Project Lifecycle Administration & Coordination

Ensure required documentation and information are complete at every stage of the project lifecycle, from award through close-out.



Maintain and update the project management platform, ensuring accurate tracking of:

Project setup

Key milestones

Ongoing progress

Close-out and billing readiness

Proactively identify missing documentation, overdue inputs, or inconsistencies and escalate as needed.



Documentation, Reporting & Data Management

Compile, organize, and quality-check essential project data, including:

Surveys

Drill logs

Daily and blast reports

Photos and videos

Monitoring and compliance records

Coordinate with field personnel to ensure timely submission of required documentation.

Upload and maintain records across document management and reporting systems, ensuring consistency and accuracy.

Prepare internal and client-facing reports that support project reviews, compliance, and billing.



Technical & Systems Support

Develop a working familiarity with drilling, blasting, or engineering workflows, tools, and terminology.

Assist with data preparation and system inputs related to scheduling, reporting, and technical platforms.

Identify opportunities to improve documentation flow, reduce duplication, and streamline administrative processes.

Continuous Improvement & Cross-Functional Support

Collaborate with engineering, operations, and leadership to improve project administration processes.

Support the documentation of standard operating procedures (SOPs).

Assist with continuous improvement initiatives related to safety, quality, and operational execution.



Qualifications

5+ years of experience in a project engineering, project coordination, or project management support role.

Prior experience supporting construction, engineering, mining, or industrial projects is strongly preferred.

Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Construction Management, Business, or a related field (or equivalent experience).

Strong proficiency in:

Microsoft Excel, Outlook, and PowerPoint

Cloud-based document management systems

Project management platforms (e.g., 
, Asana, Smartsheet)



Critical Skills & Attributes

Exceptional organizational skills and attention to detail

Strong written and verbal communication abilities

Ability to understand technical concepts and translate them into structured documentation

Proactive problem-solver who identifies issues early

Comfortable working independently in a remote environment

Strong ownership, follow-through, and accountability

Tech-savvy and eager to learn new tools and systems

Professional, reliable, and responsive across time zones



Requirements

Updated Resume/CV | US hours

Reliable internet connection and personal computer 

Backup power solution (UPS or battery backup) to ensure work continuity



Benefits

Competitive salary (commensurate with experience)

Full remote work setup

Long-term career growth opportunities

Supportive, structured, and execution-focused work environment

HMO for you and your dependents

title: Senior Accountant
description:
We are seeking a highly experienced Senior / Manager Accounting Lead to take full ownership of the accounting function for a growing organization in the technology / SaaS industry. This role will serve as the primary accounting point of contact, responsible for ensuring accurate GAAP-compliant reporting, improving close processes, and supporting system improvements including NetSuite implementation readiness. The ideal candidate has strong technical accounting expertise, hands-on leadership in managing end-to-end accounting operations, and the ability to operate independently while collaborating with leadership teams.



Job Responsibilities:

Full End-to-End Accounting Ownership

Manage general ledger activities and maintain accurate financial records.

Lead month-end, quarter-end, and year-end close processes.

Handle revenue recognition under ASC 606, preferably within SaaS/software environments.

Manage accruals, prepaids, deferred revenue, and other accounting adjustments.

Oversee fixed assets accounting and capitalization where applicable.

Record payroll journal entries and perform reconciliations.

Supervise AP/AR processes and cash management activities.

Prepare financial statements including Balance Sheet, Income Statement, and Cash Flow.



Operational & Ad-Hoc Accounting Support

Support insurance renewal applications and regulatory documentation.

Assist with government surveys and reporting requirements.

Coordinate miscellaneous tax compliance and regulatory filings.

Provide audit support and maintain proper documentation.

Assist with vendor onboarding and banking documentation requests.

Prepare reports for leadership, investors, or board members when needed.



Process Improvement & Internal Controls

Develop and document accounting policies and procedures.

Implement document retention and financial record management protocols.

Improve month-end close checklists and timelines.

Standardize reconciliation processes and supporting schedules.

Strengthen internal controls and financial oversight.

Identify opportunities for automation and workflow improvements.



NetSuite Implementation Support

Provide accounting guidance for chart of accounts and revenue recognition logic.

Assist with data migration validation and parallel close processes.

Ensure accurate accounting configuration within NetSuite.

Coordinate with implementation partners and internal stakeholders.



Quality Assurance & Escalation

Maintain full reconciliation for all balance sheet accounts.

Conduct internal review of financials before finalization.

Escalate complex GAAP matters to senior finance leadership when necessary.



Work Expectations

Maintain full-time availability (40+ hours per week).

Be responsive to leadership and capable of working independently.

Provide support during critical deadlines, including occasional weekend work.



Qualifications:

5–7+ years of progressive accounting experience.

Strong knowledge of US GAAP and accounting standards.

Experience in the technology, SaaS, or software industry preferred.

Proven experience with ASC 606 revenue recognition.

NetSuite experience is highly preferred.

Strong reconciliation skills and attention to detail.

Ability to work independently as an individual contributor.

CPA designation preferred but not required.



Requirements:

Updated Resume/CV.

Reliable internet connection and personal computer.

Ability to work in a dynamic, fast-paced environment.

UPS or battery backup to ensure work continuity during power interruptions.



Benefits:

Competitive salary with performance-based incentives.

Remote work 

Opportunity to work with high-performing global teams.

Career growth and exposure to advanced financial systems.

HMO coverage for the employee and immediate family members.

 platforms, funnel tools (Kartra), and Google Workspace

Be the person in the room who's already used the thing everyone else just heard about

title: Data / GIS Specialist – Build NJ Solar Homeowner Dataset (Satellite + Automation)
description:
**Only applications submitted with audio or video résumé will be considered **



Please answer the following questions in your submittal.



1. What technical approach you would use to identify homes with solar installed.

2. Any tools or software you would use (Python, GIS, APIs, etc.).

3. Your estimated timeline to produce 10,000 addresses.



Job Overview

We are a U.S.-based solar company looking for a data-savvy researcher or developer who can build a targeted dataset of residential properties in New Jersey that have rooftop solar installed.



This project will require using satellite imagery, mapping tools, automation, and/or existing datasets to identify properties with solar panels and compile a clean, verified address list.



We are specifically looking for someone who understands how to combine imagery analysis, parcel data, and automation to generate large datasets efficiently.



?



Project Goal



Create a dataset of 10,000–50,000+ residential properties in New Jersey that have rooftop solar systems.



The final dataset should include:



• Property Address

• City

• State

• ZIP Code

• Phone

• Latitude / Longitude (if available)

• Confirmation method (imagery detection, permit data, etc.)



Bonus data (if available):



• Homeowner name

• Year solar was installed

• Property characteristics



?



Preferred Technical Approach



You may use any combination of the following methods:



• Satellite imagery analysis (Google Maps, Bing, Mapbox, etc.)

• AI / computer vision models to detect rooftop solar panels

• GIS tools (QGIS, ArcGIS, etc.)

• Parcel boundary datasets to convert coordinates into addresses

• Automation or scripting (Python preferred)

• Public solar permit or incentive datasets

• Property data providers



We are not looking for purely manual research unless it is combined with automation or structured grid-based mapping workflows.



?



Expected Workflow (Example)



Typical workflows may include:

 1. Identify rooftops with solar panels using satellite imagery or AI detection.

 2. Extract coordinates of those properties.

 3. Match coordinates with parcel boundary datasets to retrieve addresses.

 4. Compile results into a structured spreadsheet.



?



Required Skills



• Experience with data scraping or extraction

• Familiarity with satellite imagery or mapping platforms

• Ability to work with large datasets

• Strong problem-solving skills



?



Strongly Preferred



• Python scripting

• GIS tools (QGIS / ArcGIS)

• Experience with mapping APIs (Google Maps API, Mapbox, etc.)

• Computer vision / image detection

• Real estate or parcel datasets



?



Deliverables



A clean spreadsheet or database containing verified NJ properties with solar panels.

title: Product Designer - Hard & Soft Goods
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

We are seeking a talented and experienced Product Designer to join our design team. This role will focus on developing both hard goods (kitchenware, home décor, tableware, storage solutions) and soft goods (textiles, bedding, table linens, home accessories) for our seasonal product lines. The ideal candidate is proficient in Adobe Creative Suite, has strong textile and print design skills, and understands the product development process from concept through production.

 

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Design & Development:

• Create original designs for hard and soft goods across multiple home product categories

• Develop patterns, prints, and textile designs using Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop

• Design seasonal collections that align with market trends and brand direction

• Produce technical sketches, renderings, and detailed specifications for manufacturing

• Create colorways and maintain brand color standards across product lines

• Develop presentation boards and line sheets using Adobe InDesign

Product Development & Production:

• Manage products from initial concept through final production

• Create comprehensive technical specification packages including materials, construction details, and finishes

• Collaborate with overseas vendors and factories to ensure design integrity

• Review and approve prototypes, samples, and pre-production units

• Provide feedback and revisions to manufacturing partners

• Support quality control processes and address production issues

• Assist with cost analysis and value engineering when needed

Collaboration & Communication:

• Work cross-functionally with merchandising, sourcing, and sales teams

• Present design concepts and seasonal line reviews to internal stakeholders

• Research market trends, competitive products, and consumer preferences

• Attend trade shows and markets as needed

• Maintain organized design files, asset libraries, and documentation

 

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

Experience:

• 3-7 years of professional product design experience in hard and soft goods

• Proven track record designing home products, textiles, or related categories

• Experience working with overseas vendors and understanding of manufacturing processes

• Portfolio demonstrating strong design skills across multiple product categories

Technical Skills:

• Expert proficiency in Adobe Illustrator

• Expert proficiency in Adobe Photoshop

• Advanced proficiency in Adobe InDesign

• Strong understanding of textile and print design

• Ability to create camera-ready artwork and production files

• Knowledge of pattern development and repeats

• Technical specification writing experience

Design Capabilities:

• Strong understanding of color theory and trend forecasting

• Excellent visual communication and presentation skills

• Ability to translate concepts into commercially viable products

• Understanding of materials including ceramics, glass, metal, wood, textiles, and finishes

• Knowledge of manufacturing processes for both hard and soft goods

Professional Skills:

• Exceptional attention to detail and organizational abilities

• Strong time management skills with ability to handle multiple projects simultaneously

• Excellent communication and collaboration skills

• Problem-solving mindset with focus on practical solutions

• Adaptable to changing priorities in a fast-paced environment

• Self-motivated with ability to work independently and as part of a team

 

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

• Bachelor's degree in Product Design, Textile Design, Industrial Design, or related field

• Experience in the wholesale/import industry

• Knowledge of product safety standards and compliance requirements

• Proficiency in Adobe After Effects or Premiere

• Experience with CAD software

• Familiarity with retail market and consumer trends

• Trade show and market experience

title: Shopify & Amazon Store Operations Specialist
description:
Baie Botanique is an award-winning natural skincare brand selling internationally through Shopify and Amazon.

We are looking for a highly organised E-commerce Operations Specialist to help manage the day-to-day running of our Shopify stores and Amazon marketplaces.



We are looking for a highly organised E-commerce Operations Specialist to support the day-to-day running of our online stores and help ensure everything operates smoothly.



Salary: 35,000 PHP



This is a long-term role working with a small, experienced remote team.





**IMPORTANT:**

You must be comfortable working **UK hours (8am – 5pm Monday to Friday)**





What a Typical Week in This Role Looks Like



In this role, your week will involve a mix of operational tasks across our Shopify and Amazon stores.

Typical activities include:



• Checking Shopify and Amazon stores to ensure listings, pricing and content are accurate

• Monitoring customer orders and coordinating with fulfilment centres when needed

• Updating product pages, collections and website content using Shopify

• Tracking inventory levels across fulfilment locations

• Supporting improvements to product pages and store layout

• • Responding to occasional customer
s relating to orders or deliveries (customer volume is generally low)

• Helping document operational processes as the business grows



Most tasks are operational and process-driven, with clear systems and support from the team.



1. Store & Marketplace Management



• Ensuring Shopify and Amazon listings are accurate and up to date

• Adding new products and maintaining existing listings

• Updating product pages, collections and site content

• Improving product page clarity and layout

• Troubleshooting issues with listings or pages



2. Orders, Fulfilment & Inventory



• Monitoring orders across Shopify and Amazon

• Communicating with fulfilment centres when needed

• Tracking inventory across locations

• Coordinating stock transfers between UK, EU and US fulfilment centres

• Reviewing fulfilment invoices and resolving discrepancies



3. Customer & Wholesale Support



• Responding to customer
s relating to orders and deliveries

• Resolving order issues or address updates

• Supporting communication with wholesale partners where required

• Assisting with marketplace partner coordination





4. Operational Improvements



• Helping document operational processes

• Supporting improvements to workflows and reporting

• Keeping systems organised as the business grows



General Operational Support



You may occasionally assist with additional operational tasks that support the wider e-commerce team.

It sounds a bit more natural.



Key Qualities We Are Looking For



We are looking for someone who is:

• Highly organised and detail-oriented

• Comfortable working with Shopify and Amazon systems

• Reliable and able to work consistently during UK working hours

• A proactive problem solver who can identify issues and resolve them

• Able to follow processes while also suggesting improvements

• Comfortable working independently while communicating clearly with a remote team

• Interested in a long-term role with a growing international brand



Benefits

• Full-time long-term remote position

• Work directly with an established international skincare brand

• Annual skincare allowance

• UK public holidays off

• Additional 5 days annual leave

• Stable working hours (UK time: 8am–5pm Monday–Friday)

• Opportunity to grow with the company as our e-commerce operations expand



Application Instructions

Please include the following in your application:

• Your CV (PDF preferred)

• A short introduction describing your experience with Shopify and Amazon

• 2 examples of Shopify stores or pages you have worked on (product pages, landing pages or store improvements)



At the start of your application message, please include the word:

BOTANICAL

This helps us confirm that you have read the full job description.



Shortlisted candidates will be invited to record a 2–3 minute Loom video introducing themselves and discussing their Shopify experience.

title: We're Hiring: Bookkeeper (Real Estate)
description:
Do you have a sharp eye for detail and a passion for keeping numbers balanced? We’re looking for a Bookkeeper who thrives in a fast-paced, growth-driven environment and wants to be a part of a team that’s transforming real estate through innovation. 



This is your chance to join a goal-oriented and supportive team where accuracy, organization, and accountability make all the difference.  



If you’re looking for perks and other payoffs: 



1. Healthcare Package 

2. Annual Performance-Based Pay Increase 

3. Flexible Paid Leave – we trust you to balance focus and rest 



And you have what it takes to be successful: 



1. Strong organizational, verbal and written communication skills (Your “clients” include both Skymount and out stakeholders) 

2. Solid experience in bookkeeping or accounting, preferably with general real estate bookkeeping exposure 

3. QuickBooks Certification (required) and strong working knowledge of QuickBooks, Excel, and accounting systems 

4. Familiarity with classes and projects in QuickBooks (huge plus) 

5. Self-discipline, excellent time management, and resilience under deadlines 

6. A strong problem-solving-mindset, because you won’t just enter numbers, you’ll help identify financial issues, propose solutions, and work alongside leadership to keep projects on track 

7. Ability to work at least 6 hours per day on the night shift. 

8. Confidence in working independently while communicating clearly and collaborating with the team when needed. 



Then you can easily ace these duties and responsibilities:  



1. Recording daily financial transactions with accuracy 

2. Maintaining and reconciling accounts, ledgers, and bank statements 

3. Preparing invoices, track payments, and manage accounts payable/receivable 

4. Generating financial reports to support decision-making 

5. Collaborating with the team to ensure compliance and smooth operations 

6. Keeping clean, well-organized financial records 

7. Supporting audits and tax preparation when needed 



But wait, there’s more! (Not something you have to ace, to be honest) 



>Desktop/Laptop (i5 or Ryzen 5+, 8GB RAM minimum) 

>Dual monitors for multitasking 

>Windows 10 or newer 

>Stable internet connection (75+MBPS + backup connection) 

>Noise cancelling headset 

>Quiet, dedicated home office 



If you think you’re the one we’re describing here, then don’t just stare at your screen and grab this opportunity to be one of us! 



TO APPLY: 



Respond to this post 



Use Vocaroo to answer the following questions. Attach the link of your recording (NOT MORE THAN 5 MINS.) to your response or
. 



1. Imagine a client’s account doesn’t reconcile at the end of the month. Walk us through how you would approach fixing it. 

2. If you notice a financial or inconsistency issue that could impact leadership decisions, how do you communicate it? 

3. Do you prefer working independently or collaborating closely with a team? Why? 



Send us a copy of your latest resume for our reference. 



WE’RE LOOKING FORWARD TO HEARING FROM YOU! 



-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 

WHO IS SKYMOUNT? I’ll give you a better one, WHY SKYMOUNT? 

 

At Skymount, our culture is more than buzzwords—it's grounded in deeply rooted values that shape every decision we make and every relationship we build. We believe in People First, always putting empathy, humility, and humanity above ego. Whether it's a teammate, a client, or a seller, we treat everyone with dignity and lead them with kindness. We live by a Growth Mindset, both our business planning and our daily showing up— challenging ourselves to learn, evolve, and become better versions of ourselves, both as individuals and as professionals. Radical Transparency is part of our DNA; we believe in open and honest communication to build trust, even when the discussions are difficult. And on the hard days (because they inevitably do exist), we dig in and tap into our Grit—refusing to give up, regardless of the obstacle in our way. These aren’t platitudes on a wall; these are the standard we hold ourselves to and the energy we bring to all we do. We don’t just work at Skymount—we live out our values together.

title: Revenue Manager
description:
Revenue Manager – Short-Term Rental Portfolio

Full-Time | Remote | Structured Growth Role



We are building a performance-driven revenue management program under HostOp, serving multi-unit short-term rental operators (20–100+ listings across multiple markets).



We are hiring a highly analytical Revenue Manager to oversee pricing execution, reporting, and performance tracking across multiple portfolios.



This is a data-driven role. Not a general VA position.



***************



Core Responsibilities



* Execute dynamic pricing adjustments inside PriceLabs

* Monitor booking pace, occupancy, ADR, and RevPAR trends

* Analyze underperforming listings and adjust strategy

* Segment portfolios by market and optimize independently

* Pull and reconcile monthly revenue reports from Hostaway

* Maintain structured dashboards (Notion + reporting systems)

* Prepare monthly billing calculations (2.5% revenue model)

* Provide structured Slack performance updates to clients

* Identify risks and opportunities proactively



***************



Required Experience



* 2+ years working in STR revenue management

* Strong experience using PriceLabs (required)

* Experience using Hostaway or similar PMS (required)

* Strong understanding of ADR, Occupancy, RevPAR

* Advanced Excel / Google Sheets skills

* Strong written English communication

* Comfortable working with structured systems



Bonus:

* OTA background (Airbnb / 
)

* Multi-market portfolio experience



***************



Work Structure



* Full-time remote

* Slack-based communication

* Structured weekly cadence

* No reactive daily firefighting

* Performance-based growth path



***************



Compensation



Month 1: $1,200 USD Monthly (structured trial)

After 90 days: $1,500 USD Monthly upon strong execution and independent portfolio ownership



Clear path to managing multiple portfolios independently.



***************



To Apply



Please answer:

1. How many STR listings have you managed pricing for?

2. What pricing tools have you used? (PriceLabs required)

Applications without detailed answers will not be reviewed.
