title: Senior E-commerce Bookkeeper (Xero · AU Businesses)
description:
**********NOTE: Only applicants who followed instructions will be considered. We are hiring immediately.************



Location: Remote (Philippines)

Salary: ?60,000 PHP per month

Employment Type: Full-time

Working Hours: 8:00am – 4:00pm Philippine Time (Monday–Friday)



About the Role

We’re looking for a Senior E-commerce Bookkeeper with deep, hands-on Xero experience and proven experience supporting Australian e-commerce businesses.



This is not a general bookkeeping role. You will be responsible for accurate e-commerce financials, management reporting, and cashflow forecasting that give clear visibility over performance and cash position in a fast-moving online business.



Key Responsibilities (E-commerce Focused)



1. End-to-end bookkeeping in Xero for an Australian e-commerce business



2. Reconciliation of:

- Bank accounts & credit cards

- Shopify Payments, Stripe, PayPal, Afterpay and similar gateways



3. Accurate handling of:

- Online sales, refunds & chargebacks

- Platform, merchant & transaction fees

- Advertising spend (Meta, Google, TikTok, etc.)



4. Inventory and COGS tracking, including landed costs



5. Preparation of monthly management reporting:

- Profit & Loss

- Balance Sheet

- Cashflow statements



6. Build and maintain rolling cashflow forecasts



7. Assist with Australian BAS & GST reporting in coordination with external accountants



8. Maintain clean financial data across multiple entities and currencies where required



9. Proactively identify reporting issues, discrepancies, or cashflow risks



Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)

- Extensive hands-on experience with Xero

- Proven experience working with Australian e-commerce businesses



Strong understanding of:

- Shopify accounting workflows

- Payment gateway reconciliations

- Inventory accounting for e-commerce



Demonstrated experience creating:

- Management P&Ls

- Cashflow forecasts



Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills



Excellent written and spoken English



Nice to Have

- Experience with multi-store or multi-brand e-commerce businesses

- Experience supporting fast-growth online brands

- Comfortable working directly with founders or senior management



Mandatory Application Task (Required to Apply)

To apply for this role, you must complete the Excel task below.

Applications without this will not be reviewed.



Excel Task (30–45 minutes)



Create one Excel file with two tabs:



Tab 1 – E-commerce P&L Layout

Design a monthly Profit & Loss layout suitable for an Australian e-commerce business.

Your layout should clearly show:

Revenue (gross sales)

Cost of Goods Sold (including inventory & landed costs)

Gross Profit

Operating Expenses (advertising, platform fees, freight, overheads)

Net Profit



Tab 2 – Cashflow Forecast Layout

Design a rolling 3-month cashflow forecast layout that includes:

Opening cash balance

Cash inflows from sales

Cash outflows (inventory purchases, ad spend, operating costs, GST)

Closing cash balance per month



Notes:

You do not need to include real numbers

Structure, logic, and clarity matter more than formatting

Include simple formulas where appropriate



How to Apply



Please submit:

1. Your CV

2. Your Excel file (2 tabs as outlined above)



Applications missing the Excel file will not be considered.



What We Offer: 

- ?60,000 PHP per month

- Fully remote role | Stable working hours (8:00am – 4:00pm PH time)

- Long-term opportunity with a growing e-commerce business

- High level of trust, autonomy, and ownership

title: YouTube Gaming Video Editor
description:
— WHO WE ARE —…



We are a small group of friends looking to make our mark on the YouTube landscape, with our action-packed and humorous gameplay and challenges.



Check out our channel: 



— WHAT WE‘RE LOOKING FOR —



We’re looking for remote, highly experienced Video Editors who aspire to be the best YouTube editors in the world. Period.



If hired, you will spend the majority of your time editing and animating fast-paced, highly engaging YouTube videos (our style could be compared to Game Theory, MortarMarv, or Finzar).



Our team culture is always supportive and encouraging, but you should also expect to be held to an exceptionally high standard because that’s how we become the best in the world at what we do (If you hate getting lots of revisions/feedback on your work, you won’t fit in here).



Your day-to-day will also involve analyzing previous videos' Viewer Retention Analytics Graphs to uncover opportunities to improve future edits.



— THE IDEAL CANDIDATE —



Here are the main skills and abilities we’re looking for in our applicants:



VIDEO EDITING (Required): Obviously, you must be an exceptionally talented video editor from a technical perspective. However, you must also have the passion, creativity, and sense of humor to be able to turn bland, average footage into highly engaging videos that educate AND entertain viewers.



ANIMATION (Required): You must be capable of creating high-quality 2d overlay, titling, and keyframing animations that visually illustrate the concepts we discuss in our videos.



— YOUR KPIs —



Your performance will be graded using the following KPIs:



1 Good Audience Retention, which we’ll be able to measure and learn from through our YouTube analytics. 



2 The number of revisions the videos you edit require before being finalised (the less, the better)



3 The number of hours it takes you to create a video (the less, the better)



— WHAT'S IN IT FOR YOU —



Here are just some of the areas where you’ll have the opportunity to learn and grow at our channel.



STABLE & SECURE: This is a very stable and secure job. Our most senior editors have been working with us full-time for 3+ years. No more wishy-washy freelance gigs.



LEADERSHIP OPPORTUNITIES: If you prove yourself and we continue with our current growth rate, you will likely be presented with senior opportunities down the track.



LEARN FROM THE BEST IN THE WORLD: With us, you get to learn from people who are constantly striving to be the best in the world. We’re supportive and encouraging of one another, but we also hold each other to very high standards.



CREATIVE FREEDOM: Once you’ve mastered our style, we encourage outside-the-box thinking. We’re always open to experimenting with new techniques and styles, and then we analyze the data to see how viewers react.



FLEXIBLE WORK HOURS: You can work whenever you want within reason; however, we expect you to be available for tea
etings (We are based in California, and tea
etings are usually in the late evening PT).



— TO APPLY —



If you're interested, please submit the following form (No need for a CV or cover letter. It’s not the 1900s anymore :D): 







Please note: All successful job applications will start with a virtual interview and trial project/s to make sure that we’re the right fit for each other.



Thank you for your consideration, and best of luck on your job search!

title: Social Media Manager – Remote (STEAM Education Nonprofit)
description:
Social Media Manager – Remote (STEAM Education Nonprofit)



Location: Remote

Organization: STEAM Ahead

Estimated Hours: Part-Time (10–20 hours/week)

Timezone: United States; Eastern Time

Compensation: $3.00-$5.00



About STEAM Ahead



STEAM Ahead is a Boston-based nonprofit organization dedicated to expanding access to Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts, and Mathematics (STEAM) education for historically underrepresented youth.



We design hands-on educational programs, leadership initiatives, and workforce development experiences that help students explore STEM careers and build confidence in their abilities.

Our team collaborates with schools, universities, and corporate partners to create engaging educational experiences for young learners.



We are seeking a creative and organized Social Media Manager to help expand our online presence and share the stories, achievements and impact of our programs.



What You’ll Work On



The Social Media Manager will help plan, create, and manage STEAM Ahead’s social media presence across multiple platforms. This role focuses on consistent content creation, storytelling, and audience engagement to help grow awareness of our programs and initiatives.



You will work closely with our team to highlight student achievements, promote upcoming events, and showcase the impact of our educational programs.



Key Responsibilities - Responsibilities may include:

- Content Creation

- Design and publish social media posts

- Write captions and short-form content

- Create simple graphics using Canva or similar tools

- Edit photos and short videos for social media

- Content Planning

- Develop and maintain a monthly content calendar

- Schedule posts across multiple platforms

- Coordinate content with program events and announcements



Platform Management - Manage and maintain STEAM Ahead’s presence on platforms such as:

- Instagram

- LinkedIn

-

- YouTube

- TikTok



Community Engagement:

- Respond to comments and messages

- Engage with partner organizations and community pages

- Monitor social media activity and engagement





Performance Tracking:

- Monitor social media analytics

- Track follower growth and engagement

- Provide simple monthly performance reports



Tools & Skills -You should be comfortable using tools such as:

- Canva

- Instagram /
 / LinkedIn

- Social media scheduling tools (Buffer, Later, Hootsuite, etc.)

- Google Drive

- Google Docs / Google Sheets



Bonus skills:

- Short-form video editing

- Photography

- Basic graphic design



Experience managing nonprofit or education-focused social media accounts



What We’re Looking For - We are looking for someone who is:

- Organized and reliable

- Creative and detail-oriented

- Comfortable working independently in a remote environment

- Able to communicate clearly and consistently

- Interested in education, youth development, or nonprofit work



Experience working with nonprofits, educational programs, or youth-focused organizations is a plus.



Expected Workload - Typical responsibilities may include:

- 3–5 posts per week across social platforms

- Monthly content planning

- Basic engagement with followers and partners

- Compensation

- Compensation depends on experience and availability.



How to Apply - To apply, please include:

- A short message introducing yourself

- Links to social media accounts you have managed

- A brief description of your role in managing those accounts



Please Note:

- To help us filter applications, please include the word “STEAM” in the first line of your message.

- Applications without examples of previous work will not be reviewed.

- Selected candidates may be asked to complete a small paid test task, such as creating a sample social media post or content plan.



Why Work With STEAM Ahead - By joining our team, you will have the opportunity to:

- Support programs that expand educational opportunity for young people

- Contribute creative ideas and storytelling

- Help amplify student voices and achievements

- Build a portfolio of meaningful nonprofit work

title: Sales Rep - Account Executive
description:
*Do not reach out to the website - only applications submitted via OnlineJobs will be considered*



West Village Interior (
) is a high-end interior design firm serving offices, retail stores and homeowners in New York City. We specialize in transforming spaces with luxury designs, tailored aesthetics, and expert craftsmanship. Our clientele includes realtors, homebuilders, contractors, and property developers who seek high-quality interior design solutions. We are looking for a high-energy, results-driven Sales Development Representative  to generate leads, build relationships, and close sales with NYC-based clients.



What You’ll Be Doing

1. Make 20-30 outbound calls per day to NYC-area real estate professionals.

2. Follow up with warm leads to book design consultations.

3. Maintain a structured pipeline using CRM tools to track leads, calls, follow-ups, and closed deals.

4. Conduct 30-40 design consultations per month through direct outreach and follow-ups.

5. Build strategic referral partnerships with NYC-based realtors, contractors, and home stagers.

6. Convert leads into 2-4 closed sales per month, with project sizes ranging from $5,000 - $25,000.



What We’re Looking For

1. 3+ years of experience in sales, real estate, home services, or interior design sales.

2. Strong ability to sell high-ticket services to affluent clients.

3. Fluent in English with a neutral or American-accented tone.

4. Ability to build trust with NYC homeowners and handle objections effectively.

5. Self-motivated and results-driven, comfortable with a commission plus salary role.

6. Familiarity with CRM tools, cold-calling software, and lead-tracking systems.

7. Comfortable using
, LinkedIn, and online communities for lead generation.

8. Must be available to work NYC business hours (9amET - 5pmET).



Compensation & Earnings Potential 

This role includes a reasonable base salary for stability while still offering uncapped commissions. Salary of $1k-$1.5k plus commissions of $500-$1.5k per month, averaging $1.7k to $2.5k per month total.



Why Join Us?

- Team is already doing 3+ closes per month with no salespeople.

- Fully remote work with flexible scheduling, selling in a thriving NYC market.

- Unlimited earning potential with no salary caps.

- Support and training provided, including call scripts, sales training, and marketing materials.



To be considered you must submit a voice recording, resume and portfolio if available.

title: Marketing Lead
description:

We are also looking for someone who demonstrates professionalism, accountability, and the ability to work under pressure while maintaining team alignment.

Review and guide the creation of marketing materials such as brochures, flyers, digital signage, and website content

Work closely with designers and content writers to maintain brand consistency and quality

Assess team performance, provide feedback, and ensure accountability across the team

Coordinate marketing initiatives and ensure collaboration among tea
mbers

Ensure marketing deliverables align with company goals and brand standards

Support continuous improvement of marketing processes and team productivity



Qualifications



Proven experience leading or managing a marketing team

Strong leadership, decision-making, and people management skills

Familiarity with marketing materials and strong judgment in graphic and brand presentation

Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple priorities

Strong communication and collaboration skills

Open to feedback and able to adapt quickly

Reliable, proactive, and highly accountable

Work Schedule

TimeTracker will be used during work hours

title: Short-Form Video Editor (TikTok / Reels / YouTube Shorts) – Performance Based
description:
I run a social media clipping agency that creates short-form videos for popular content creators, podcasts, and online personalities.



Right now I am building a community of editors and clippers who are interested in earning supplemental income by editing short-form clips.



You will take long videos or streams and turn them into engaging TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



This is not an immediate full-time position, but rather an opportunity to join our editor network, where work will be offered as new clients come in.



As I continue securing more clients, editors from the community will receive consistent clip opportunities.



Compensation



Editors are paid based on performance.



You will receive payment based on the views generated by your clips.



Example structure:



Payment per 1,000 views



Bonuses for viral clips



Higher rates as you gain experience and consistency



Top editors will receive more work and higher pay rates over time.



What You’ll Be Doing



• Editing short-form videos (TikTok / Reels / Shorts)

• Adding captions and engaging hooks

• Identifying viral 
nts from longer videos

• Posting or sending clips for distribution



Requirements



• Familiar with TikTok / Reels / Shorts style editing

• Basic editing skills (CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, etc.)

• Reliable internet connection

• Interested in earning extra income online



How to Apply



Please include:



Your
 address



Your editing software



A sample clip (if available)



Applicants will be added to our editor community where work opportunities will be posted as new clients are onboarded.

title: Meta Ads Creative Designer (eCommerce / Automotive Products)
description:
We are an Australian eCommerce and marketing consultancy that works with brands in the automotive, motorcycle, 4x4, and trade equipment industries.



We are looking for a Graphic Designer who specialises in Meta 
 & Instagram) ad creatives.



This role is focused on product-based ad creatives for eCommerce, not branding, logos, or UI design.



Your job will be to create clean, product-focused ad creatives that highlight the product clearly and help drive clicks and sales.



Typical products include:



• 4x4 accessories

• automotive performance parts

• welding equipment

• tools and trade products



The ads should be simple, bold, and product-focused.



Examples of ads you will create:

• Problem ? solution ads

• Comparison ads

• Carousel ads





Work will include:

• Following simple creative briefs

Required Skills

Experience designing
 / Instagram ads for eCommerce products is preferred.

Test Task

title: IT Security Analyst
description:
About Cyber Security Resource



Cyber Security Resource is a cybersecurity consulting firm focused on helping healthcare organizations, SaaS companies, and technology providers strengthen their security posture through practical, cost-effective security services. Our work includes vulnerability management, cloud security posture management, risk assessments, compliance alignment (HIPAA, HITRUST), and security program development.



We partner closely with client organizations to provide hands-on security expertise that supports both technical teams and executive leadership.



Position Overview



Cyber Security Resource is seeking an IT Security Analyst to support one of our consulting clients in managing and improving their vulnerability management and cloud security posture management (CSPM) programs.



This role will work closely with engineering, DevOps, and cloud infrastructure teams to monitor security posture, track vulnerabilities, support remediation efforts, and help ensure security best practices are implemented across cloud environments.



The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, technically curious, and comfortable working in a consulting environment where security initiatives evolve with client needs.



Key Responsibilities

Vulnerability Management



Monitor and review vulnerability scan results across infrastructure, applications, and cloud resources



Track vulnerabilities through remediation lifecycle using ticketing systems (e.g., Jira)



Prioritize vulnerabilities based on risk severity and business impact



Coordinate with DevOps and engineering teams to validate remediation efforts



Maintain vulnerability tracking metrics and reporting



Support development of vulnerability management policies and processes



Cloud Security Posture Management



Monitor cloud security posture across AWS environments



Identify cloud misconfigurations and security risks



Track remediation activities related to cloud security findings



Assist with implementation of cloud security best practices



Review IAM policies, network configurations, and logging controls for security alignment



Support monitoring tools used for cloud security posture management



Security Operations Support



Document security findings and remediation progress



Assist with maintaining security documentation and operational procedures



Support security initiatives related to compliance and risk management



Participate in regular security status meetings with internal teams and consulting clients



Contribute to ongoing improvement of security monitoring and governance practices



Required Qualifications



2–5 years of experience in IT security, security operations, or cloud security



Experience working with vulnerability scanning tools (e.g., Tenable, Qualys, Rapid7, etc.)



Familiarity with AWS cloud environments



Basic understanding of cloud security best practices



Experience tracking security issues using ticketing platforms such as Jira



Strong analytical and problem-solving skills



Ability to communicate technical issues clearly to engineering teams



Strong attention to detail and documentation



Preferred Qualifications



Experience with Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM) tools



Familiarity with Infrastructure as Code environments (Terraform or CloudFormation)



Knowledge of security frameworks such as NIST, CIS, HIPAA, or HITRUST



Experience working in healthcare, SaaS, or regulated environments



Security certifications such as Security+, AWS Security Specialty, or similar



What You'll Gain



Experience working in regulated healthcare and SaaS environments



Exposure to enterprise cloud security practices



Opportunity to work alongside experienced cybersecurity consultants



Real-world involvement in improving security posture for growing organizations

title: Social Media Manager For A Fashion Stylist And Influencer
description:
Hi, I’m Queenie, fashion stylist and content creator behind the 
 currently in an exciting phase of rebranding and digital growth. I’m looking for a creative, detail-oriented virtual assistant with strong video editing skills and a passion for fashion and digital media.



This is a great opportunity for someone who’s deeply in tune with online trends, understands what performs across platforms like TikTok, YouTube, and Instagram, and knows how to help a brand grow through compelling, on-brand content.

 

What You'll Do:

• Edit short-form content (Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts) from provided footage

• Edit long-form YouTube videos 

• Maintain and organize a weekly content calendar to ensure consistent output

• Generate content ideas based on trend research and brand direction

• Track performance analytics and support ongoing content strategy refinement

 

Ideal Candidate:

• Proficient in video editing using CapCut, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

• Knowledgeable about current fashion, digital trends, and social media best practices

• Experienced with content planning and organization across multiple platforms

Details:

To apply:

With your application, please include your résumé, a short introduction, samples of your video editing work (especially fashion/ social media focused), and any relevant experience supporting creators or influencers.  Applications without a portfolio will not be considered. 

Please send your applications to 
 with the following subject line:

“Social Media Manager Application – [Your Name] 8642”

title: Digital Ecommerce Coordinator
description:
Employment Type: Full-time

Start: Immediate

Working Hours: Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM AEST

Salary: $260 per week



About the Role

We are looking for a Digital Ecommerce Coordinator to manage the day-to-day operations of a premium footwear ecommerce store.



This role focuses on Shopify site management, product merchandising, promotions, and ecommerce performance reporting. You will work closely with marketing and operations teams to help improve the customer experience and drive online sales.



If you enjoy working with ecommerce platforms, analysing store performance, and optimizing product pages and promotions, this role is a great fit.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Ecommerce Site Management

- Manage and update the Shopify store (product uploads, pricing, images, collections).

- Maintain site organisation including navigation, filters, and landing pages.

- Support seasonal product launches and new product updates.

- Ensure product pages are accurate and aligned with brand standards.



Ecommerce Performance

- Monitor store performance metrics such as revenue, traffic, conversion rate, and AOV.

- Prepare weekly and monthly ecommerce reports.

- Identify opportunities to improve conversion and product performance.



Promotions & Campaign Support

- Coordinate online promotions and product markdowns.

- Update homepage banners and campaign landing pages.

- Support
 marketing campaigns and digital marketing initiatives.



Inventory & Merchandising

- Monitor inventory levels and coordinate with operations to prevent stockouts.

- Identify slow-moving products and support promotional strategies.



Requirements

- 2–4 years ecommerce experience

- Experience managing Shopify stores

- Understanding of ecommerce KPIs (conversion rate, AOV, revenue)

- Experience with
 marketing platforms (Klaviyo, Mailchimp, or similar)

- Strong attention to detail and organisational skills

- Comfortable working with data and ecommerce reports



Bonus Skills (Nice to Have)

- Experience working with fashion or footwear brands

- Basic HTML / CSS knowledge

- Experience with Google Analytics

- Understanding of ecommerce merchandising



What We’re Looking For

- Someone who enjoys working in ecommerce

- Detail-oriented and organised

- Data-driven and commercially minded

- Able to manage multiple tasks and deadlines



To Apply:

- Please share your most updated CV

- Answer the following questions in your application



1. Describe your experience managing an ecommerce site (Shopify preferred). What were your responsibilities (product uploads, merchandising, launches, promotions, reporting)? Share one example where you improved sales or conversion rate.



2. What ecommerce KPIs do you regularly monitor (e.g., revenue, conversion rate, AOV, sell-through, stock turn)? Explain how you’ve used data to inform trading, promotional, or merchandising decisions. Provide a brief example.



3. Describe your experience supporting digital marketing initiatives (EDMs, paid media assets, SEO, homepage banners, landing pages). How do you ensure campaigns align with brand positioning while driving performance?

title: Ecommerce Administrative Assistant (Operations + Notion + Shopify) — Full-Time
description:
We are a category-leading women’s eCommerce brand on a mission to create premium, affordable, and 100% waterproof jewelry that enhances our customers’ everyday lives. We’ve served over 1,000,000 customers worldwide in more than 145 countries!



We’re hiring one or more sharp, proactive Administrative Assistants to support operations and execution across the business.



This is not a “basic VA role.” If you need reminders, struggle with details, or prefer slow-paced work, this role will not be a fit.



We are looking for someone who is:



• fast, organized, and detail-obsessed

• proactive (you spot issues before being asked)

• fluent in Notion (databases + task systems + SOPs)

• fluent in Shopify (orders + products + inventory fields)

• able to work reliably with Dubai time (Gulf Standard Time, UTC+4)



Working Hours (Dubai Time Requirement)



This is a full-time role with consistent daily coverage. To be considered, you must have consistent availability in Dubai time (UTC+4). Required working hours: 8 am – 4 pm Dubai time (UTC+4), Monday–Friday. Please do not apply if you cannot reliably cover these hours.



What You’ll Own (Core Responsibilities)



1) Operations Execution + Coordination



• Maintain internal task systems in Notion (databases, assignees, due dates, SOPs)

• Support daily operations tracking (orders, stock, shipments, urgent issues)

• Create structure: checklists, templates, and systems to keep execution clean



2) Shopify Admin Support



• Process and monitor orders, returns, and exchanges

• Update product listings and key Shopify admin fields accurately

• Maintain operational accuracy across inventory / pricing / product details (basic Shopify fluency is required — this is not optional)



3) Admin & Team Support



• Scheduling, calendar coordination, meeting agendas, notes, follow-ups

• Document management, data entry, reporting, and structured file organization

• Ensure tasks don’t slip through cracks (high ownership required)

• You will be expected to spot problems, propose solutions, and keep execution moving without needing constant direction



Additional Support Areas (As Needed)



This is primarily an operations + admin role. If you have additional skill, you may also support:



• light marketing coordination (uploading, scheduling, simple assists)

• invoice tracking / basic bookkeeping support

• research projects (suppliers, competitor scans, simple analysis)



Requirements (Must-Haves)



• 2+ years of experience as an admin assistant, operations assistant, or eCommerce VA

• Strong Notion fluency (databases, templates, task systems, SOP organization)

• Strong Shopify fluency (orders, products, admin navigation, accuracy)

• Extremely strong attention to detail

• Excellent English communication (written + verbal)

• Able to work full-time and maintain Dubai time coverage



Bonus if you have:



• Richpanel or other helpdesk tools

• eCommerce fulfillment coordination experience

• spreadsheet reporting experience



If you’re a high performer, this role can become a long-term, career-defining growth path inside our company.



Competitive pay based on experience.



How to Apply



Please complete this application carefully (we will not review low-effort submissions):




/to/KJxNMqNS

title: Sales Representative
description:
Join a fast-growing US online home goods retailer and enjoy the learning and opportunities that you have while working with us.



We strive to provide 5-star service & shopping assistance to all of our clients, and all of our team is accountable to fulfill this.



We are looking for a Sales Representative who can assist prospective buyers and close online ecommerce sales.



We're only looking for full-time, long-term, ongoing cooperation.



Work schedules available:

8 AM to 4 PM US EST

4 PM to 12 AM US EST



Your work week will be 5 days per week, with 2 days off per week. Days off will be selected with your manager. We will try to accommodate your preferences for which days you like, based on availability.



This role starts ASAP!!



Job Duties and Responsibilities:

Receive incoming phone calls and live chats from potential customers (prospects) who indicated that they need shopping assistance. This does not include calls and chats from existing customers that need help with their orders (that’s a job for a different department)

Makes follow-up calls, writes follow-up
s, and text messages to potential buyers. We try to follow up 5x with each person that contacted us (unless they indicate that they are no longer interested). We don’t do cold calling. Only reaching out to prospects who interacted with our online store and left their contact information.

After each interaction with a prospect/customer, writes notes & comments in our CRM (Asana)

Communicate efficiently and build rapport with potential customers

Assists prospects in their shopping journey and helps make the purchase decision

Ensures that all prospects’ questions and objections are addressed

Leads every interaction to a close sale, which means an order is placed on our online store

Prepares custom quotes, price matches competitors if necessary, and offers custom discounts. This requires calculating margins & ensuring profitability.

Answering questions about the products we offer, including technical questions. Learns the specifications, features and benefits of our bestsellers. Over time, becomes an expert in the industry.

If not able to answer product-specific questions, conducts research in the materials provided by the supplier, or reaches out to the supplier to get the information

Confirms stock availability and lead times when offering products to prospects

Documents standard procedures and best practices in a written form, so that other tea
mbers can learn from them



Requirements:

At least 2 years of experience in sales on the phone

Experience must include both inbound and outbound sales

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

Experience in Customer Service on the phone is a nice to have

Experience in the e-commerce (online shopping) industry is nice to have

Home improvement, construction, and gas plumbing industry experience is a plus

Outgoing, friendly, and lively

Can-do mindset, with a sense of ownership, pride in your performance, and its impact on the company’s success

Long-term commitment - treat this as your career



What we can offer:

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping costs. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position

Outgoing, friendly, and lively

Can-do mindset, with a sense of ownership, pride in your performance, and its impact on the company’s success

Long-term commitment - treat this as your career



What we can offer:

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping costs. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position

title: Sales & Tech Representative
description:
We’re Hiring!



Are you a skilled salesperson with a background in gas plumbing and/or electrical work? Do you enjoy helping customers find the right solution while using your technical knowledge? Join our growing team and work with a US online home goods retailer that values expertise, professionalism, and customer satisfaction.





Position:

Sales & Tech Representative – Technical Products (Gas & Electrical Focus)

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Schedule: Monday-Friday, 11:00 AM to 7:00 PM EST (40 hours/week)

Salary: Competitive + Performance Bonuses





About the Role:

As a Salesperson, you will assist customers with product selection, provide technical support during the sales process, and close sales with confidence. You’ll work with gas fireplaces, heaters, stoves, and other appliances, so previous hands-on experience or technical knowledge of gas or electrical systems is a MUST.





Job Duties and Responsibilities:

Receive incoming phone calls and live chats from potential customers (prospects) who indicated that they need shopping assistance. This does not include calls and chats from existing customers that need help with their orders (that’s a job for a different department)

Help customers choose the right gas or electric heating appliance for their needs

Makes follow-up calls, writes follow-up
s, and text messages to potential buyers. We try to follow up 5x with each person that contacted us (unless they indicate that they are no longer interested). We don’t do cold calling. Only reaching out to prospects who interacted with our online store and left their contact information.

After each interaction with a prospect/customer, writes notes & comments in our CRM (Asana)

Communicate efficiently and build rapport with potential customers

Assists prospects in their shopping journey and helps make the purchase decision

Ensures that all prospects’ questions and objections are addressed

Leads every interaction to a close sale, which means an order is placed on our online store

Prepares custom quotes, price matches competitors if necessary, and offers custom discounts. This requires calculating margins & ensuring profitability.

Answering questions about the products we offer, including technical questions. Learns the specifications, features and benefits of our bestsellers. Over time, becomes an expert in the industry.

Explain technical specifications and installation requirements in simple terms

If not able to answer product-specific questions, conducts research in the materials provided by the supplier, or reaches out to the supplier to get the information

Confirms stock availability and lead times when offering products to prospects

Documents standard procedures and best practices in a written form, so that other tea
mbers can learn from them





Requirements:

Sales Experience – 2+ years, preferably with B2C or B2B technical products

Gas Plumbing or Electrical Experience – Formal training or work experience (installer, technician, or similar roles preferred)

Excellent English – Both written and spoken

Confident Communicator – Can explain complex concepts to non-technical customers

Tech-Savvy – Comfortable using CRMs,
 platforms, order tools, etc.

Reliable and Proactive – Takes initiative and works independently

Home Office Setup – Stable internet, noise-free environment, backup power is a plus





Preferred but Not Required:

Knowledge of venting, HVAC, or hearth appliances

US product or code familiarity

Experience in the construction or home improvement industry





Why Join Us?

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping cost. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position





How to Apply:

Apply through OnlineJobs.ph with the subject line: "Sales Pro - [Your Name]"

title: Virtual Assistant – Meta Ads Specialist (Lead Generation)
description:
Location: Remote – Philippines

Hours: Full-time, 40 hours per week



About the Role

We are an Australian marketing agency specialising in the childcare sector, and we're looking for a detail-oriented and reliable Virtual Assistant to join our growing team. In this role, you'll be responsible for the technical setup and management of Meta lead generation campaigns across multiple childcare clients — helping centres fill their enrolments through targeted, well-structured
 advertising.

This is a fully remote, full-time position based in the Philippines. You don't need to be an expert — but you do need to have a solid working familiarity with Meta Ads Manager. We provide comprehensive SOPs and training, so if you're a fast learner who follows process well and takes pride in accuracy, you'll thrive here.



What You'll Be Doing



Setting up and launching lead generation campaigns in Meta Ads Manager following our provided SOPs

Building out campaign structures including audiences, placements, budgets, and ad sets

Duplicating, testing, and organising campaigns across multiple client accounts

Monitoring active campaigns and flagging performance issues or anomalies

Making basic optimisation adjustments (budgets, scheduling, audience tweaks) as directed

Maintaining clear naming conventions and account organisation across all client accounts

Communicating updates and progress via our team's project management and communication tools

Following checklists and quality control processes before any campaign goes live





What We're Looking For



Demonstrated familiarity with Meta Ads Manager — you've been in the platform and know your way around

Experience working with lead generation campaigns (even at a basic level) is a strong advantage

Excellent attention to detail — you follow instructions precisely and don't skip steps

Ability to manage tasks across multiple clients without things falling through the cracks

Strong written English communication skills

Reliable internet connection and a quiet, professional working environment

Comfortable working Australian business hours (AEST/AEDT)

Experience working in a virtual assistant or remote role for an Australian or Western client is preferred





What We Provide



Full SOPs and step-by-step training for every task

Ongoing support and clear communication from our team

A stable, long-term full-time role with room to grow

A collaborative and professional remote working environment





How to Apply

Please apply with the following:



A short introduction about yourself and your background

A summary of your experience with Meta Ads Manager (screenshots of campaigns you've worked on are a bonus)

Your expected monthly rate in USD

Confirmation that you are available to work Australian business hours



Applications that do not follow the above instructions will not be considered.
salary: between 3$ - $6 per hours based on exp

title: Senior Paid Media Specialist (Full time - Part Time)
description:
We are looking for a Senior Paid Media Specialist who understands that ads don’t stop at the click.



We’re searching for someone who goes beyond CPCs and CTRs and knows how to optimise campaigns based on pipeline, sales outcomes, and revenue attribution.



This role is for a full-funnel marketer who understands how paid media connects with CRM systems, sales teams, and marketing automation to generate qualified opportunities not just leads.



You’ll be responsible for managing and scaling campaigns across Google, Meta and LinkedIn for a portfolio of growth-focused clients.



If you enjoy diving deep into CRM data, attribution, conversion tracking and lead quality, this role will suit you perfectly.



What You’ll Do



Manage and scale paid campaigns across Google Ads, Meta & LinkedIn for a portfolio of service-based and B2B clients.



Take full ownership of campaign performance from first click through to closed revenue.



You will:



• Manage 8–12 client accounts with budgets ranging from $1k – $40k/month

• Optimise campaigns based on lead quality, pipeline and revenue outcomes

• Connect paid media with CRM systems such as HubSpot, GoHighLevel, Podium and Lana

• Analyse sales pipeline data to improve lead-to-opportunity and opportunity-to-sale conversion rates

• Implement closed-loop attribution to understand true campaign ROI

• Build high-quality Looker Studio reports with insights, commentary and strategic recommendations

• Run structured testing across audiences, creative, offers and landing pages

• Work closely with our strategy and creative teams to improve funnel performance

• Continuously improve CPA, CPL, SQL rate and ROAS



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys digging into the numbers and understanding what actually drives revenue.



What We’re Looking For



This role requires someone who understands performance marketing at a commercial level, not just platform management.



You should have:



• 5+ years hands-on experience running Google Ads and Meta campaigns

• Strong experience in lead generation marketing for service-based businesses

• Experience connecting paid media with CRM platforms (HubSpot, GoHighLevel, Podium, Lana or similar)

• Experience analysing lead quality and sales pipeline data

• Advanced reporting skills using Looker Studio, GA4 and Google Sheets

• Strong understanding of conversion tracking, attribution and GTM

• Experience running B2B campaigns on LinkedIn Ads

• Ability to identify insights and translate them into strategic optimisation opportunities



Most importantly, you should care about revenue outcomes, not just platfor
trics.



What Makes Someone Successful in This Role



The ideal candidate:



• Thinks like a growth marketer, not just a media buyer

• Enjoys analysing CRM data and sales outcomes

• Understands how marketing and sales work together

• Can clearly explain what’s working, what’s not, and what to do next

• Is proactive with ideas and testing



What’s In It For You



• Competitive remuneration

• Flexible 2–3 day per week role

• Work with an award-winning digital agency

• Autonomy to test ideas and influence strategy

• Opportunity to grow into a senior performance or strategy role



Hiring Process



Intro call

Short paid practical exercise

Final interview



This role will suit someone who enjoys working at the intersection of paid media, CRM data and revenue analytics.

title: APS Consulting Recruitment Notice
description:
APS Consulting is a Sydney-based advisory firm providing comprehensive strategic consulting services to clients worldwide. As we continue to expand our global footprint, we are seeking experienced Overseas Consultants with strong expertise in government relations, and a deep understanding of political affairs, economics, law, and public policy.



Scope of Work and Responsibilities  

Consultants in this role primarily support research, policy analysis, and advisory work related to overseas political, regulatory, and governance developments. Typical tasks include:



Conducting background research and policy monitoring



Stakeholder mapping and engagement analysis



Drafting analytical briefs and memos



Supporting scenario planning and risk assessments for client decision-making



Types of Clients and Projects  

Our clients generally include private enterprises, professional institutions, and organizations with cross-border interests that require an informed understanding of overseas political, regulatory, or public-sector environments. Projects are research- and analysis-driven, and may relate to:



Public policy trends



Government processes



Geopolitical risk assessments



Work Structure (approximately 20 hours per week)  

This is a flexible, part-time consultancy arrangement. Work is typically project-based, with weekly hours varying depending on deliverables and timelines. Coordination is conducted remotely, and schedules are discussed in advance to align with both project requirements and consultant availability.



Preferred Backgrounds  

Candidates with prior experience in the following sectors will be given priority consideration:



Government or public administration



Law firms or legal advisory institutions



Media or strategic communications organizations



Think tanks or research institutions



Consulting or public relations firms



Non-governmental or international organizations



Compensation and Benefits  

We offer competitive compensation packages and flexible work arrangements tailored to global professionals.



Application  

For inquiries or application submission, please contact us at:





Or visit our website:

title: WEBSITE CONTENT WRITER – SEO & Google AI Overview Specialist
description:
We are an established digital marketing and web services business looking for a talented and detail-oriented SEO Content Writer to join our growing remote team. Your primary responsibility will be writing high-quality, engaging, and SEO-optimised blog posts and website content for our own business websites as well as our clients' websites across a range of industries.



In addition to website content, you will also be required to write content for Google My Business (GMB) profiles, and there is potential for social media content writing as the role grows.



This role begins as a part-time position at approximately 20 hours per week. For the right candidate who demonstrates a strong, proven, and ethical work performance record, there is a genuine opportunity for this to grow into a full-time position down the track.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:



--> PRIMARY – Website Content Writing

1. Research, write, and publish well-structured blog posts and web page content

2. Build and format content directly on WordPress websites using Elementor page builder

3. Conduct keyword research and strategically incorporate SEO keywords throughout all content

4. Use Google Search and Google's "People Also Ask" / Search Suggest features to identify relevant keywords and commonly searched questions

5. Include a well-crafted FAQ section at the bottom of each post using Google Search Suggest keywords, specifically optimised to target Google AI Overviews and rich snippet results

6. Strategically place at least two Calls to Action (CTAs) within each blog post, including elements such as click-to-call buttons, click-to
 links, and contact form submissions, to drive reader engagement and conversions

7. Follow on-page SEO best practices including proper use of headings (H1, H2, H3), meta descriptions, image alt text, internal linking, and keyword placement

8. Write content that is engaging, easy to read, and tailored to the target audience of each business

9. Deliver content that reads naturally, is fully humanised, and passes AI content checks



--> SECONDARY – Google My Business Content:

1. Write and optimise posts and updates for Google My Business profiles

2. Craft GMB descriptions and updates that are keyword-rich and locally optimised to support local SEO rankings



--> ADDITIONAL (POTENTIAL) – Social Media Content:

1. Write engaging social media captions and posts across platforms such as
 and Instagram

2. Adapt website and GMB content into social-friendly formats where required



REQUIREMENTS:



1. Proven experience writing SEO-focused blog posts and website content (please provide samples or a portfolio)

2. Hands-on experience using Elementor (or a similar WordPress page builder) to publish and format content

3. Solid understanding of on-page SEO principles and best practices

4. Familiarity with using Google Search Suggest and People Also Ask to identify keyword and FAQ opportunities

5. Understanding of how to optimise content for Google AI Overviews and rich snippets

6. Experience writing conversion-focused content including the strategic placement of CTAs such as click-to-call, click-to
, and contact form prompts

7. Experience writing or managing content for Google My Business profiles

8. Excellent written English — clear, engaging, and grammatically accurate

9. Strong attention to detail and ability to follow style/content briefs

10. Ability to humanise AI-assisted content and check it using tools such as Grammarly to ensure it does not read or flag as pure AI-generated content

11. Reliable internet connection and ability to work independently

12. Available on WhatsApp for day-to-day communication

13. Meet agreed deadlines consistently and communicate proactively



NICE TO HAVE (BONUS SKILLS):



1. Experience with SEO tools such as Ahrefs, SEMrush, Ubersuggest, or Google Search Console

2. Social media content writing experience 
, Instagram, etc.)

3. Basic image editing or sourcing skills (e.g. Canva, Unsplash)

4. Experience writing content across multiple industries



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered for this role, please include the following in your application:



1. A brief introduction about yourself and your experience

2. At least 2–3 writing samples or a link to your portfolio (ideally published blog posts)

3. Your experience with Elementor and WordPress

4. Your experience with Google My Business content (if any)

5. Your availability and confirm you are able to commit to approx. 20 hours per week

6. Confirmation that you have WhatsApp and are comfortable using it for communication

7. Your expected monthly rate (in PHP) for part-time hours



Applications without writing samples will not be considered. We look forward to hearing from you!

description:

If hired, you will spend the majority of your time editing and animating fast-paced, highly engaging YouTube videos (our style could be compared to Game Theory, MortarMarv, or Finzar).



Our team culture is always supportive and encouraging, but you should also expect to be held to an exceptionally high standard because that’s how we become the best in the world at what we do (If you hate getting lots of revisions/feedback on your work, you won’t fit in here).



Your day-to-day will also involve analyzing previous videos' Viewer Retention Analytics Graphs to uncover opportunities to improve future edits.



— THE IDEAL CANDIDATE —



Here are the main skills and abilities we’re looking for in our applicants:



VIDEO EDITING (Required): Obviously, you must be an exceptionally talented video editor from a technical perspective. However, you must also have the passion, creativity, and sense of humor to be able to turn bland, average footage into highly engaging videos that educate AND entertain viewers.



ANIMATION (Required): You must be capable of creating high-quality 2d overlay, titling, and keyframing animations that visually illustrate the concepts we discuss in our videos.



— YOUR KPIs —



Your performance will be graded using the following KPIs:



1 Good Audience Retention, which we’ll be able to measure and learn from through our YouTube analytics. 



2 The number of revisions the videos you edit require before being finalised (the less, the better)



3 The number of hours it takes you to create a video (the less, the better)



— WHAT'S IN IT FOR YOU —



Here are just some of the areas where you’ll have the opportunity to learn and grow at our channel.



STABLE & SECURE: This is a very stable and secure job. Our most senior editors have been working with us full-time for 3+ years. No more wishy-washy freelance gigs.



LEADERSHIP OPPORTUNITIES: If you prove yourself and we continue with our current growth rate, you will likely be presented with senior opportunities down the track.



LEARN FROM THE BEST IN THE WORLD: With us, you get to learn from people who are constantly striving to be the best in the world. We’re supportive and encouraging of one another, but we also hold each other to very high standards.



CREATIVE FREEDOM: Once you’ve mastered our style, we encourage outside-the-box thinking. We’re always open to experimenting with new techniques and styles, and then we analyze the data to see how viewers react.



FLEXIBLE WORK HOURS: You can work whenever you want within reason; however, we expect you to be available for tea
etings (We are based in California, and tea
etings are usually in the late evening PT).



— TO APPLY —



If you're interested, please submit the following form (No need for a CV or cover letter. It’s not the 1900s anymore :D): 







Please note: All successful job applications will start with a virtual interview and trial project/s to make sure that we’re the right fit for each other.



Thank you for your consideration, and best of luck on your job search!

title: Youtube Video Editor
description:
Looking for a Reliable, Longterm, Video editor to edit the videos for my Police Body Cam Channel! 



Each Video will include 2–5+ hours of raw footage, which needs to be edited down into a clean and engaging 15–20 minute video. The goal is to keep the footage as raw and authentic as possible while improving pacing and storytelling.



I’m looking for someone who can find the the best 
nts in the video, add clean subtitles , include AI voice narration when needed, and also potentially write a script and create a strong intro with clean motion/stop-motion style graphics to hook the viewer! 

This is the style I’m looking for:





Before hiring, I will ask for a short trial video, so I can see your pacing, subtitles, and intro style.



This role is $20–$30 per video, and there is potential for long-term work as the channel grows since we are just beginning, but are looking to absolutely grow and have long-term people! 



If you’re interested, please include:

• Links to your portfolio or past edits

• What editing software you use

And if you can get the job DONE 

Also include the word “Bodycam” in your application so I know you read everything.

title: Web Designer (No Code / Low Code CMS Specialist) - Project Based Contract
description:
We are looking for a creative and detail oriented Web Designer with at least 3 years of experience designing and building modern websites using no code or low code CMS platforms.



This role is intended for Filipino independent contractors, as hiring and engagement will be managed through the OnlineJobs.ph platform, based on the client’s preference.



The role operates on a flexible schedule, with meetings aligned with Pacific Standard Time (PST) when required.



For the complete job description, responsibilities, and platform details, please review the full document below:







Minimum Qualifications



• At least 3 years of professional web design experience

• Hands on experience building websites using Wix, Squarespace, Shopify, and WordPress with Elementor

• A strong portfolio demonstrating modern, responsive website design

• Solid understanding of UX and UI principles, visual hierarchy, and responsive design

• Experience designing e commerce websites using Shopify or WooCommerce

• Comfortable working with Figma, CMS builders, and light HTML or CSS adjustments

• Strong attention to detail and the ability to follow instructions carefully



Role Overview



This is a project based contract role. Work will be assigned depending on client projects and internal team allocation.



Rate: Starting at $7 per hour, adjustable up to $8 per hour depending on experience and role fit.



Important Application Requirements



To be considered, applicants must submit complete application materials.



Required:



• Completed Web Designer Application Overview document

• Portfolio samples demonstrating relevant CMS and web design experience



The Application Overview is an important part of our evaluation process. Applications that are incomplete, missing the document, or do not demonstrate relevant experience will not move forward.



Apply Here: 



Please make sure that the Web Designer Application Overview is downloaded and fully completed before submitting your application.



Thank you, and we look forward to reviewing your application.

title: GoHighLevel Automation Specialist (Full-Time | Remote)
description:
We’re looking for a GoHighLevel Specialist who can turn automation into a reliable growth system, not just someone who builds basic funnels.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys organizing messy pipelines, building intelligent workflows, and improving conversion systems that actually drive results.



We’re especially interested in someone who embraces AI alongside automation, using modern tools and smart systems to improve efficiency, personalization, and performance.



If you enjoy building scalable CRM systems, optimizing workflows, and solving automation challenges, this role may be a strong fit.



Key Responsibilities

- Build and optimize high-converting funnels (lead generation, sales, booking, memberships)

- Develop advanced workflows for nurturing, follow-ups, onboarding, and reactivation

- Structure and manage CRM pipelines, tags, triggers, and custom fields

- Integrate GoHighLevel with tools such as Zapier, Stripe, Calendly, SMS platforms, and
 providers

- Leverage AI tools to improve automation, personalization, and workflow efficiency

- Monitor funnel and campaign performance and recommend conversion improvements

- Troubleshoot automation issues including tagging logic, triggers, and message delivery

- Document systems clearly so the team can understand and maintain the workflows

- Stay updated with GoHighLevel feature updates, automation trends, and AI-driven marketing tools



This role focuses on building scalable systems that generate consistent results.



Required Qualifications

- 2+ years of hands-on GoHighLevel experience

- Strong experience with workflows, triggers, campaigns, and funnel logic

- Deep understanding of CRM automation strategy and customer journey mapping

- Experience with third-party integrations and API connections

- Comfortable integrating AI tools into marketing automation and system optimization

- Ability to explain system logic, automation flows, and decision-making clearly

- Able to show measurable results from previous builds

- Strong communication and documentation skills



Nice to Have

- Experience building membership sites or online courses inside GHL

- Knowledge of SMS and
 compliance standards

- Experience working with agencies or scaling businesses

- Basic understanding of conversion-focused messaging and funnel psychology

- Experience with AI-driven automation or AI-assisted marketing workflows



Position Details

- Remote position

- Full-time opportunity

- Long-term role with opportunities to build advanced automation systems



How to Apply

To be considered, please include:

- A short summary (3–5 sentences) of a GoHighLevel system you built

- The problem it solved

- One measurable result achieved (conversion rate, revenue impact, efficiency improvement, etc.)



Applications without these details will not be reviewed.

title: Virtual Assistant – Admin & Marketing
description:
Virtual Assistant – Admin & Marketing

Residential Construction Company | Long-Term Role

Company: Will Nelson Constructions Pty Ltd

Location: Jervis Bay, NSW, Australia



About the Company

Will Nelson Constructions is a residential building company based in Jervis Bay, NSW, Australia. We specialise in high-quality residential renovations and construction projects.

As the business continues to grow, we are looking for a reliable, organised, and proactive Virtual Assistant to support both administration and marketing activities within the business.

You will work directly with the company owner and management team, helping streamline operations while assisting with marketing and content that showcases our building projects.

This position will begin as a part-time role 20-30 hours per week hours with the opportunity to grow into full-time employment as the business expands. 

Applicants must be available to work 3–4 hours overlapping with Australian business hours (AEST).



Who We're Looking For

You are someone who enjoys bringing structure and organisation to a growing business.

You are detail-oriented, reliable, and comfortable managing multiple tasks across administration and marketing. You can follow clear processes while also showing initiative when opportunities arise to improve systems or workflows.

You should be proactive, organised, and interested in being part of a growing construction business long term.



Key Responsibilities

Admin & Business Support

• Manage and organise company
 inboxes

• Schedule appointments and maintain calendars

• Perform data entry and maintain organised digital records

• Support general office administration tasks

• Assist with job management systems such as NextMinute

• Support bookkeeping processes including Xero data entry and document management



Marketing & Content

• Design social media posts, stories, reels, brochures, signage, and proposal documents

• Write and schedule captions/posts on Instagram,
 & LinkedIn

• Create highlight reels/montages using project photos

• Maintain consistency with brand voice and image

• Manage social media ads on
 and Instagram 



Project & Systems Support

• Help organise project documentation and records

• Assist with improving internal systems and workflows

• Maintain organised folders for project files, invoices, and documents



Qualifications & Skills Required

• Strong written and spoken English communication skills

• Experience using Microsoft Office or Google Workspace

• Basic Canva design skills

• Experience with social media platforms

• Strong organisational and time-management skills

• Ability to work independently while managing multiple tasks

• High attention to detail



Highly regarded (but not required):

• WordPress experience

• Basic video editing (CapCut or similar)

• Experience with Xero, job management software, or CRM systems

• Experience supporting a construction, trades, or service business



Performance KPIs (First 90 Days)

Area KPI Target

Social Media Schedule 3–5 posts/week across all platforms. 90% brand style compliance.

Design Quality 95?curacy on template use, tone, and formatting by Week 4.

Admin Accuracy 97?curacy in data entry; 24-hr turnaround on simple tasks.

CRM Management 100% of leads logged within 48 hours of contact.

Communication Inbox cleared daily, with follow-ups on all flagged tasks.

Systems Contribution Suggest and implement 2–3 efficiency improvements in the first 60 days.



What We Offer

• Long-term position with a growing Australian construction company

• Part-time role with opportunity to grow into full-time employment

• Flexible working hours

• Paid birthday day off each year

• 13 Month pay

• Direct communication with the business owner

• Opportunity to develop admin, marketing, and content creation skills

• Increased responsibility and income as the company grows



How to Apply

To apply, please send the following:

1. A short 2–3 minute video introducing yourself and explaining why you are interested in this role – Tell me your favourite food also!!

2. A short summary explaining: 

- Which of the listed skills you already have experience with

- Which areas you would require training in

3. As part of your application, include a short Instagram caption promoting a residential renovation project.
salary: $6–$8 USD per hour depending on experien

title: Google Ads Account Manager
description:
We are currently looking for a Google Ads Account Manager who is passionate about digital advertising and performance-driven marketing. If you enjoy analyzing campaign data, optimizing paid ads, and helping brands achieve measurable growth, this role could be a great fit for you.



About the Role



As a Google Ads Account Manager, you will manage and optimize advertising campaigns to deliver strong performance and measurable results. You will work closely with the marketing team to develop strategies, monitor campaign performance, and continuously improve outcomes using data-driven insights.



Key Responsibilities



Manage and optimize Google Ads campaigns across multiple accounts



Monitor campaign performance and track key metrics such as conversions, CPA, and ROI



Identify opportunities to improve campaign performance through testing and optimization



Conduct A/B testing and implement strategic adjustments to increase efficiency



Analyze campaign data and translate insights into actionable improvements



Prepare performance reports and communicate campaign results with the team



Collaborate with internal teams to align campaign strategies with business goals



Requirements



Experience or knowledge in digital marketing, paid advertising, or campaign management



Strong analytical skills and attention to detail



Ability to manage multiple campaigns or accounts effectively



Comfortable working independently in a remote work environment



Good communication and teamwork skills



Experience with digital advertising platforms is a plus



What We Offer



Full-time remote position with a flexible working environment



Opportunity to work on performance-focused marketing campaigns



Supportive and collaborative team culture



Professional development and learning opportunities



Competitive compensation based on experience and skills



If you are passionate about digital advertising and enjoy turning data into impactful marketing strategies, we would love to hear from you.



Please send your CV to: 
 to apply for this position.

title: Long-Term YouTube Lead Generation Assistant (Part-Time VA)
description:
Job Description

•We are a U.S. marketing company that helps brands partner with YouTube creators



•We are looking for a detail-oriented virtual assistant to help identify YouTube creators who could be good fits for brand partnerships



•This is a part-time, long-term position with consistent weekly work. If the relationship goes well, there may be opportunities to expand the role over time



•This role focuses on finding creators and spotting opportunities, not sales or outreach



•We are looking for someone reliable who wants a stable, long-term role with one company, not someone juggling many clients. If you are looking for consistent work and want to grow with a team, we would love to hear from you



Responsibilities:

•Search YouTube for creators in specific niches

•Identify creators that may be good fits for brand partnerships

•Review creator rosters from talent agencies

•Use a Chrome extension to capture creator data

•Add creators to organized Google Sheets

•Flag channels that look like strong opportunities

•Maintain clean and organized lead lists



Tools Used:

•YouTube

•Chrome browser extension

•Google Sheets



Ideal Candidate:

•Strong internet research skills

•Comfortable navigating YouTube

•Very detail-oriented

•Organized and reliable

•English Fluency

•Comfortable using Google Sheets



Preferred Experience:

•Experience working as a virtual assistant

•Experience researching influencers or creators

•Familiarity with YouTube channels and creators



Hours:

•20–30 hours per week

•Flexible schedule



Pay:

•$5–$7 per hour, depending on experience



Application Instructions:

•To confirm you read this job description, please include the word "goose" in the first sentence of your application

•Applications without this will not be considered

•We will also ask shortlisted applicants to complete a test task related to YouTube creator sourcing



Why This Is a Good Role:

•Long-term stable work

•Flexible hours

•Clear tasks and expectations

•Opportunity to grow with the role over time

title: Client Success Manager (Giving Feedback): $1,100 USD START RATE
description:
Start rate: $935 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,100 a month)



Paid every two weeks via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company working with content creators and online brands.



BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours a week

- Flexible schedule: Choose your own hours, as long as you show up for the daily meeting (MANDATORY)

- Stable income: Long-term role with regular, on-time payments

- Supportive team: Collaborative environment without micromanagement

- Growth path: Opportunities to increase responsibilities and earnings

- 100% remote: Work-from-home setup



TASKS



Client Support (maintaining 40-50 total clients):



- Run kickoff calls with new clients using our proven script

- Review client content and give actionable feedback

- Answer client messages within 24 hours

- Host weekly group calls and 1-on-1 coaching sessions

- Help clients overcome content blocks and limiting beliefs



Progress Tracking:



- Update daily/weekly reports

- Track client progress and next steps

- Join daily team check-ins

- Ensure clients follow strategies consistently



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)



- C1+ English (written and spoken) with no accent

- Strong communication skills

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

- Accountability mindset and deadline commitment



IMPORTANT



When recording a Loom video as part of your application:



- Camera must show your FACE & SCREEN

- Treat it as a LIVE interview with the Hiring Manager

- Have a professional background

- Have clear audio

- Wear business-casual attire



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED)



- Content creation and social media experience

- Knowledge of Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

- Regular usage of AI tools (ChatGPT, CapCut)



WHY JOIN US?



- Start rate: $935 a month + performance-based bonuses (TOTAL: $1,100 a month)

Note: More experienced CSMs earn between $1,800 and $2,500 after 6-12 months.

- Performance bonuses: Up to $900+ additional monthly based on:

- Client retention rates

- Task completion metrics

- Quality of feedback

- Team collaboration

- Payments: Twice per month via Wise directly to your bank

- Tools access: We'll cover all the needed tools

- Work-life balance: No graveyard shifts

- Professional growth: Regular feedback and skill development



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with "CSM" as the message title



2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV.

#2: Your years of experience with short-form content.

#3: Your years of experience with client management.

#4: One sentence on why you're a good fit for this role.

#5: Your portfolio.



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



P.S. Young Publisher is the recruitment company. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: CONTENT RESEARCH EXPERT (CRE): $800 a month
description:

- Strong understanding of what makes content go viral

- Knowledge of Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts features

- Strategic thinking and attention to detail

- Reliable internet connection and professional home office setup

- 100% say-do ratio and commitment to deadlines



HOW TO APPLY



ROUND 1: Complete our application form and record a personal introduction:

/to/QRoz4WLV



Note: Put "CRE" + [Your Name & Family Name] in the "Name" field in the form.

Important: Please provide genuine, personal responses (no AI-written answers). We want to get to know YOU!



ROUND 2: Qualified candidates will be invited for an interview.



MORE ABOUT US



We've been in the industry since 2019 and have worked with over 3000 clients. We currently receive around 80-100 new clients per month. We provide an "80% done-for-you content & monetization system" that helps creators go viral and turn views into income using short-form content, AI, and proven strategies.

description:

Young Publisher | 
/



We’re an international digital publishing company hiring from the Philippines for over 5 years.

We have 50+ tea
mbers worldwide and 200+ verified reviews with a 4.9 average rating.

We build long-term partnerships, not short-term gigs.

We don't disappear, we pay on time



We’re looking for an experienced direct response copywriter who can:

- Take full ownership of performance-driven campaigns

- Write
s that get opened, read, and clicked

- Create Ads that stop people from scrolling.

- Craft persuasive copy that drives readers to act.

s and automated sequences
