title: Solar Sales Support and Solar Finance Manager
description:
This position serves as the operational backbone of the sales organization, coordinating between sales representatives, finance partners, project management, and accounting to ensure projects move efficiently from contract to installation and funding.



Key Responsibilities



Sales Intake & Deal Review

    •    Review and process incoming residential solar contracts for completeness and accuracy

    •    Verify customer documentation including contracts, utility bills, site data, and financing information

    •    Ensure deals meet company guidelines before submission to operations and engineering

    •    Maintain accurate CRM records for all incoming projects



Finance Coordination

    •    Submit and manage financing applications with lenders i.e. Lightreach, GoodLeap etc.

    •    Work directly with financing partners to resolve stipulations or approval conditions

    •    Assist sales reps in structuring deals that meet lender guidelines

    •    Monitor approval timelines and communicate status updates to sales leadership



Project Financial Accuracy (True-Up)

    •    Perform project financial true-ups after engineering and installation

    •    Confirm system size, equipment changes, and cost adjustments

    •    Ensure project economics align with approved financing and sales agreements

    •    Work with internal teams to correct discrepancies prior to installation or funding



Final Project Funding

    •    Compile and submit final documentation packages required for lender funding

    •    Coordinate with installation and operations teams to confirm completion milestones

    •    Track funding timelines and ensure projects are funded promptly

    •    Resolve lender or documentation issues that delay payment



Pipeline & Reporting

    •    Monitor the full sales pipeline from contract to funding

    •    Track project status and identify bottlenecks in the process

    •    Provide weekly reports on approvals, installs, and funded projects

    •    Assist leadership with forecasting funded revenue



Qualifications

    •    3+ years experience in residential solar operations, sales support, or project coordination

    •    Strong understanding of solar financing structures (loan, PPA, lease)

    •    Experience working with solar lenders and funding processes

    •    Proficiency with CRM systems and project management software

    •    Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills

    •    Ability to coordinate across sales, operations, and finance teams



Preferred Experience

    •    Experience working with residential solar EPC companies

    •    Knowledge of interconnection, permitting, and installation workflows

    •    Experience managing large volumes of sales submissions



Key Traits for Success

    •    Highly organized and process driven

    •    Strong communication skills with both sales teams and lenders

    •    Ability to identify and solve deal issues before they delay projects

    •    Comfortable working in a fast paced sales environment

title: Photoshop Expert Needed for Realistic T-Shirt Mockups (Design Placement Specialist)
description:
Job Description



We are looking for a Photoshop expert to help create realistic ad creatives for a clothing brand.



The main task is placing t-shirt or hoodie designs onto lifestyle photos and making them look completely natural and realistic.



This role requires strong Photoshop compositing skills. This is NOT basic Photoshop work. If you are very comfortable working with clothing mockups and design placement, this may be a great fit.



This will start as a part-time role with approximately 10–30 creatives per week, with the possibility of more work in the future as we expand to additional stores.



Payment will be task-based, but the expected earnings should be roughly equivalent to $6–$8 per hour depending on speed and experience.



Main Responsibilities



You will receive:



• a lifestyle inspiration image

• a t-shirt design file

• simple instructions



Your job will be to:



• remove the existing design on the shirt

• place our design realistically on the clothing

• match lighting, shadows, and fabric texture

• make the final image look natural and ready for advertising



The final result should look like the design was actually printed on the shirt in the photo.



Required Photoshop Skills



Strong experience with realistic design placement on clothing is required.



You should be comfortable using techniques such as:



• Perspective Warp

• Displacement Maps

• Blend Modes

• Shadow and Lighting adjustments

• Wrinkle and fabric distortion

• Noise / grain matching

• Color grading and color matching



If you have experience creating realistic clothing mockups, that is a big plus.



Small AI Tools in the Workflow



At the beginning of the process, you may sometimes use simple AI tools to help prepare the base image.



Example tasks:



• removing the original design from a shirt

• changing the person wearing the shirt

• slightly modifying the environment/background



These tasks are very simple and easy, and we can teach you how to do them.



However, these AI tools are ONLY used to prepare the image.



???? The final mockup must be created in Photoshop.



Using AI to generate the final result is completely unacceptable. If you plan to generate the final image using AI instead of properly placing the design in Photoshop, please do not apply.



Important



This job is specifically for someone who is skilled at:



realistic t-shirt design placement and clothing mockups in Photoshop.



If you have done similar work before, please include examples in your application.



Test Task



Before hiring, we will provide one small test task.



You will receive:



• one inspiration image

• one design file



Your task will be to place the design onto the shirt realistically.



This helps us evaluate your Photoshop skills before moving forward.



Future Opportunities



We currently need 10–25 creatives per week, but we run multiple online stores.



If the collaboration goes well, there will likely be more work and long-term opportunities in the future.

title: Virtual Assistant – Short-Term Rental Operations (Airbnb/VRBO)
description:
???? About Damian's Hosting Hub



We are a growing vacation rental management company based in Modesto, California. We manage Airbnb and short-term rental properties for property owners — handling everything from guest communication to cleaning coordination to listing optimization.



We're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to help run our day-to-day short-term rental operations. This is NOT a generic VA role — you will learn the vacation rental business inside and out.





???? What You'll Be Doing



GUEST MESSAGING & COMMUNICATION

• Respond to guest inquiries and booking requests quickly (target: under 15 minutes)

• Send pre-arrival messages — check-in instructions, house rules, local recommendations

• Handle mid-stay guest questions, concerns, and requests

• Manage checkout messaging and request guest reviews

• Communicate across Airbnb, VRBO, and direct booking channels

• De-escalate guest issues professionally and know when to escalate to management



LISTING CREATION & OPTIMIZATION

• Create new property listings on Airbnb, VRBO, and other booking platforms

• Write compelling, SEO-optimized listing titles and descriptions

• Upload and organize property photos

• Set and adjust pricing, minimum stays, and availability

• Monitor and respond to guest reviews

• Keep listing details, amenities, and house rules accurate and updated



SERVICE COORDINATION & OPERATIONS

• Schedule and coordinate cleaning crews between guest turnovers

• Coordinate maintenance and repair requests with local vendors

• Track supply inventory and flag when restocking is needed

• Manage the turnover calendar — ensure no gaps between checkout, cleaning, and check-in

• Coordinate with property owners on access, maintenance, and updates



ADMIN & REPORTING

• Maintain organized records of bookings, revenue, and expenses

• Update CRM and property management tools

• Monitor booking calendars across platforms to prevent double-bookings

• Assist with onboarding new properties (photos checklist, amenity inventory, listing setup)

• Generate basic performance reports (occupancy rates, revenue, guest ratings)

• Help manage social media posting and content scheduling





? Requirements



• Previous experience as a VA in short-term rentals, property management, or hospitality (strongly preferred)

• Familiarity with Airbnb, VRBO, or similar booking platforms

• Excellent written English — guest-facing messages must be professional, warm, and error-free

• Strong organizational skills — you'll juggle multiple properties, guests, and service providers at the same time

• Reliable high-speed internet connection and a quiet workspace

• Available to work flexible hours including some weekend coverage for guest messaging

• Proficient with Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Calendar)

• Tech-savvy — comfortable learning new software and tools quickly

• Self-starter who works independently without needing constant supervision

• Must have your own computer with a working webcam and microphone





? Bonus Skills (Not Required But a Big Plus)



• Experience with property management software (Hostaway, Guesty, Hospitable)

• Experience with GoHighLevel CRM

• Familiarity with dynamic pricing tools (PriceLabs, Beyond Pricing, Wheelhouse)

• Canva or basic graphic design skills

• Bilingual (English/Spanish)

• Social media management experience





???? Compensation & Benefits



• $100/week — paid weekly, consistently every week

• 100% remote — work from home

• Stable, long-term position with a growing company

• Direct access to the owner — no corporate layers or red tape

• Opportunity to grow into a senior role as we add more properties

• Full training provided on our specific systems and processes





???? How to Apply



Please include in your application:



1. A brief summary of your relevant experience (especially any short-term rental or hospitality experience)

2. A short paragraph explaining why you'd be a great fit for this role

3. Your availability — what hours can you work? What is your time zone?

4. Links to any Airbnb or VRBO listings you've managed (if applicable)

5. Do you have experience with any property management software? If so, which ones?



We respond to every qualified applicant. If you're the right fit, we'll schedule a quick video interview to get to know you.



We look forward to hearing from you!

The brand focuses on simple ingredients, skin nourishment, and premium skincare.



What We’re Looking For:

We want someone who can create thoughtful social media content, not generic posts. We want to see:



• More Reels and carousels

You should take the time to understand the brand before creating content. Lazy or generic AI content is not what we’re looking for. AI can be used as a tool, but the final content should feel intentional and on-brand.



Responsibilities:

• Plan and schedule social media posts

• Create Reels, carousels, and posts

title: Marketing Manager/Analyst
description:
We are looking for a sharp, analytical, and creatively-minded Quota & Content Performance Manager to take full ownership of our weekly content quota process. This is a high-trust, high-leverage role that sits at the heart of our agency's performance engine.

You will be responsible for building weekly content plans ("quotas") for each creator on our roster, analysing Instagram performance data to determine what is working and what isn't, and producing clear, structured performance reports that our management team uses to have meaningful conversations with creators.

This is not a posting or scheduling role. This is a strategic content operations role — you need to be able to think analytically about performance data AND have the creative intuition to understand why certain content formats resonate with different types of audiences.

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
IMPORTANT: Replies are not monitored here. To apply, please complete this form: 



Rove Miles is building the world’s first universal airline mile. Through our platform, travelers can earn miles on everyday spend and travel bookings to work towards a free annual vacation. We partner with major loyalty programs, airlines, hotels, and merchants to make premium travel more accessible to everyone.



Since our launch two months ago, we’ve been featured in The Wall Street Journal, Forbes, and TechCrunch and have already gained tens of thousands of users.



What You’ll Do:

- Liaise directly with airlines, loyalty programs, hotel partners, and suppliers (including GDS or aggregator systems) to resolve booking issues.

- Manage escalations involving complex itineraries, miles redemption questions, and travel disruptions.

- Collaborate with our product and operations teams by surfacing recurring issues and ideas for improving the user experience.



What We’re Looking For:

(e.g., Expedia, 
, Hopper, Priceline, or direct airline/hotel desk experience).

- Solid understanding of flight and hotel booking workflows—PNRs, fare rules, and common post-booking issues.

- Experience handling multi-channel support 
, chat, phone).

- Empathetic and calm under pressure, especially when dealing with disrupted travel plans.

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

- Comfortable with technology—can pick up new platforms quickly.



PLEASE ONLY APPLY IF YOU HAVE AT LEAST 3 YEARS OF EXPERIENCE DOING CUSTOMER SERVICE FOR AN ONLINE TRAVEL AGENCY.

title: Part-Time Meta Ads Specialist (Lead Generation Focus) – Remote
description:
PART-TIME META ADS SPECIALIST (LEAD GENERATION FOCUS) – REMOTE



We are a growing digital marketing agency looking for an experienced Meta Ads specialist to help manage and optimize several lead-generation advertising accounts.



This role focuses on performance marketing and lead generation, not social media posting or brand awareness campaigns.



Some of the accounts you will work on manage $10,000 – $60,000 per month in Meta ad spend, so experience managing performance campaigns at scale is important.



We are looking for someone who enjoys improving lead generation performance through creative testing, messaging experiments, and campaign optimization.



You will work on a mix of larger national lead generation accounts and smaller local business campaigns.



This is a long-term part-time role for someone who enjoys optimizing campaigns and testing new creative ideas.



TYPES OF ACCOUNTS



You will help manage campaigns for:



• Large lead-generation advertising accounts with monthly ad spend ranging from $10,000 – $60,000

• Local service businesses generating inbound leads

• Local retail businesses focused on driving store visits and inquiries



Campaign objectives may include:



• Lead generation using Meta instant forms

• Local lead campaigns

• Store visit / get directions campaigns

• Testing and optimizing new ad creatives



RESPONSIBILITIES



• Build, manage, and optimize Meta advertising campaigns

• Manage lead generation campaigns using instant forms

• Monitor campaign performance and optimize budgets, targeting, and creatives

• Assist with creative testing (images, short videos, ad copy)

• Ensure leads are properly captured and delivered to our systems

• Provide simple performance reporting



A key part of this role is testing new ad creatives and messaging angles regularly to improve campaign performance.



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE



• Strong experience using Meta Ads Manager

• Experience running lead generation campaigns

• Experience with Meta instant forms

• Experience working with Meta Pixel and Conversion API (CAPI)

• Understanding of CRM integrations or lead delivery workflows

• Ability to analyze campaign performance metrics (CTR, CPL, CPA, etc.)



COMMUNICATION SKILLS



• Strong written and spoken English required

• Must be comfortable communicating with a remote team

• Ability to clearly explain campaign performance and ideas



CREATIVE SKILLS (IMPORTANT)



You do not need to be a professional designer, but you should be comfortable creating or editing simple ad creatives.



Examples include:



• Image ads with text overlays

• Short video ads (12–30 seconds)

• Basic edits using tools such as Canva, CapCut, or similar



NICE TO HAVE



• Experience with Google Ads

• Experience working with agencies

• Experience with local lead generation campaigns

• Experience with Messenger or conversation-based campaigns



HOURS AND COMPENSATION



• Part-time role (approximately 15–20 hours per week)

• Compensation: $1,500 – $2,000 per month depending on experience and skill level

• Fully remote



TO APPLY



Please answer the following questions when applying:



1. What is the largest monthly Meta Ads budget you have personally managed?



2. Describe a lead generation campaign you successfully managed.



3. Do you have experience running Meta lead ads with instant forms?



4. What tools do you use to create ad creatives (images or short videos)?



5. Do you have experience setting up Meta Pixel or Conversion API (CAPI)?



6. In your opinion, what percentage of Meta campaign performance typically comes from creative vs targeting, and why?



To confirm you read this entire job post, please include the word LEADS at the beginning of your application and tell Mary the largest Meta Ads monthly budget you have personally managed.

title: Senior Graphic Designer with Modern Skill with AI Prompting Master Skils and proven experience with Amazon
description:
ABOUT US



Since 2013, Prodigy Media has built more than brands — we've created an Amazon-native empire. With 12 years of proven success and 28+ product lines under our belt, we don't play small. Our mission? Launch culturally resonant, design-led, emotionally sticky products that dominate Amazon and beyond.



Now, we're leveling up — and we want a design assassin who’s mastered AI workflows, commands Midjourney like a wizard, and turns prompts into visual gold.



WHO WE WANT



This is not your average graphic design role. We're looking for a hybrid Creative Director / Prompt Engineer / Graphic Design savant who can:



Think like a marketer. Design like an artist. Prompt like an AI god.



You’ll own the visual storytelling for our brands, using both traditional tools and bleeding-edge AI systems to pump out Amazon-optimized assets that convert.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



Craft Ultra-High-Converting Amazon Ads – static, lifestyle, 
-tier, and scroll-stopping. Own A+ Content Design – full module execution with story arcs that build obsession. Design Labels & Packaging – pixel-perfect, regulatory-ready, and unforgettable on the shelf. Prompt, Edit & Produce AI-Generated Visuals – using tools like Midjourney, DALL•E, Runway, Spline, Veo3, Sora, and others. Run 3D Product Renders – via Blender, KeyShot, or AI-powered 3D tools. Develop Scroll-Hook Videos – using After Effects, Premiere, Runway AI, etc.



Systematize Brand Visuals Across 30+ Products – while keeping it all aligned, emotional, and conversion-focused.



WHO YOU ARE



5+ years in design, at least 2+ years in Amazon/e-commerce brand creative

Fluent in Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, Blender, After Effects

Pro-level Midjourney / AI prompt engineer – this is non-negotiable

Obsessed with Amazon visual psychology, packaging psychology, and design that sells

Able to juggle 10 brands and still hit deadlines

Operate with a Creative Director mindset — not just execution, but strategy

Bonus: Experience creating creative systems, art direction templates, or leading a team



MUST-HAVES

Portfolio with Amazon ads, A+ pages, labels, 3D renders, videos, and AI-gen examples

Real-world use of AI tools integrated into your workflow

Available Mon-Fri 5:00am–2:00pm PST

title: Estimator / Engineer with Onsite Experience
description:
Company Overview

We’re a small group of big thinkers working together like a well-oiled machine.

We much rather work with a few exceptional individuals than a lot of average people.

A little bit our company,

We’re based in Sydney NSW

We started in 2022

We specialise in Remedial Construction which is fixing and improving existing buildings that have problems or need updates.

It includes a wide range of activities to keep buildings safe, strong, and looking good.

1. Waterproofing

2. Concrete repairs

3. Masonry repairs

4. Facade restoration

Job Summary

The Estimating Virtual Assistant plays a crucial support role within our pre-construction team, ensuring efficient and organized estimation processes.

This position is instrumental in managing administrative tasks, organizing project documentation, and supporting the Estimator and Pre-Construction Manager with detailed preparation for upcoming projects.

The role demands a high level of organization, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.

Key Responsibilities

• Meeting Coordination: Schedule and coordinate virtual meetings, including pre-construction meetings, bid discussions, and project debriefs, ensuring all necessary participants are informed and prepared.

• Deadline Management: Monitor and record project deadlines, providing timely reminders to the team to ensure that submissions and responses are prepared well in advance.

• Job Folder Organization: Set up and maintain digital job folders, ensuring that all project-related documents are accurately filed and easily accessible.

• Document Preparation and Control: Assist in compiling construction markups and preparing bills of quantities, ensuring accuracy and compliance with project requirements.

• Contractor Procurement and Management: Source new contractors, evaluate their qualifications, and maintain an up-to-date contractor list, facilitating effective bid processes and project execution.

• Administrative Support: Provide comprehensive administrative support to the estimating team, including, drafting correspondence, and any other tasks that contribute to the efficiency of the estimating process.

• Follow-Up and Feedback: Organize and manage the collection of feedback from clients and internal tea
mbers post-project completion to identify areas for improvement and celebrate successes.

• Communication: Act as a point of contact for internal and external queries related to estimation projects, ensuring clear and prompt communication.

• Data Management and Analysis: Organize and manage project data, including historical cost data, for easy access and analysis. This can help in making more accurate future estimates.

• Market Research: Conduct online research to stay updated on market trends, material costs, and the availability of subcontractors, which can influence project estimates and bids.

• Monthly Tender Reporting: Support the creation of tender reports related to projects, such as status, total amount of projects tendered, dollar value etc.



Skills and Qualifications

• Skills

o Technical Proficiency: Strong computer skills and proficiency in Plan Swift, MS Office, especially Excel, and familiarity with construction management software.

o Organizational Skills: Exceptional organizational and time-management skills, with the ability to prioritize tasks effectively.

o Attention to Detail: Meticulous attention to detail, ensuring accuracy in all aspects of work.

o Communication Skills: Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

o Proactivity and Initiative: Ability to work independently, take initiative, and proactively address potential issues before they arise.

• Qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in civil engineering, Architecture, or Quantity Surveying

• Experience:

o Experience has a quantity surveyor is preferred.

o Experience in reading and understanding drawings and technical specifications.

Work Environment

• The Estimating Virtual Assistant will operate in a dynamic, fast-paced office setting within our pre-construction department.

• Collaboration with the Estimator and Pre-Construction Manager are key components of the role.

• The position may require occasional site visits and participation in project meetings.

• This position is fully remote, providing the flexibility to work from home.

• The Estimating Virtual Assistant will be part of a supportive virtual team, with regular online meetings and communication channels to stay connected and aligned with the team's goals and projects.

Employment Type, Compensation, and Benefits

• Employment Type: Full-Time

• Compensation: TBC on Candidate

• Benefits:

o Professional Development: Opportunities for professional growth including training sessions, workshops, and seminars.

Application Process To apply for the Estimator position, please follow the steps outlined below:

1. Prepare Your Application: Compile your resume, cover letter, and any relevant certifications or portfolios that showcase your experience and skills related to construction estimation.



2. Submit Your Application:
 your application materials to 
 Please include "Estimating VA Application" in the subject line to ensure proper routing.

• Resume / CV

• Qualifications

• Academic Transcript

• Past Projects with Photos – If any

• References

• English Test Results which can be completed here: 
/english-test/

• Typing Test Results which can be completed here: 
/



3. Review Process: Our recruitment team will review applications on a rolling basis. Qualified candidates will be contacted for an initial screening interview.



4. Interviews: Selected candidates will be invited to participate in one or more interviews. This may include interviews with the Pre-Construction Manager and other key tea
mbers, potentially including practical assessments or case studies relevant to the role.



5. Decision and Offer: Final candidates will be selected based on their interviews and reference checks. An offer will be extended to the chosen candidate, including a detailed overview of the compensation package and benefits.



6. Onboarding: Upon acceptance, the new Estimator will undergo a comprehensive onboarding process to become acquainted with our team, processes, and projects.



We appreciate your interest in joining our team and look forward to reviewing your application. For any inquiries regarding the application process or the position, please
 us at

title: Google Ads/ PPC Manager
description:
**PLEASE ATTACH YOUR RESUME LINK TO YOUR APPLICATION**



The Google Ads / PPC Manager will own the planning, execution, and optimization of paid search campaigns across Google Ads and other digital platforms. This role is responsible for driving measurable revenue growth, maintaining accurate attribution and tracking, and providing structured reporting and insights to inform business decisions. The ideal candidate combines hands-on campaign management with strong analytical skills and a strategic mindset to ensure campaigns meet both efficiency and profitability goals.

 

Responsibilities

Manage day-to-day Google Ads campaigns, including Search, Shopping, and Performance Max campaigns.

Monitor retail media and paid search performance (ACoS, ROAS, CPC, conversions) and make data-driven recommendations.

Implement search terms, targeting, bidding, and budget strategies to maximize ROI.

Maintain tracking integrity and ensure accurate attribution across campaigns.

Analyze campaign performance, generate actionable insights, and produce structured reporting using GA4, dashboards, and spreadsheets.

Own asset management and optimization strategy for full-funnel campaigns.

Execute retargeting and remarketing strategies to drive conversions.

Collaborate cross-functionally with SEO, CRO, Web Development, Paid Media, and Merchandising teams to ensure campaigns are aligned with broader business priorities.

Support additional ad types such as native ads as needed.

Maintain detailed documentation, logs, and performance tracking to support testing and decision-making.

Competencies and Qualifications



Must-haves

5+ years of experience in Google Ads performance analysis and campaign management

Strong bid, budget, and ROI management skills (ACoS, ROAS, CPC, conversions)

Expertise in retail profitability optimization

Strong search term and targeting strategy skills

Data analysis and reporting proficiency (GA4, dashboards, spreadsheets)

Experience with attribution and tracking integrity

Hands-on experience with asset management and full-funnel optimization strategies

Knowledge of the Shopify ecosystem

Ability to execute retargeting and remarketing campaigns

Experience managing other types of ads (native ads)



Nice-to-haves

Knowledge of Meta Ads

Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, or related field

Experience with creative testing and messaging optimization



Key Qualities

Analytical – Able to interpret data, identify trends, and translate insights into actionable improvements for campaigns.

Goal-Oriented – Focused on driving measurable results, meeting KPIs, and optimizing performance across all paid media efforts.

Big Picture Thinker – Understands how paid search campaigns fit into broader e-commerce strategy and overall business objectives.







What We Offer



100% Remote Work – Work from anywhere in the Philippines.

Career Growth Opportunities – Gain hands-on experience, and continuous learning.

Collaborative & Innovative Team – Work alongside skilled professionals who value excellence.

 outreach

description:
Australian based Ecommerce brand ZEA is looking for a Marketing & Ecommerce Coordinator to support the CMO and broader team in executing their marketing strategy with a strong focus on ecommerce performance and digital execution.



You will be primarily responsible for ensuring Zea’s Shopify store, ecommerce campaigns, promotional rollouts, website merchandising, conversion rate optimisation (CRO), and digital customer journey are executed accurately and continuously optimised to drive revenue and conversion. You will be expected to implement operational workflows, track performance metrics, leverage AI tools for efficiency and implement new website apps and improved workflows on Shopify. Ensuring quality control and brand consistency across all channels, and maintaining clear communication within the team. 

Additionally, you will facilitate internal and external communications and handle ad-hoc tasks as required by the business.



This is a highly operational role suited to someone who is systems-driven, detail-oriented, technologically confident, and capable of managing multiple priorities across digital marketing and ecommerce.



If you believe you have the appropriate experience for this role, please send your CV, a video introduction, and your completed work test (link below) to

title: Part-time CapCut / TikTok Video Editor (TikTok Shop) — Potential for More
description:
Hiring for part-time work for a CapCut / TikTok editor.



You will be making TikTok videos using CapCut or the video editing software of your choice. The editing process is fairly simple and straightforward. Anyone who is proficient in video editing should have no problem with the basic tasks such as:



* Cutting dead space in talking head videos

* Adding overlay images on screen in videos

* Minor effects such as dynamic zoom, cropping, etc.

* Producing b-roll content from voiceover and footage provided, with the ability to understand what is being said and pair the audio with corresponding footage



Please review a few examples of my content to make sure you are familiar and comfortable with the editing style. A strong understanding of English and social media content is crucial here.



Basic talking head

Here you are mostly editing dead space and piecing clips together, adding minor effects like crop and zoom to make the frames look more dynamic and seamless.





Talking head with overlays

Same as before, but adding images and green screen backgrounds provided to you to support what is being said in the video.





B-roll content

You will be provided b-roll clips along with a reference video and will need to work through the footage to find fitting visuals.





You will be working hand in hand with me on an extremely viral social media page, and there is room for bonuses if deadlines are met and the content performs well.



Requirements:



* Attention to detail

* Strong English

* Strong internet connection

* Previous experience with CapCut / TikTok / Instagram

* Works well with a team

* Ability to learn and take constructive feedback

* Availability to work 2–3 hours a day, with potential for more and increased salary

* Able to work 5–7 days per week

* Can take payments through Wise or PayPal

* PH or similar time zone



Compensation:

$400/month + bonuses for 2–3 hours a day max, with potential full-time work in the future and a salary increase.



To apply, please complete the recreate assignment below so I can see your skills (1 hour max).



Below is a Google Drive with a reference video and the original files, including image overlays, that you will need to recreate the reference video:



Google Drive:





Please complete the following steps:



* Download the files and import them into your video editing software

* Find the “good” takes of the audio sections and stitch them together to complete the voiceover

* Find the corresponding image overlays and green screen images to match the reference

* Pay close attention to detail in the selection of clips, pacing, scene duration, cropping, and overall flow

* Message me with a link to the recreated video



Please do not apply unless you complete the test assignment.

title: Operations Lead / Chief of Staff
description:
We're a US-based insurtech startup with a small engineering team based in Bohol. The founder is an engineer — great at building product, not so great at staying organized. We need someone who keeps the whole operation running smoothly so the team can focus on shipping.



This is not a virtual assistant role. You'll be the operational backbone of the company — sitting with the team daily, running the day-to-day, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks. If you're the kind of person who gets genuinely annoyed when things are disorganized, this is your dream job.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN:

Daily standups and team coordination — making sure the "one big task" for the day is clear and everyone is unblocked

Hiring pipeline — screening resumes, scheduling interviews, coordinating trial weeks for candidates

Contractor admin — onboarding paperwork, payment tracking via Wise, ensuring everyone gets paid on time

Vendor and supplier coordination — office setup, internet, equipment procurement

Calendar and communications — managing the founder's schedule, filtering inbound, drafting responses

Light project management — tracking features, bugs, and deadlines in Linear/Notion

Local operations — coordinating with our registered local entity for BIR filings, permits, and compliance

Budget tracking — monitoring monthly burn, flagging cost issues early



REQUIREMENTS:

You are based in Bohol or willing to relocate — this is a fully on-site role in Panglao

Extremely organized and detail-oriented — you live in spreadsheets, checklists, and systems

Strong English communication — written and verbal, as you'll interact with US-based contacts

Experience managing operations, admin, or project coordination (startup experience is a huge plus)

Comfortable with tools like Notion, Slack, Google Workspace, and project management software

You take ownership — you don't wait to be told what to do, you see the gap and fill it

You can context-switch between "schedule a meeting" and "negotiate an office lease" in the same hour



NICE TO HAVE:

Experience in tech startups or working with engineering teams

Familiarity with Philippine business registration (DTI, BIR, barangay permits)

Bookkeeping or basic accounting knowledge

Experience hiring and managing contractors or freelancers



WHAT WE OFFER:

Competitive PHP salary paid twice monthly

On-site role in Panglao, Bohol — work directly with the founder and engineering team

Meal and transport allowance

You'll be employee #3 at a funded startup — massive growth potential

Real responsibility from day one, not busy work



Start your application with the word "lighthouse" so we know you read this.

title: Video Editor for Short-Form and Long-Form Content (Ongoing)
description:
Job Title: Video Editor for Long-Form YouTube Content (Ongoing)



I'm looking for a reliable video editor for my short-form Instagram and long-form YouTube content. Videos for short form are 30-90 seconds long (3-10 minutes of raw footage) and long-form is 10-35 minutes (40-75 minutes of raw footage) that need simple editing only - no graphics, no sound effects, no fancy effects. I’m looking for simple text on screen, music overlays and simple cuts. Must have good english to understand message and know what to cut out and when.



What the job involves:



- Cut out mistakes, long pauses, and filler

- Add J/L cuts to keep transitions smooth

- Add text on screen, background music, simple graphics

- Export in original resolution



Pay: $10 per long-form video / $5 per short form video - paid per project. This is ongoing work, I publish regularly and want to find one person to work with long-term.



To get started: Shortlisted applicants will receive a paid 10-minute test long-form clip and create a short-form and long-form edit ($15). I'll hire the best edit for ongoing work.



To apply: Send me a short message about your experience with long-form and short-form content and a link to any previous work if you have it.

title: Bookkeeper
description:
Join Our Remote Accounting Team!

We are a fast-growing, boutique outsourced accounting firm supporting high-growth e-commerce and service-based businesses. While our name remains confidential for now, we’ve been behind the scenes helping some of the most exciting DTC brands scale with confidence through expert bookkeeping, financial systems, and strategic insights.



We are a remote-first company with a collaborative, client-first culture — and we’re looking for exceptional talent to grow with us.



We’re seeking a detail-oriented, tech-savvy E-commerce Bookkeeper to manage financial records, process transactions, and generate critical reports to support client decision-making. You’ll play a key role in ensuring books are accurate, clean, and up-to-date — and bring clarity to fast-moving businesses.



What You’ll Be Doing

As our Bookkeeper, you’ll support multiple clients with day-to-day accounting operations, reconciling accounts, and managing both AP and AR functions.



Your Core Responsibilities:

- Record and categorize financial transactions using QuickBooks Online

- Reconcile bank, credit card, and merchant accounts

- Prepare and analyze financial reports (P&L, Balance Sheets, Cash Flow Statements)

- Perform invoicing, collections, and accounts receivable tracking

- Process bills and manage accounts payable workflows

- Process payroll and ensure timely tax remittances

- Track and maintain accurate inventory accounting records

- Communicate with clients via dedicated channels (Slack,
, Meetings)

- Support ad hoc bookkeeping and administrative needs as required



What You’ll Bring to the Table

**Experience & Skills:

- 3+ years of experience as a Bookkeeper

- Advanced QuickBooks Online skills are required

- Strong grasp of inventory tracking and accounting best practices

- Experience reconciling financial data across multiple platforms

- Experience with NetSuite is required

- Proficient with Google Workspace, Excel, and Word

- Experience working with e-commerce or service-based businesses is a plus

**Communication & Work Environment:

- Advanced English skills (written and spoken – C1 level preferred)

- Strong attention to detail and time management

- Clear communicator who can work independently and manage deadlines

- Tech-savvy and comfortable with remote collaboration tools



What’s In It For You?

- 100% Remote Work - Work from anywhere in the Philippines. No more long commutes or stressful traffic. Spend more quality time with your loved ones and thrive in the comfort of your own home.

- Long-Term Career Growth – With opportunities to scale into higher leadership roles.

Competitive Pay – $10/hr + benefits as an independent contractor

- Supportive Culture – Work alongside a leadership team that values transparency, innovation, and your ideas.

- Positive, People-First Vibes – We believe in balance, fun, and thriving together.

- Annual Performance Reviews – Your growth gets recognized and rewarded.



Ready to Keep the Books Clean & Clients Confident?

If you’re obsessed with accuracy, enjoy structure, and love bringing order to financial chaos — this role is for you. Join our growing team of professionals who value excellence, clarity, and results.

title: Admin / Executive Assistant
description:
*** ONLY APPLY IF YOU HAVE EXPERIENCE WITH AUSTRALIAN NDIS and XERO SOFTWARE

*** DESIRABLE - has worked a corporate role in the Philippine setting



Organisation: Australian NDIS Service Provider

Location: Remote

Reports To: Chief Executive Officer (CEO)

Employment Type: Full-Time



Position Summary



The successful candidate must have prior experience working within the NDIS sector and strong hands-on experience using Xero accounting software, particularly in payroll processing, bank reconciliations, and invoicing.



The Administrative Officer / Executive Assistant to the CEO plays a critical role in supporting the operational efficiency and strategic direction of the organisation. This role provides high-level executive support to the CEO while overseeing key administrative and financial processes across the business.



This position requires exceptional organisational skills, strong financial administration capability, and the ability to operate independently in a remote environment. The role will act as a trusted support to the CEO, ensuring daily operations run smoothly while maintaining accurate financial, administrative, and compliance records.



A high level of professionalism, discretion, and the ability to manage competing priorities in a fast-paced, purpose-driven environment is essential.



Key Responsibilities

* Executive Support

- Provide high-level administrative and executive support to the CEO, including calendar management, meeting coordination, and travel arrangements.

- Prepare reports, briefing documents, presentations, and correspondence on behalf of the CEO.

- Act as a key communication point between the CEO and internal and external stakeholders.

- Manage confidential documentation and sensitive information with the highest level of discretion.

- Assist the CEO with research, strategic initiatives, and operational projects.

- Track and follow up on action items from executive and leadership meetings.



* Financial Administration (Xero)

- Manage day-to-day financial administration using Xero accounting software.

- Process employee payroll through Xero, ensuring compliance with applicable employment obligations.

- Conduct bank and credit card reconciliations and investigate discrepancies.

- Generate and manage client invoices, ensuring accuracy and timely billing.

- Monitor incoming payments and follow up on outstanding invoices.

- Maintain accurate financial records and supporting documentation.

- Assist in preparing financial reports for the CEO and leadership team.

- Liaise with external accountants and finance professionals when required.

- Support end-of-month and end-of-year financial processes.



* Administrative Operations

- Maintain organised digital filing systems and company records.

- Support internal documentation processes including contracts, position descriptions, and compliance documentation.

- Assist with HR administration including onboarding documentation, employee records, and timesheet coordination.

- Coordinate internal meetings, including agenda preparation and minute taking when required.

- Support the implementation and maintenance of internal administrative systems and workflows.

- Provide general administrative support across departments when required.



* NDIS Compliance and Operational Support

- Support administrative compliance with NDIS operational and documentation requirements.

- Assist with maintaining participant records, documentation, and service agreements where required.

- Ensure internal records and documentation meet organisational and regulatory standards.

- Assist with internal audits, documentation reviews, and compliance checks.

- Support continuous improvement of operational processes within the NDIS framework.



* Skills and Experience

Essential

- Demonstrated experience working within the NDIS sector.

- Strong hands-on experience using Xero accounting software.

- Proven experience in an Administrative Officer or Executive Assistant role supporting senior leadership.

- Demonstrated experience managing:

     - Payroll processing

     - Bank reconciliations

     - Client invoicing

     - Financial record keeping

- Additional requirements:

     - Excellent organisational and time management skills.

     - Strong written and verbal communication skills.

     - High attention to detail and accuracy.

     - Ability to manage confidential information with professionalism and discretion.

     - Strong proficiency with digital tools such as Google Workspace or Microsoft Office.

     - Ability to work independently in a remote work environment.



Desirable

- Understanding of Australian payroll and employment obligations.

- Experience working within NDIS service providers or community services organisations.

- Experience supporting executive leadership or senior management teams.

- Familiarity with operational systems such as rostering platforms, CRM systems, or workforce management software.

- Personal Attributes

- Highly organised and proactive.

- Trustworthy with strong professional integrity.

- Able to work independently and take initiative.

- Adaptable and capable of managing competing priorities.

- Solutions-focused with strong problem-solving ability.

- Exceptional attention to detail.



* What We Offer

- Philippine daytime working hours

- Remote work environment

- The opportunity to work closely with executive leadership

- A collaborative and purpose-driven organisational culture

- The ability to contribute to meaningful work within the NDIS and community services sector

title: Staff Accountant
description:
Who We Are

Accountally is a boutique bookkeeping and accounting firm built around one belief: small and mid-sized businesses deserve financial clarity without the chaos. We're a fully remote, Philippines-based team that partners closely with our clients — not just to close the books, but to give them real visibility into their numbers. We work hard, we care about doing things right, and we genuinely enjoy the people we work with (clients included).

We're growing, and we're looking for a Staff Accountant who's ready to take ownership of a portfolio of clients and grow with us.



The Role

As a Staff Accountant at Accountally, you'll manage the full accounting cycle for a portfolio of clients across a range of industries. This isn't a data-entry role — you'll be the person who owns the numbers end-to-end, ensures the books are clean and current, and delivers accurate monthly reporting that our clients actually rely on.



You'll work within a supportive team structure, with clear processes and leadership that's invested in your development. If you're someone who takes pride in accurate work, communicates proactively, and thrives in a structured remote environment, you'll feel right at home here.



What You'll Do

- Manage full-cycle bookkeeping for a portfolio of assigned clients, including transaction coding, bank and credit card reconciliations, accounts payable, and accounts receivable

- Own the month-end close process for each client — ensuring books are finalized accurately and on schedule

- Prepare and deliver monthly financial reports (P&L, Balance Sheet, Statement of Cash Flows) with a focus on accuracy and clarity

- Review and reconcile payroll entries in coordination with Gusto and other payroll platforms

- Process vendor bills and payments through 
 or other bill pay platforms

- Maintain organized, audit-ready workpapers and client files

- Identify and flag discrepancies, irregularities, or cleanup needs proactively

- Collaborate with team leads and firm leadership on process improvements and client-specific needs



What We're Looking For:

Required:

- 3+ years of full-cycle bookkeeping or accounting experience, preferably in a multi-client or firm environment

- Strong proficiency in QuickBooks Online — you can navigate it confidently and know its quirks

- Experience with Xero, 
, and Gusto (or comparable payroll platforms)

- Solid understanding of month-end close procedures and financial statement preparation

- High attention to detail and a strong sense of ownership over your work

- Clear, professional written communication skills in English

- Reliable internet connection and a dedicated, distraction-free home workspace

- Ability to work during U.S. business hours (overlap required)

Preferred:

- Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field (or equivalent experience)

- CPA or CPA board passer (not required, but a plus)

- Experience working with U.S.-based clients

- Familiarity with accrual-basis accounting



What It's Like to Work Here

- Fully remote — work from wherever you do your best work in the Philippines

- A small, close-knit team where your contributions are visible and valued

- Clear expectations, documented processes, and a leadership team that actually follows through

- Room to grow — we promote from within and invest in the people who invest in us

- A culture that values accuracy, integrity, and honest communication over performative busy-ness

title: Senior Bookkeeper (Canadian Experience Required)
description:
We are looking for a highly experienced Senior Bookkeeper with strong expertise in Canadian bookkeeping standards to join our growing team. If you are detail-oriented, reliable, and confident in managing full-cycle bookkeeping and payroll independently, we’d love to hear from you!

This is a fully remote position offering long-term stability and growth.

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

• Manage full-cycle bookkeeping for Canadian clients

• Maintain accurate financial records and reconciliations

• Accounts payable and accounts receivable management

• Bank and credit card reconciliations

• Prepare and process payroll in compliance with Canadian regulations

• Assist with month-end and year-end closing procedures

• Ensure compliance with Canadian tax and financial reporting standards

• Generate financial reports as needed

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Must-Have Qualifications

• Senior-level experience in Canadian bookkeeping

• Strong proficiency in QuickBooks (Online and/or Desktop)

• Solid understanding of:

o Canadian payroll regulations

o GST/HST filings

o Accounts reconciliation

o Financial reporting

• High attention to detail and accuracy

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

• Ability to work independently with minimal supervision

• Reliable internet connection and dedicated remote workspace

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________



Nice-to-Have Skills

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills

o Ability to explain financial data clearly to non-finance stakeholders

o Professional and confident client communication

• Strong organizational and time-management skills

• Ability to manage multiple clients or accounts efficiently

• Experience working with remote teams

• Include the word Blue in your subject line when sending your application

• Proactive mindset - someone who identifies issues before they become problems

title: Website Sales & Lead Generation Specialist (Cold Calling + Appointment Setting)
description:
We are a growing U.S.-based technology company that builds professional websites for small businesses. We help companies improve their online presence and generate more customers.



We are looking for a motivated and experienced Virtual Assistant who can find businesses that need websites, contact them, and set appointments for our sales team.



This is a long-term opportunity for the right person who wants stable work and performance bonuses.



Your Responsibilities



Your main goal will be to generate new business leads and schedule appointments.



Daily tasks include:



• Finding businesses that do not have websites or have outdated websites

• Scraping business contact information from Google, Yelp,
, and other directories

• Cold calling business owners

• Introducing our website services

• Booking appointments for our sales team

• Updating leads and notes in our spreadsheet or CRM



You will be helping businesses improve their online presence while helping us grow.



Required Experience



We are specifically looking for someone who has experience with:



• Cold calling and phone sales

• Appointment setting

• Lead generation and data scraping

• Finding business contact information online

• Speaking confidently with business owners



Bonus if you have experience with:



• Selling websites, digital marketing, or SEO

• Using Google Maps, Yelp, LinkedIn, or
 to find leads

• CRM systems or lead tracking tools



Requirements



• Excellent English speaking skills

• Clear phone communication

• Reliable internet connection

• Ability to work independently and stay organized, during US business hours

• Positive attitude and strong work ethic



Compensation



Base hourly pay + performance bonuses.



You will receive bonuses for:



• Qualified appointments set

• Closed deals from your appointments



Our sales team closes the deals — your job is to find the opportunities and get them on the phone.



Top performers will have opportunities for increased pay and long-term work.



Work Schedule



Part time to start.



Approximately 3–5 hours per day with the potential to increase to full time based on performance.



To Apply



Please include the following:



Your experience with cold calling or appointment setting



Any experience selling websites, marketing, or digital services



A short voice recording introducing yourself



The word "Wizard" in your application so we know you read this post.



If you are hardworking, motivated, and enjoy speaking with business owners, this can be a long-term opportunity with consistent work and bonuses.



We are excited to grow our team.

title: Financial Accountant - AU Company
description:
Who is Bare?

Bare is the new way to funeral. We are a holistic end of life care provider, allowing our families to grieve in their own way, at their own pace, knowing their loved one is cared for by a team who truly understand their needs.



By combining empathy with technology, we’re creating end-of-life experiences that are simple, personalized and affordable. In only five years, we’ve served more than 30,000 families, have become Australia’s most awarded end-of-life provider (with awards in customer service, innovation and digital disruption), and have built a team of more than 100 people committed to changing the way Australians deal with end-of-life. And we’re just getting started.



We’re looking for a passionate and detail-oriented Financial Accountant to join our high-performing remote team. If you're a proactive finance professional who thrives on ownership, continuous improvement, and meaningful work, we’d love to meet you.



What You’ll Be Doing

As our Financial Accountant, you’ll be a key player in ensuring accurate, insightful, and timely financial reporting. You’ll collaborate across teams, drive process improvement, and uphold the financial integrity of our mission.



Key Responsibilities:

-Own the Month-End Close

Lead all aspects of EOM: journal entries, reconciliations, accruals, and financial statement prep.

-Deliver Insightful Reporting

Produce monthly and quarterly management reports, including variance and trend analysis.

-Ensure Regulatory Compliance

Prepare BAS, IAS, and statutory filings, ensuring alignment with AASB and tax standards.

-Champion Continuous Improvement

Streamline workflows, introduce automation, and enhance internal controls.

-Collaborate Cross-Functionally

Partner with Marketing, Operations, and other non-finance teams to align on budget and strategy.

-Support Strategic Projects

Get involved in cost analysis, ERP upgrades, and special projects that shape our financial future.



Why Join Bare?

Make a Meaningful Impact: Your work directly supports families during one of the most vulnerable times of their lives.

Remote-First Flexibility: Work from anywhere in Australia with the tools and autonomy to succeed.

Mission-Driven Culture: Join a team that leads with empathy and integrity—where your voice matters.

Growth & Innovation: Help shape scalable systems in a business that's growing fast and disrupting the norm.



About You

You’re not just technically sharp, you bring heart and high standards to everything you do. You thrive in fast-paced environments and care about doing work that matters.



Must-Haves:

-Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or similar.

-CPA/CA qualification (or in-progress).

-2–3+ years' experience in financial accounting, ideally in service-led sectors.

-Familiarity with Australian accounting standards, BAS/IAS, and financial reporting.

-Understanding of various accounting standards relevant to Bare and consolidations of many entities.

-Attention to detail and excellent reconciliation skills

-Strong ERP (MYOB, Xero, SAP) and Excel skills.

-Strong Excel/Sheets skills and automation of manual processes in your mindset-DNA



Nice-to-Haves:

• Experience in mission-driven sectors (healthcare, aged care, funeral services).

• Adaptability in high-growth or high-volume environments.

• Resilient, working with little or no supervision.

• Experience of managing international teams, interaction with multi-entity organizations, and experience within companies with a minimum annual revenue of $50 million.

• Handle ambiguity, competing priorities, and strict deadlines. Create and implement scalable processes, including training. Integrate AI and automation.



Core Values We Look For

• Empathy: You care deeply about people—colleagues and customers alike.

• Accountability: You take ownership and deliver results with pride.

• Clarity: You communicate financial information in a clear, human way.

• Curiosity: You’re always looking for a better way and love solving problems.



Perks & Benefits

-Fully remote work setup with flexible hours

-Purpose-driven work with real human impact

-Growth and learning opportunities in a scale-up environment

-Supportive, inclusive team culture



Please include your resume when submitting your application. Thank you!

title: Senior Analytics Engineer (Financial Data & Reporting) — Power BI / SQL / Data Modeling
description:
Senior Analytics Engineer

IMPORTANT: Candidates who don't complete Round-1 are NOT considered.





Why this role exists

Turn messy operational data into clean models, deterministic validations, reconciled outputs, and executive-ready evidence—so leadership can file on time, pass reviews, and make decisions with confidence. You’ll move quickly from MVP to repeatable, low-touch workflows.



What you’ll do (outcomes)

1. Model & Validate: Build tidy star-schema models; write rule-based checks (completeness, allowed values, tie-outs, negative/zero policies) that prevent bad data from shipping.

2. Reconcile: Prove totals reconcile to control numbers; maintain balance ? flow bridges; keep exceptions at zero by close.

3. Evidence-ready outputs: Produce clean, fixed-layout exports and one-page views that hold up under review.

4. Cadence & reliability: Own refresh schedules, light automation for deadline windows, and receipt/acknowledgment capture.

5. Iterate to MVP: Ship weekly increments, simplify the path to first-pass acceptance, and reduce manual touches.



Must-have qualifications

1. SQL + data modeling: Built analysis-ready models; can explain grain, joins, lineage.

2. Validation mindset: You write acceptance-grade rules (uniqueness, ranges, null policies, reconciliations) and block releases when controls fail.

3. Power BI competence: Data model + core DAX + clean pages; can wire simple RLS and test it.

4. Clarity & artifacts: Concise written English; tidy notes; reproducible steps.

5. Portfolio/snippets: PBIX/SQL/screenshots + a short “what changed & why” note.



We welcome adjacent profiles: strong Data Engineers with modeling/quality chops, or Power BI Analysts who write SQL and adopt modular/dbt-style patterns. If you’re great at rules and reconciliations, we’ll teach the missing bits.



Nice-to-have

- Modular SQL transforms (dbt-style).

- Expectation-style data-quality tests and exception reporting.

- Basic orchestration/automation (scheduled refresh, light UI automation, receipt capture).

- Finance literacy (control totals, variance basics).



System requirements

- Windows 10/11, Power BI Desktop, 16GB RAM (recommended minimum), stable internet ?25 Mbps.



How we work

- Async-first, low meetings: clear runbooks, quick reviews, Ship > Talk.

- Short loops: weekly deliverables that reduce rework and manual effort.

- Ownership: you propose controls, not just visuals.

- Microsoft-first, lean stack: we teach specifics.

- Acceptance bar (used in trials & ongoing work)

- Models reconcile to control totals within tolerance.

- All validations green at file time; exceptions cleared with notes.

- Evidence pages export cleanly (pagination, labels, links).

- A trained teammate can reproduce the flow at 5PM on close day.



30/60/90 milestones

Day 30: Core transaction slice modeled; ?10 validation checks; one exceptions view.

Day 60: Balance-to-flow tie-outs operational; daily variance view.

Day 90: Coverage/adequacy slice packaged with artifacts; light automations for deadline windows.



Compensation & schedule

- Core availability 2:00–8:30 PM EST; 8:30–10:30 PM EST (As-needed window). Pay applies to meetings + assigned build work only.

- Contractor, target ~$5-7 USD/hour.



How to apply (required)

- Complete a short, free Round-1 audition (30-60 min, offline).

- We provide a small regulatory-reporting sample dataset plus context.



You submit:

- A rules list (what you’d validate and why)

- A compact transform plan (SQL-like or pseudo-dbt)

- One clean Power BI page (PBIX) with a brief reconciliation note

- A 90-sec Loom walk-through showing your PBIX and transform logic



Applicant Keywords

Power BI, DAX, SQL, Star Schema, RLS, Data Modeling, ETL/ELT, Data Validation, Reconciliation, Paginated Export, Automation, Analytics Engineer, Data Engineer

title: Senior Video Editor (Full-Time | Remote)
description:
We’re looking for a highly skilled Senior Video Editor who can confidently take ownership of the entire editing process with minimal supervision.



This role is ideal for someone who is not only experienced in video editing but also embraces modern tools, including AI, to enhance creativity, speed, and production quality.



If you are someone who understands visual storytelling, advanced editing techniques, and emerging AI-powered workflows, this could be the perfect role for you.



What You'll Do

- Produce high-quality video content for marketing, social media, and digital platforms

- Apply advanced editing techniques, motion graphics, and visual storytelling

- Perform color grading, sound design, and final production polish

- Create supporting graphics, text animations, and visual assets when needed

- Conduct your own quality assurance and final review before submission

- Optimize videos for different platforms (YouTube, social media, ads, etc.)

- Use AI-powered tools and workflows to improve editing efficiency, creativity, and production speed

- Manage projects independently and deliver polished work with minimal supervision



What We're Looking For

Technical Requirements

- Reliable high-speed internet and capable editing workstation

- Ability to handle large video files and fast-paced editing environments



What We Value

- Professionals who take ownership of their work

- Creatives who embrace both traditional editing and AI-powered innovation

- Editors who bring ideas, creativity, and solutions - not just execution

- Individuals who are committed to long-term growth and continuous learning



Position Details

- Full-time position

- Remote work setup

- Long-term opportunity with a growing team



How to Apply

- Please submit the following:

- Your portfolio or demo reel

- Links to previous editing projects

- A short note about your editing workflow and the tools (including AI tools) you currently use

 subject: OPS777 – Your Name

title: Collections Support Agent
description:
If you enjoy resolving payment issues, guiding customers through repayment options, and have experience in fintech or Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) services, then this role is for you. Apply here: 
/appqyBZJyyxs1htVk/pagvvCsolTY5tzwa7/form

About us

We are a fast-growing fintech team delivering flexible payment solutions, including Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) services, that help customers manage their everyday payments with ease. Our team thrives on collaboration, innovation, and a customer-first mindset.

What You’ll Do

As a Customer Operations & Collections Agent, you’ll be the trusted point of contact for our customers - helping them manage their payments, resolve account issues, and stay on track with repayments. You’ll handle everything from contacting customers to settle accounts, guiding them through repayment options, and supporting debt recovery efforts.

IMPORTANT: Please carefully read the responsibilities below to ensure you're a good fit, and follow the instructions on how to apply at the bottom.



Compensation:

* Competitive salary: $1,300 – $1,500 USD per month (depending on experience)

* Opportunity to grow into a Team Lead/Manager position (with a raise) as the support team expands



Benefits:

* 100% Remote - work from anywhere in the Philippines.

* 15 days paid leave

* Bi-weekly salary payouts

* Paid time off and Philippine public holiday, listed here

* Supportive, startup-style culture where your ideas matter

* Clear growth path and strong learning opportunities in fintech





Working Hours:

* Shift during onboarding 6pm - 1am PH, Monday to Friday. After onboarding a fixed schedule will be provided depending on business needs.

* Must be willing to work during weekends

* This is a full time role only (40 hours per week)



Core Responsibilities

* Deliver exceptional multi-channel support (chat,
, and phone) with a focus on first-contact resolution and high customer satisfaction.

* Uphold brand standards by communicating clearly, consistently, and professionally in all interactions.

* Actively manage brand reputation by professionally responding to all customer reviews and public feedback.

* Handle and resolve customer complaints with empathy and efficiency, knowing when and how to appropriately escalate complex issues.

* Oversee customer repayments and collections by assisting with payment management, rescheduling, and account oversight with professionalism and care.

* Protect the business by proactively identifying, investigating, and escalating suspicious activity and potential fraud cases.

* Leverage AI-driven tools to streamline workflows, optimize response times, and enhance the quality of support delivered.

* Drive continuous improvement by gathering and sharing actionable customer insights with product and internal teams to enhance offerings and processes.



You’re Perfect for This Role If You

* Have proven experience in customer service, ideally within fintech, payments, or * lending (BNPL experience a plus).

* Understand fraud detection, repayments, and collections, with empathy for customers’ financial situations.

* Communicate effectively across chat,
, and phone, adapting tone and approach to each channel.

* Are tech-savvy and comfortable using AI tools and automation to streamline work.

* Thrive in a fast-paced, customer-first startup environment where priorities shift quickly.

* Are an empathetic problem solver with strong attention to detail, professionalism, and integrity.



How to Apply:

* Click the link below to submit your application and let's get started: 
/appqyBZJyyxs1htVk/pagvvCsolTY5tzwa7/form

title: Senior Operations & Recruitment Lead (Founding Member)
description:

Salary: Premium Base Salary + Growth Bonuses



About the Role:

We are looking for a highly mature, seasoned, and reliable Senior Operations Lead to be the first employee of Lumera Solutions LLC, a paper packaging and design firm based in New Jersey. As the first member of our team, you will not just be an assistant; you will be the backbone of our operational startup. We are looking for a professional who is at a stable stage in their life and seeking a long-term "work-home" where they can eventually grow into a leadership/managerial role.



Key Responsibilities:

Who You Are:

You are detail-oriented, emotionally intelligent, and possess a "can-do" attitude for a wide variety of tasks.



You are looking for a stable, daytime role that allows you to provide for your family while growing with a promising U.S. startup.

title: Corporate Sales Manager – Real Estate Solutions
description:
Job Position is BASED IN SINGAPORE




.sg



Full job description : 



Start Something Purposeful. 



At Urban Space Group , we believe in creating concepts that allow people, business and purpose to come together and thrive. We’re a privately owned real estate group dedicated to real estate concepts for industrial and commercial spaces. We are both owners of industrial properties, commercial shophouses and spaces, as well as operators of business models and concepts such as urbanspace self storage, Urbanpod workspace etc. 



We actively invest to expand our asset portfolio and grow our industrial and shophouse asset management capabilities and offerings.  



We’re looking for a Business Development and Sales Manager to bring our asset investment and management services to our clients, partners and stakeholders. 



Why Join Acuvest :



Your Mission :



To be part of the team to grow our asset portfolio and drive performance through innovations and teamwork. 



This is a full-stack business development and sales role with plenty of room to use your skillsets in sales, strategy, innovation and execution. You’ll lead a motivated team and collaborate closely with other departments. You will report to the Business Development / Sales Director and play a critical role in the company’s performance. 



Why Join us :



- Mentored by management of a company with decades of experience in investment management, property management, development, and self-storage solutions across Singapore and the region. We combine strategic insight with innovation, offering real opportunities to grow and make an impact across a diversified real estate portfolio.



- Build an Elite Network: Connect directly with a high-value network of Corporate and SME business leaders / decision-makers, building a powerful network for your long-term career success. 



- Thrive in a High-Growth Self-Storage Sector. Our self-storage business, Co-working business space, E-commerce fulfilment hubs, serve both individual and corporate clients with flexible space solutions in a fast-rising market. You’ll be at the forefront of lead generation, networking, and deal closing—driving measurable results in an expanding industry.



- Collaborative Culture. Real Career Progression. Work with experienced professionals across property and investment teams, gain exposure to full deal cycles, build strong client relationships, and accelerate your career in sales and business development at Acuvest.



Full job description : What you will be doing



Property Leasing : 



- Develop and implement leasing strategies and initiatives to maximize occupancy, rental income, and tenant satisfaction 



- Identify leasing opportunities and prospective tenants that align with the positioning and target market of each property, and develop relationships with tenants and prospective tenants. 



- Negotiate lease agreements, including terms and conditions, rental rates, lease incentives, and lease renewals, and ensure compliance with company policies and industry standards. 



- Collaborate with property management teams to conduct market research and analysis, assess competitive landscape, and identify trends and opportunities in the property market. 



- Develop and maintain leasing budgets, forecasts, and reports, and track leasing activity, occupancy rates, and financial performance against targets and benchmarks. 



- Manage tenant relations and communication, including addressing tenant inquiries, resolving disputes, and ensuring tenant compliance with lease terms and property rules and regulations. 



- Represent the company at industry events, trade shows, and networking opportunities to promote our properties and attract potential tenants and partners. 



Self storage sales : 



- Work closely self storage sales team and management on drive the sales and occupancy of our self storage business. 



Property Investment : 



- Work closely with Management team to develop business opportunities for new property investment and development projects on a project basis. 



- Unlock Potential: Identify underutilized properties and devise creative strategies to maximize their value and utility



Requirements : Who we are looking for.



- Strong business acumen and a strategic mindset. Enterprenuerial mindset 



- An outgoing, optimistic personality with exceptional interpersonal skills. Strong networking and interpersonal skills. 



- The ability to communicate confidently and effectively at all levels. Excellent communication skills, with the ability to build relationships and influence stakeholders at all levels. 



- Minimum of 5 years of experience working experience. 



- Strong understanding of leasing principles, market dynamics, and negotiation strategies in the real estate industry. 



- Proven track record of successfully negotiating lease agreements, driving occupancy, and achieving leasing targets and goals. 



- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to analyze market data, evaluate leasing opportunities, and make data-driven decisions. 



- Results-oriented mindset with a focus on driving leasing outcomes and delivering exceptional customer service to tenants and partners.
