title: Education Franchise Business Development Manager
description:
Business Development Executive

Franchise & Licensing Growth  •  Remote  •  Full-Time



Department	Franchise & Licensing

Reports To	Head of Partnerships / CEO

Location	Remote (anywhere) — occasional travel may be required

Employment Type	Full-Time

Experience Required	Minimum 2 years in B2B sales, business development, or education industry



ABOUT RIPPLE CREATE

Ripple Create is a coding and robotics academy dedicated to nurturing the next generation of innovators, aged 5 to 18. Through hands-on, curriculum-aligned programmes, we empower young learners to design, build, and code — preparing them for a technology-driven future. We are rapidly expanding our reach through franchise and licensing partnerships across the region and beyond.



ROLE OVERVIEW

We are looking for a driven and self-motivated Business Development Executive to lead the growth of our franchise and licensing network. In this remote-based role, you will own the full partnership lifecycle — from generating and qualifying leads through marketing channels, to nurturing prospects, coordinating technical demonstrations, closing agreements, and supporting new partners through their first six months of operation. This is a high-impact, end-to-end commercial role ideal for someone with a passion for education and a proven track record in consultative sales.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Lead Generation & Marketing Channel Management

•	Manage and optimise franchise and licensing marketing portals, listings, and digital channels (e.g. franchise directories, social media, paid ads,
 campaigns).

•	Monitor inbound enquiries across all channels and respond promptly to maintain lead 
ntum.

•	Work with the marketing team to develop compelling collateral and messaging targeting prospective franchisees and licensees.



CRM Management & Lead Administration

•	Accurately enter, update, and maintain all leads and prospect interactions in the CRM system in a timely manner.

•	Track pipeline stages, flag at-risk leads, and maintain a clean, up-to-date database.

•	Generate regular reports on lead volume, conversion rates, and pipeline health for management review.



Lead Nurturing, Qualification & Sales Process

•	Proactively nurture prospects through personalised outreach, follow-up calls,
s, and virtual meetings.

•	Qualify leads against defined criteria (financial capacity, market fit, operational readiness) to prioritise pipeline.

•	Guide prospects through the sales journey, addressing objections and providing relevant information and case studies.

•	Coordinate and schedule technical demonstrations with the Sales Trainer, ensuring prospects are well-prepared and engaged.

•	Follow through on all stages of the deal process, working collaboratively toward signed agreements.



Post-Sales Partner Support (First 6 Months)

•	Serve as the primary point of contact for new franchise and licensing partners from signing through the first six months of operations.

•	Coordinate onboarding activities, training schedules, and resource access with internal teams.

•	Proactively check in with partners to resolve issues, gather feedback, and ensure a smooth launch.

•	Facilitate a structured handover to the Account Manager at the end of the six-month post-sales period.



REQUIREMENTS

•	Experience: Minimum 2 years of experience in B2B sales, business development, franchise development, or a related field; experience in the education sector is a strong advantage.

•	Sales Acumen: Demonstrated ability to manage a full sales cycle from lead generation to closing, with a consultative, relationship-first approach.

•	CRM Proficiency: Hands-on experience using CRM platforms (e.g. HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho, or similar); disciplined in data entry and pipeline management.

•	Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English; ability to adapt tone and style for diverse stakeholders.

•	Organised & Self-Directed: Highly organised with strong time management skills; comfortable managing multiple prospects and tasks independently in a remote environment.

•	Tech Savvy: Comfortable with digital marketing channels, video conferencing tools, and productivity software.

•	Passion for Education: Genuine interest in children’s education, STEM, or technology learning programmes.



NICE TO HAVE

•	Experience in franchise development, licensing, or channel partnerships.

•	Background or network in the K-12 education, enrichment, or EdTech space.

•	Familiarity with coding, robotics, or STEM-related products or curricula.

•	Multilingual abilities to engage prospects across different markets.



WHAT WE OFFER

•	A fully remote, flexible work arrangement with a results-driven culture.

•	A meaningful role contributing to the growth of quality STEM education globally.

•	Competitive base salary with performance-based commissions and incentives.

•	Supportive team, clear processes, and the tools you need to succeed.

•	Opportunities for career growth as the franchise and licensing network expands.



HOW TO APPLY

Send your CV and a brief cover letter explaining why you’re excited about this role. Please include the subject line: “BD Manager — Franchise & Licensing”. We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Client Concierge Coordinator
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

The Client Concierge Coordinator serves as a pivotal support role for clients attending our Essentials Workshops and other Cardone Ventures events. This individual is responsible for ensuring that every client has a seamless and remarkable experience from the 
nt of purchase through event attendance. The role includes managing communications, conducting welcome calls, coordinating event scheduling, and providing customer service support via
, phone, and other communication channels. This person will proactively handle client needs, such as confirming event attendance, addressing concerns, and upselling additional seats or tickets. 



This will be a contract position only of 3-6 months



This position is 100% remote.



ABOUT CARDONE VENTURES

Our mission is to help business owners achieve their personal, professional, and financial goals through the growth of their businesses. We work in dozens of verticals and provide strategic business guidance through courses, live events, partnerships, and investments. Our core values are the backbone of our business and guide our hiring process: we are inspirational, accountable, transparent, disciplined, aligned, and results oriented. This company operates nationally and is growing by the day.



Wondering what it's like to work here? Come check this:


/watch?v=PIIv7sYj1Ns



SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

Driving an increase in client engagement and event participation by effectively managing communications and follow-ups to ensure high attendance rates, upselling additional seats or tickets, and maximizing event participation



OBJECTIVES

- Manage post-sale client interactions to confirm ticket payments and ensure attendance at purchased events.

- Audit pre-event task completion and manage reminders to ensure clients are ready for their events.

- Assist the Client Concierge Manager in resolving client concerns, answering queries, and enhancing client satisfaction.

- Facilitate event scheduling, including follow-ups with clients who have not scheduled their attendance and rescheduling as necessary.

- Upsell additional event tickets or seats by effectively using sales scripts tailored to various Cardone Ventures events and workshops.

- Build trust and maintain positive client relationships through open and interactive communication.

- Manage various client communications platforms, including HubSpot, Asana, G-Suite, Slick Text, and Aloware, ensuring timely responses and accurate information sharing.

- Monitor and manage und
 calls and tasks, marketing responses, and communication blasts to drive client engagement.

- Support with scrubbing and managing deals related to 10X360 and Essential Workshops to ensure accurate tracking and client follow-up

- Ensure response times to client inquiries are within a 24-hour window, maintaining a high standard of customer service.



COMPETENCIES

- Proven experience in de-escalating client situations while maintaining a positive representation of the Cardone Ventures brand.

- Proficiency in HubSpot, Asana, and G-Suite tools (Sheets, Documents, Gmail, Calendars, Slides).

- Strong communication skills with the ability to memorize and effectively utilize essential sales scripts.

- High level of business acumen to engage with business owners and understand their needs.

- Capable of executing process improvements to streamline client communications and event coordination.

- Ability to manage and prioritize multiple tasks, including daily priority meetings, pre-event qualifications, and managing client communications across multiple platforms.



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE

- At least 2 years’ experience in a customer service role in a professional environment



PHYSICAL REQUIREMENTS

- Prolonged periods sitting at a desk and working on a computer



COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY

As an equal opportunity employer committed to meeting the needs of a multigenerational and multicultural workforce Cardone Ventures recognizes that a diverse staff, reflective of our community, is an integral and welcome part of a successful and ethical business. We hire local talent at all levels regardless of race, color, religion, age, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation or disability, and actively foster inclusion in all forms both within our company and across interactions with clients, candidates and partners.



If this position caught your eye, send us your resume! For best consideration, please complete the online application form:

title: Ad Creative Specialist
description:
Job description - Ad Creative Specialist



Our e-commerce company is hiring! We are looking for a full-time E-Commerce Ad Creative specialist to join our team, someone with a thorough understanding of Dropshipping through Shopify and paid advertising. You will make sure that our ad creatives are optimized for conversions and match our product description and quality.



What does an Ad Creative VA do?

An ad creative VA is mainly responsible for creating Advertising creatives for social media advertising. This involves product photo and video editing. This may also involve helping to improve older listings to maximize sales. Marketing skills are required!



Responsibilities and Duties

* Creating new ad creatives for our dropshipping products: in Danish and Swedish.

* Swipe ad creatives from competitors

* Implement Direct Response Marketing strategies to convert visitors into customers.

* Design eye-catching advertisements for social media platforms,
 marketing, and website banners.

* Create and edit product photos to enhance their appeal and showcase features effectively.

* Stay updated on industry trends and best practices in digital advertising and design.

* Accurately compare the products with the ones from our website.

* Collaborate with the marketing team and product listers

* Reviewing marketing materials, websites and presentations to ensure compliance with the regulations of the advertising platforms

Qualifications and Skills



* Proven experience in creating ad creatives.

* Experience with AI is a MUST.

* Proficiency in graphic design software such as Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) Canva etc. Software that I use myself: Elevenlabs and Clipchamp. But if you prefer to use other software, that would also be fine.

* Strong understanding of digital marketing principles and techniques.

* Excellent communication skills and ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams.

* Detail-oriented with a keen eye for visual aesthetics and design.

* Ability to multitask and prioritize tasks in a fast-paced environment.

* Familiarity with e-commerce platforms and online advertising channels.



Also:

* You do what you say. You are passionate about delivering results and you always finish what you start. - You take pride in being able to keep your word.

* Have a high attention to detail. When it comes to details, nothing gets past you.. and we mean nothing! - So much so that we want you to include "the devil is in the details" as the answer to the first question when you submit your application. Seriously.

* Preferably you have a couple of years experience in this field, and have worked for other dropshipping and e-commerce companies. You must understand how paid advertising works, in the sense that you know how sending traffic to an online store should lead to conversions.



Salary Expectations:

You will start as Trainee Ad Creative Specialist, where you will be working on the side of the company owner with compensation of 5$/hr. You will start as parttimer, but if everything goes well, this can grow into a fulltime job.



We always start with a one-month trial to ensure safety for both parties. After that, we'll have an evaluation to see if both parties would like to proceed to work together.



Benefits:

* Get to work in a young company with lots of ambitions

* Work fully remote

* Get paid every two weeks, instead of once per month (13 times per year)

* Upgrade your knowledge and skills in the fastest growing industry: digital marketing



If you can commit to and live with the following principles, then you are the type of person who will be successful and help our company thrive. If you feel this level of engagement is not right for you or that you're not willing or able to participate with us at this level, we are not a good fit for you.



Our expectation is that you will take the steps necessary to do what you say you are going to do and be accountable for your actions. In other words, live 'Above the line'.



Are you looking for a new adventure? Make sure you apply today!

title: Graphic Designer – Remote (STEAM Education Nonprofit)
description:
Job Title: Graphic Designer – Remote (STEAM Education Nonprofit)



Location: Remote

Organization: STEAM Ahead

Hours: Part-Time (10–20 hours/week)

Timezone: United States; Eastern Time



About STEAM Ahead



STEAM Ahead is a Boston-based nonprofit organization dedicated to expanding access to Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts, and Mathematics (STEAM) education for historically underrepresented youth.



We design hands-on educational programs, leadership initiatives, and workforce development experiences that help students explore STEM careers and build confidence in their abilities.

Our team collaborates with schools, universities, and corporate partners to create engaging educational experiences for young learners.



We are seeking a creative and dependable Graphic Designer to help produce visual materials that support our programs, events, and marketing initiatives.



What You’ll Work On - You will design a variety of materials used across our programs and outreach efforts, including:

- Social media graphics

- Educational worksheets and activity guides

- Presentation slides and visual decks

- Program flyers and promotional materials

- Event materials (posters, signage, handouts)

- Infographics explaining STEAM concepts

- Visual assets for our website and newsletters



Our design style is clean, modern, and educational, and many materials are created for students, educators, and corporate partners.



Tools & Skills - You should be comfortable using:

- Adobe Illustrator

- Adobe Photoshop

- Adobe InDesign

- Canva

- Google Slides or PowerPoint



Bonus skills:

- Infographic design

- Educational design

- Social media design

- Presentation design

What We’re Looking For - We’re looking for someone who is:

- Creative and detail-oriented

- Able to follow brand guidelines

- Organized and able to manage multiple projects

- Communicative and responsive

- Comfortable working independently in a remote environment

- Experience working with education organizations, nonprofits, or youth programs is a plus.



Workflow & Communication - Our team primarily uses:

- Google Drive

- Google Documents

- Slack

- Trello / Notion

- Canva



*You should be comfortable collaborating remotely and sharing editable design files when needed.



Compensation: Compensation depends on experience and availability.



How to Apply - To apply, please include:

- A link to your design portfolio

- A short message introducing yourself

- Your favorite design project you have worked on 

- The design tools you use most often and are most proficient with



Please Note:

* Shortlisted applicants may be asked to complete a small paid design task to help us identify candidates who are the best fit for our team.

title: 3D Printing File Prep Specialist, Slicer Slicing Expert
description:
What You'll Do



You'll be responsible for preparing production-ready 3D print files at high volume for our team.



Daily work (80%):

• Open STL/3MF files from our product queue

• Set up proper print settings in Bambu Studio (orientation, supports, infill, walls)

• Export production-ready 3MF files

• Mark items complete in our system

• Target: 50-75 files per day



File hunting (20%):

• Find matching STL files on Thingiverse, Printables, Makerworld, Thangs, and MyMiniFactory when a product needs an exact file match

• Search by keyword, image, or product type

• Verify files are open-source licensed and printable

• Flag items that need custom design vs. existing files



Requirements



Must have:

• Experience with FDM 3D printing (personal or professional)

• Proficiency in Bambu Studio (required)

• Understanding of print orientation and why it matters (layer lines, strength, aesthetics)

• Understanding of support material — when it's needed, how to minimize it

• Knowledge of common materials (PLA, ABS, PETG, TPU)

• Reliable internet + computer that can run Bambu Studio

• Available full-time (40 hrs/week)



Nice to have:

• Own 3D printer for test prints on complex items

• Experience browsing and downloading from Thingiverse, Printables, Makerworld, and Thangs

• Familiarity with wall thickness, infill patterns, and bridging

• Experience with multi-piece assemblies or hardware inserts



What We Offer:

• Steady, consistent work with a high-performance team

• Clear daily targets and a straightforward workflow

• Growth opportunity as we scale



How to Apply:

Send a 2-minute video explaining why you're the perfect candidate for this position.

title: WordPress + WooCommerce Specialist for Natural Health Brand (Australia)
description:

Do you know how real humans shop online and how to gently guide them from interest ? confidence ? purchase?

This includes:



Creating a uniform product page structure (layout, headings, image order)

Optimise page speed

Add internal links for SEO

???? What We’re Looking For

Has proven experience with WooCommerce UX & conversion optimisation

Understands customer behaviour, decision fatigue, and buying psychology

Can explain why something should be changed, not just how

Is comfortable working with an existing brand and improving it, not overriding it

Communicates clearly and professionally in English

Please include the word “Purple Cow” in the subject of your application, so we know you have read the job description.

WordPress + WooCommerce

Elementor

Checkout optimisation experience

SEO knowledge

description:
We run two e-commerce brands with paid
/Meta ads across multiple markets (Italy, Spain, UK, US, France). We need a video editor to join us long-term across both brands.



Brand 1: Pet supplement brand (dog skin health — collagen chews & liquid)



Brand 2: Orthopedic cervical pillow (neck pain relief — heat + massage device)



Phase 1 (starting now):



Build B-roll libraries for both brands. You'll watch competitor video ads, cut them into individual clips using CapCut or LosslessCut, name and organize them into Google Drive folders. We provide a full guide PDF for each brand + an AI-assisted workflow (Gemini) that gives you timestamps — you just cut, name and sort.



Phase 2 (once libraries are ready):

Edit full video ad creatives from scripts we provide. VSLs, UGC-style ads, short-form video ads. We give you the script, the voiceover, and the B-roll folder references — you assemble the final video. You'll be editing ads in multiple languages (English, Italian, Spanish, French) but you don't need to speak them — all instructions are in English.

What you need:



CapCut proficiency (cutting, transitions, text overlays, pacing)

Organized and detail-oriented (naming conventions, file management across 2 brands)

Able to follow process documents independently

Reliable internet + Google Drive access

Good eye for pacing and visual storytelling



Nice to have:



Experience editing direct-response /
 video ads

title: FACEBOOK - META MEDIA BUYER – MED SPA, LASIK, IVF & PLASTIC SURGERY
description:
META MEDIA BUYER – MED SPA, LASIK, IVF & PLASTIC SURGERY SPECIALIST (FULL TIME)

SALARY: $1,500–2,000 USD/month (based on experience + substantial performance bonuses)

US (PST or EST) time zone overlap (minimum 4 hours); Time Doctor is Required



ABOUT US

We are a fast-growing AI appointment generation agency serving high-value healthcare and aesthetics clients, including med spas, LASIK clinics, IVF centres, and plastic surgery practices. We generate premium appointments that convert into paying clients, and we’re looking for a Media Buyer who already has proven experience in these industries.



Direct experience running paid campaigns for med spas, LASIK, IVF, or plastic surgery, a STRONG ADVANTAGE



WHAT YOU’LL MANAGE

•	Large monthly ad budgets across 15+ high-value client accounts in aesthetics and healthcare.

•	B2B campaigns: surgery consultations, IVF bookings, clinic demos.

•	B2C campaigns: med spa treatments, LASIK bookings, IVF discovery calls, plastic surgery consultations.

•	Full campaign lifecycle: strategy, setup, scale, optimisation.

•	Advanced audience segmentation and lookalike modelling.

•	CRM and marketing stack integration: GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Calendly.



CREATIVE RESPONSIBILITIES

•	Develop AI-driven content with heygen, Sora, ElevenLabs, nano banana pro.

•	Design and motion graphics using Canva Pro, Premiere Pro, CapCut.

•	Test creative angles, hooks, and ad formats specifically for med spa, LASIK, IVF, and plastic surgery clients.

•	Analyse creative performance to improve future campaigns.

•	Maintain brand consistency while scaling creative assets.



PERFORMANCE EXPECTATIONS

•	B2C Appointments: $50–150 CPA (varies by service)

•	B2B Appointments: $100–400 CPA (qualified consultations)

•	Minimum 2.5% CTR across campaigns

•	Maintain 60%+ landing page conversion rate

•	70%+ show rate for booked appointments

•	Weekly performance analysis with actionable optimisation insights



EXPERIENCE REQUIREMENTS

•	2+ years
/Meta Ads experience, with direct experience in med spas, LASIK, IVF, or plastic surgery.

•	Portfolio demonstrating ad spend managed and appointment generation results.

•	Proven ability to scale campaigns 3x+ while maintaining cost targets.

•	Experience running both B2B and B2C appointment campaigns.

•	Multiple industry experience preferred.



WHAT TO PROVE IN YOUR APPLICATION

•	Screenshots of ad account dashboards showing spend and performance.

•	Specific cost per appointment improvements achieved (with numbers).

•	Biggest campaign rescue/turnaround story.

•	Experience managing large monthly ad budgets in healthcare or aesthetics.



TRAINING AND GROWTH PATH

•	First 30 days: Onboarding with our proven appointment generation frameworks.

•	Month 2–3: Full account ownership and performance accountability.

•	Ongoing: Advanced appointment generation strategies, AI creative training, and mentorship.

•	Performance bonuses tied to client retention and appointment quality.



TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS

•	Advanced
 Business Manager and Ads Manager skills

•	Conversion tracking setup and optimisation

•	CRM integration experience (GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Calendly)

•	Landing page optimisation knowledge

•	Video editing software familiarity (CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, Premiere Pro)



PERSONALITY TRAITS WE’RE SEEKING

•	Obsessed with appointment quality and show rates, not just volume

•	Creative problem solver who thinks beyond templates

•	Takes ownership of results and client success

•	Proactive communication about performance trends

•	Organised, trustworthy, and able to deliver in a timely manner

•	Understands that compensation is based on a 40-hour work week

•	Understands that the use of Time Doctor is a productivity measure, not a matter of trust.



RED FLAGS (DON’T APPLY IF)

•	You are not available for full-time 40-hour work week

•	You cannot provide specific metrics from previous roles

•	You cannot commit to US (PST or EST) time zone overlap



COMPENSATION DETAILS

•	Base: $1,500–2,000/month depending on experience

•	Performance bonuses: $200–500/month for hitting appointment targets

•	Annual raises: 15–25% for top performers

•	Paid vacation and sick leave eligibility after 3 months

•	13th Month Salary eligibility after 3 months

•	Access to premium software, AI tools, live masterminds & paid communities



HOW TO APPLY

•	Start your message with: "Yes, I have read the job ad and I understand it fully"

•	Latest resume/CV with work history up to 2026



SELECTION PROCESS

1.	Application review (2–3 days)

2.	Skills assessment test (appointment generation scenarios)

3.	Video interview with performance deep-dive

4.	1-week paid trial project with real client account/campaign

5.	Final decision and onboarding



Please do not apply if you are not comfortable with Time Doctor as this is a non-negotiable requirement of the role. Thanks and we look forward to hearing from you!

title: Sales Qualifier VA — Outbound Calling
description:
We're a 55-year-old outdoor structure company (sheds, garages, ADUs, pavilions, gazebos, pergolas) based in New England. We're growing fast and need a sharp VA to call new leads, qualify them, and keep our CRM updated so nothing falls through the cracks.



You'll be one of the first voices our customers hear — so friendly, professional English communication is a must.



What you'll do



? Call new inbound leads within 24 hours of inquiry using a provided script

? Ask qualifying questions (product interest, timeline, location, budget range)

? Log all call outcomes and notes in HubSpot CRM

? Schedule follow-up appointments for qualified leads with the sales team

? Send follow-up texts/emails from provided templates after calls

? Re-engage cold leads from the pipeline on a weekly basis



What we're looking for



? Excellent spoken and written English — clear, warm, and professional

? Prior experience in outbound calling, sales support, or customer service

? Comfortable working US Eastern hours (9am–5pm EST)

? Reliable internet, quiet workspace, and a good headset

? CRM experience preferred (HubSpot a plus, but we'll train)

? Self-starter who takes ownership and doesn't need hand-holding



What we offer



? Stable, long-term position with a 55-year-old company — this isn't a one-off gig

? Full training provided — scripts, product knowledge, and CRM walkthrough

? Room to grow — strong performers can take on more responsibility

? Direct access to the owner — no bureaucracy, fast decisions



To apply



Send a short voice recording (1–2 min) introducing yourself and describing your phone/sales experience. Applications without a recording will not be reviewed.

title: Tech Automation Specialist
description:
AI Agency Institute



We’re Hiring!



Tech Automation Specialist



Full-Time | Remote | $15–$25 USD/hr



About Us

AI Agency Institute is at the forefront of building AI-powered systems and automations for businesses. We leverage cutting-edge tools like GoHighLevel, AI voice technology, and automation platforms to build scalable solutions for our clients.



We are a fast-moving, innovation-driven team looking for a highly skilled automation specialist to help us build and manage advanced AI automation systems.



The Role

We’re looking for a technical automation expert who can build, manage, and scale automation systems using GoHighLevel, AI tools, APIs, and workflow automation platforms.



You will work closely with our team to develop AI-powered systems, integrations, and automations that help businesses streamline operations and improve performance.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Build and manage automation systems inside GoHighLevel (GHL)

 • Develop AI voice and chatbot automations using tools such as CloseBot and Retell

 • Create and maintain API integrations and webhooks between different platforms

 • Build automation workflows using n8n

 • Integrate Stripe API for payments, subscriptions, and billing workflows

 • Troubleshoot and optimize existing automation systems

 • Work with the team to design and deploy scalable AI automation solutions

 • Document workflows and automation processes



What We’re Looking For

• Strong expertise in n8n automation workflows (required)

• Strong experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) automation and CRM systems

• Strong knowledge of API integrations and webhooks

• Experience with AI automation tools (CloseBot, Retell, or similar)

• Experience integrating Stripe API for payment automation

• Ability to design and maintain scalable automation systems

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills

• Excellent written communication in English



Nice to Have

• Experience building AI voice agents or AI sales bots

 • Experience working with automation agencies

 • Experience integrating multiple SaaS platforms via APIs

 • Experience building client automation systems or SaaS workflows



Compensation & Benefits

• $15–$25 USD per hour depending on experience

 • Full-time, remote position

 • Opportunity to work with cutting-edge AI automation technology

 • Collaborative and flexible team environment

 • Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling AI company



How to Apply

Send us your application with the following:

- A 2–3 minute introduction video telling us about your experience

- Your portfolio or examples of automation systems you’ve built

- A short summary of your experience with GHL, AI automations, APIs, and n8n



Your hourly rate within the $15–$25 USD range



We’re excited to hear from you. If you’re passionate about AI automation and building powerful systems, apply now.

mber to support our brand’s growth across digital and offline channels. You will play a key role in processing POs, coordinating marketing campaigns, managing events, and driving strategies that connect with our beauty brand presence.

title: Digital Marketing Executive (Shopify & Paid Media)
description:
Location: Virtual / Gold Coast, Australia

Type: Full-Time (ASAP Start)

Compensation: $1,500 AUD / Month

The Mission

Beauty Sleep Club is scaling toward a $15M valuation, and we need a world-class executor to manage the gears of our marketing engine. We provide the high-converting creatives (via our agency, Icon) and the SOPs; you provide the technical execution across Shopify, Omnisend, and our paid social channels.

Core Competencies & Responsibilities

1. Paid Media Execution (FB, Google, TikTok)



/Meta: Launch and monitor new campaigns using our winning "Dr. Fern" and "Survival Mode" frameworks.

Google Ads: Execute and manage search/shopping campaigns to capture high-intent traffic.

TikTok Ads: Deploy viral-style creative assets and manage spend efficiency.

2. Retention &
 Marketing (Omnisend)



Campaign Deployment: Schedule and send high-end, luxury-minimalist
 campaigns to our 50,000-customer list.

Flow Management: Ensure all automated flows (Welcome, Abandoned Cart, Post-Purchase) are running perfectly to maximize LTV.

3. Social Media Management



Publishing: Manage the daily cadence of Reels, Stories, and static posts across Instagram and TikTok.

Community Engagement: Maintain the "Brand Voice"—respond to DMs and comments to build trust with our community of 70,000+ women.

4. Shopify Operations



Site Management: Coordinate with our CRO leads to ensure landing pages (Replo) and product descriptions are updated and functional.

Requirements



Immediate Availability: You must be able to start full-time ASAP.

Technical Proficiency: Proven experience inside Meta Ads Manager, TikTok Ads Manager, and Omnisend.

Execution Machine: You thrive on "closing" tasks. If an SOP is given, it is executed flawlessly and on time.

Data-First Mindset: You understand how to track ROI, link clicks, and sales to ensure our targets are met.



How to Apply

If you are a high-energy marketer who lives for the "Publish" button and wants to be part of a brand headed for a $15M exit, apply now - send me a 3 minute loom of who you are, your experience, and how you can help

title: Senior Brand Manager (E-Commerce / D2C)
description:
About the Role

Kranis B.V. is looking for an experienced Senior Brand Manager (E-Commerce) to take full ownership of our D2C brand operations. This role is highly strategic and hands-on, with full responsibility for managing and scaling our e-commerce brands across all brand-related functions excluding marketplace/platform operations.



You will be responsible for driving brand growth for two of our D2C brands—Minismus and Matakumi—with a strong focus on Shopify performance, pricing strategy, merchandising, conversion rate optimization, SEO, paid media, and brand presence across digital channels.



This is a senior role requiring proven experience managing high-revenue D2C brands or equivalent agency-level expertise.



Key Responsibilities

Own and manage the overall brand strategy for Kranis B.V.’s D2C brands

Lead all e-commerce brand initiatives across Shopify stores, including:

Pricing strategy and merchandising

Conversion Rate Optimization (CVR)

SEO optimization and website performance

Oversee and optimize paid media efforts, including
 Ads and Google Ads

Manage and align social media presence with brand strategy

Analyze performance data across e-commerce, marketing, and brand channels to drive growth and profitability

Collaborate with internal teams and external partners to ensure consistent brand execution

Continuously identify opportunities to improve brand positioning, customer experience, and revenue performance



Requirements

5+ consecutive years of experience managing a D2C brand (Shopify-based) with:

10M+ annual revenue, OR

5+ consecutive years working in an agency managing D2C brands at this level

Strong, hands-on experience with Shopify



Proven expertise in:

D2C e-commerce strategy

Pricing and merchandising

CVR and SEO optimization

Paid advertising (Meta & Google)

Highly analytical, data-driven, and commercially minded

Strong leadership, ownership mindset, and ability to manage multiple brand functions

Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills



What We Offer

Competitive salary package

Full-time, stable role with long-term growth opportunities

Collaborative and performance-driven work environment

Opportunity to take full ownership of established and growing D2C brands

title: Customer support and Sales Representative
description:
Remote | Full-Time | Australian Business Hours



The Lucy Rose Clinic is an established Australian integrative telehealth clinic specialising in women’s hormonal, metabolic, and thyroid health. We support patients nationwide through practitioner consultations and advanced laboratory testing.



We are seeking a confident and compassionate Patient Support & Sales Specialist to support patients after their appointments and guide them through the next steps in their health journey.



This role combines patient support, health education, and consultative sales.



You will speak with patients who have already engaged with the clinic and help ensure they receive the right programs, testing, and support to achieve their health goals.



This role is primarily phone-based, so excellent spoken English and confidence speaking with patients is essential.



This is not cold calling. You will work with warm patients who have already had appointments or expressed interest in our programs.



About the Role



Responsibilities include:



• Outbound follow-up calls to patients after practitioner appointments

• Ensuring patients understand their testing, treatment plans, and next steps

• Supporting patients to stay engaged with their health programs

• Recommending appropriate programs, products, and memberships where relevant

• Up selling extended care packages when appropriate

• Handling inbound patient enquiries and guiding them to the right services

• Providing booking links for consultations or coaching sessions

• Answering general questions and escalating clinical queries when needed

• Documenting patient interactions in our CRM systems



You will work closely with our Australian clinical and operations team to ensure patients receive excellent support throughout their journey.



What We’re Looking For



• Qualification in Nursing, Nutrition, Health Sciences, or Allied Health preferred

• Experience in healthcare administration, telehealth, or patient support

• Experience in sales, upselling, or consultative selling

• Near-native spoken English with a clear, neutral accent easily understood by Australian patients

• Confident and warm phone manner

• Comfortable working with scripts, KPIs, and conversion targets

• Highly organised with strong attention to detail

• Reliable internet connection and quiet working environment



Highly Regarded



• Experience working with Australian or US healthcare accounts

• Experience in telehealth or healthcare call centres

• Experience selling health programs, supplements, or wellness services

• Familiarity with CRMs and scheduling systems



What We Offer



• Full training in our programs and clinical approach

• Structured scripts and sales support

• Stable, long-term role with a growing Australian clinic

• Performance bonuses based on conversions and KPIs

• Supportive and professional team environment



How to Apply



Please include:



• Your CV

• A 1–2 minute introduction video explaining your background and experience speaking with patients by phone

• Your healthcare or wellness background

• Your experience speaking with clients or patients on calls



In your video, please answer this question:



How would you support a patient who is unsure about completing their testing or continuing their program?



Applications without a video will not be considered.

title: Chief Marketing Officer – Real Estate / Property Management
description:
The Opportunity

We're a proptech company redefining how parking garages generate revenue. We install overhead storage lockers in underutilized parking structures, turning dead space into recurring income for property owners. We're scaling aggressively—targeting 3,400 units and $9.25M in revenue across 9 markets in 2026—and we need a CMO who can build the marketing engine to get us there.

This is a ground-floor leadership role. You'll own everything from brand positioning to demand generation to sales enablement. You'll work directly with the CEO and sales leadership to drive pipeline and close deals faster.

What You'll Own



Full marketing strategy targeting property managers, developers, and HOAs

Demand generation: paid media,
 campaigns, cold outreach, and content that drives qualified leads

Brand development and positioning in a category we're creating

Sales enablement: collateral, presentations, case studies, and tools that help our sales team close

Website optimization and conversion rate improvement

Marketing analytics: tracking what's working, cutting what's not, and scaling winners

Building and managing a lean, high-output marketing function



What We're Looking For



Proven track record scaling marketing for a B2B company, ideally in real estate, proptech, property management, or related industries

Deep experience in demand generation—you've built campaigns that directly drove revenue

Ability to operate strategically and execute tactically (this is not a delegate-only role)

Strong understanding of the property management ecosystem and how decisions get made

Data-driven mindset with the ability to tie marketing spend to pipeline and revenue

Experience building marketing from early stage or scaling through growth phase

Excellent communicator who can translate complex value propositions into clear messaging



Who Thrives in This Role



You want ownership, not bureaucracy

You're energized by building something, not maintaining it

You think in funnels, conversion rates, and CAC—not just impressions

You can write copy, brief a designer, and analyze a campaign in the same afternoon

You move fast and make decisions with imperfect information



Non-Negotiables



Experience marketing to property managers, HOAs, developers, or commercial real estate decision-makers

Demonstrated results: show us campaigns you built and the revenue they generated

Ability to work US hours and travel occasionally for industry events or tea
etings



Compensation

Competitive base plus equity and performance-based bonuses tied to growth targets. This is a leadership role with significant upside for the right person.

To Apply

Submit a short video (2-3 minutes) telling us why you're the right CMO for this role. Cover your most relevant experience and one marketing initiative you led that directly drove measurable business growth.
